Could Tesla Stock Be Worth $2,000 in 2030?

Adam Spatacco, The Motley Fool

In this article: TSLA

As of this writing (March 5), Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) stock is trading for roughly $404 per share -- equating to a market capitalization of $1.3 trillion. This valuation reflects a high degree of collective optimism following an otherwise volatile performance in 2025.

Many analysts on Wall Street view Tesla through the lens of an automotive manufacturer -- obsessed with the company's quarterly vehicle delivery and production figures. The smartest money, however, is looking at something else entirely: Tesla's vision to become a services business powered by artificial intelligence (AI).

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Below, I'll break down how Tesla stock could potentially reach over $2,000 per share by 2030 as the company evolves from a car company and into a distributed physical AI ecosystem.

Key 1: Monetizing full self-driving at scale

The first crux of Tesla's long-term bull thesis revolves around its ambitions in autonomous driving . In Tesla's recent earnings report, investors learned that subscriptions to the company's full self-driving (FSD) platform grew 38% year over year to 1.1 million paid customers. This represents 12% of Tesla's all-time cumulative vehicle deliveries.

As Tesla inches closer to 8 billion cumulative miles driven with FSD, more regulators will hopefully understand and accept the case for Tesla launching a global robotaxi service. If Tesla can capture a mere fraction of the estimated $10 trillion robotaxi market, the company's automotive hardware becomes the path to unlock a recurring, high-margin software operation.

Key 2: Scaling Optimus globally

This year, Tesla is entering its long-awaited foray into AI-powered robotics. According to CEO Elon Musk, Tesla hopes to transition from prototype to actual production of its humanoid robot, Optimus, by year-end.

The long-term upside with Optimus revolves around Tesla's ability to scale Optimus in a way that profits from labor arbitrage. In other words, Tesla must execute on building and commercializing a general-purpose robot that costs less than the rate of an hourly worker inside a factory or retail setting, for example.

The value proposition from Optimus is compelling. At the enterprise level, companies with manufacturing facilities all over the world would be able to command unparalleled unit economics as they transition from a dense network of human labor to one powered by automated robots working 24/7.

Against this backdrop, it's not surprising that Musk himself has said that Optimus could become multiples larger than Tesla's EV business -- potentially accounting for 80% of the company's future value.

Key 3: Energy storage is a stealthy source of growth

In 2025, Tesla's energy business grew 27% year over year to $12.8 billion. Not only is this Tesla's fastest-growing revenue driver, but it's also massively profitable. During the fourth quarter, the company's energy storage division generated $1.1 billion in gross profit -- marking the fifth consecutive quarter of record profit.

I view the energy storage business as something of a valuation floor for Tesla. While the outcomes around the company's AI opportunities are more binary, battery energy storage systems are on pace to become a $105 billion market by 2030 -- providing Tesla with an enormous, multiyear landgrab for its utility operation.

Valuation: Could Tesla reach $7.5 trillion in 2030?

While the revenue and profit margin profiles from AI-powered services and energy storage are compelling, a good deal of Tesla's future value hinges on a successful transition into a dominant leader across two emerging categories: self-driving vehicles and humanoid robotics. This will require nearly flawless execution in scaling the company's proprietary machine learning technology and neural networks.

At $2,000 per share, Tesla's implied market cap would be about $7.5 trillion. This implies roughly 400% upside to current trading levels.

While this degree of upside is not impossible, it's incredibly difficult to project with any real accuracy given the fact that autonomous systems -- be it in vehicles or robots -- are not yet deployed at scale by any single company right now. In other words, the technology remains primarily experimental and not yet fully practical.

With this in mind, I see Tesla as a stock worth monitoring but not necessarily a clear AI winner at this time. The optimism fueling Tesla stock seems rooted more in speculation and hype than sound fundamentals at the moment.

We just issued 'double down' alerts on 3 stocks — find out if Tesla made our list

Ever feel like you missed the boat in buying the most successful stocks? Then you’ll want to hear this.

On rare occasions, our expert team of analysts issues a “Double Down” stock recommendation for companies that they think are about to pop. If you’re worried you’ve already missed your chance to invest, now is the best time to buy before it’s too late. And the numbers speak for themselves:

Nvidia: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2009, you’d have $461,216 !*

Apple: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2008, you’d have $49,025 !*

Netflix: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2004, you’d have $534,008 !*

Here's Why Garmin Stock Soared in February

Howard Smith, The Motley Fool

In this article: GRMN

GPS-enabled device maker Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) let investors know that business is booming. Its fourth-quarter financial update and 2026 guidance helped the stock soar 25.4% in February, according to data provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence .

Even after a standout 2025 that will lead to tough comparisons this year, management is still predicting 9% growth. Investors can look at a history of conservative forecasts and conclude that double-digit growth is likely again this year, making Garmin stock a solid buy.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Garmin's fitness segment has grown to become its largest. After notching 42% year-over-year growth in Q4, the category has averaged 32% growth each quarter over the past two years. Garmin's fitness products include more than just smartwatches and other devices for running, cycling, golf, and other sports. It offers novel features in digital health and fitness. The company has enhanced its premium Connect+ offering with AI-powered nutrition tracking and insights to help users achieve nutrition and fitness goals.

Fitness isn't the only area where Garmin is thriving. The company achieved record revenue across all five segments last year, with aviation and marine also posting double-digit growth in the fourth quarter. For the full year, Garmin's revenue surged 15%, nearly double the 8% growth management originally predicted.

That's more of a pattern than an anomaly. The 2024 revenue growth of 20% followed the company's initial estimate of 10% growth over 2023. Investors should factor management's historically conservative guidance into their decision on whether the stock is a good value . That helps explain why the stock jumped last month.

Guidance for 9% revenue growth and slightly higher earnings per share (EPS) growth gives management confidence to boost returns to shareholders, too. It proposed to increase its quarterly dividend from $0.90 to $1.05 per share. That's a 17% boost.

The company itself thinks its stock is still a good buy, too. Garmin initiated a new $500 million share repurchase plan. That replaces the prior $300 million plan, which had only $56 million remaining.

There's no shortage of cash to accomplish both shareholder-friendly moves. Garmin generated $1.36 billion in free cash flow in 2025 and ended the year with about $4.1 billion in cash and marketable securities. With no debt on the balance sheet, investors should consider that financial strength when studying valuation.

Its forward price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio of 26 should be adjusted to reflect its cash position and management's tendency for conservative guidance. That would bring its effective P/E down to about 22, about 10% below its three-year average. That means Garmin shares still look like a good value today, even after the February surge.

2 Brilliant Growth Stocks to Buy Now and Hold for the Long Term

James Halley, The Motley Fool

Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) and BlackSky Technology (NYSE: BKSY) are slam-dunk defense stocks worth buying now and holding on to for the long term.

President Donald Trump has floated the idea of a $1.7 trillion defense budget for the federal government's fiscal 2027, and that was in January, before he escalated the conflict with Iran. Even if whatever defense budget Congress eventually passes falls short of that request, the current geopolitical situation adds credibility to reports such as a recent one from the bipartisan Center for a New American Security that concluded that the U.S. military needs to improve its ability to counter drone attacks.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Here are three reasons to buy and hold each of these stocks.

Sound financial footing and a big backlog for Lockheed Martin

Lockheed Martin ended 2025 with a record backlog of $194 billion, about two and a half times its annual sales, so the company's revenue growth for the next few years is already in the works.

The U.S. defense and aerospace company had $75 billion in sales in 2025, up 6%. Its earnings per share (EPS) fell 3.6% to $21.49, a decline that management credited to a higher tax rate, pension-related charges, and higher interest expenses. Lockheed predicts 2026 revenue of $77.05 billion to $80 billion, which would be a 4.7% increase at the midpoint, and EPS of $29.35 to $30.25, which would be up 37% at the midpoint.

Lockheed's planes and weaponry are in demand

Lockheed delivered 191 F-35 fighter jets and 120 PAC-3 MSC interceptors in 2025, record numbers for the defense contractor. It has invested heavily in artificial intelligence (AI) solutions, and some of those investments are already paying off, with over-the-air updates for its GPS III and Tranche 1 transport-layer satellites.

During the U.S.'s Operation Absolute Resolve in Venezuela in January, the company's F-35 and F-22 fighter jets were used, as well as its RQ-170 Sentinel stealth drones and Sikorsky Black Hawk helicopters.

The Lockheed product with perhaps the highest demand is the Patriot interceptor missile, which is used to destroy incoming threats. The company is increasing production capacity for those missiles from about 600 a year to 2,000 a year, and announced a plan to quadruple the number of Terminal High Altitude Area Defense (THAAD) interceptors it manufactures to 400 a year.

Dividends that reward investor patience

Lockheed raised its quarterly dividend by 4.5% in 2025 to $3.45 a share, giving it a yield of around 2.5% at its current share price.

That yield has come down somewhat because the stock is up more than 36% so far this year. The company has increased its dividend for 24 consecutive years, for a total of 684%, so if it raises it again this year, it will join the Dividend Aristocrats®, the select group of S&P 500 companies that have increased their payouts for 25 or more consecutive years. (The term Dividend Aristocrats® is a registered trademark of Standard & Poor’s Financial Services LLC.)

The sky isn't the limit for BlackSky

BlackSky Technology, through its low Earth orbit satellites and Spectra software platform, provides high-frequency, high-resolution imagery and automated AI-powered analytics for defense and other purposes. It grew its backlog by 32% in 2025 to $345 million. The stock has climbed more than 29% so far in 2026.

The small-cap company can provide satellite imagery in real time, unlike traditional satellite systems, which may have significant lag times before they are in position to photograph the specific spot desired. BlackSky's system captures up to 15 images of each targeted location per day, which can be particularly helpful when monitoring moving targets, such as aircraft, ships, or forest fires.

BlackSky is on the road to being profitable

One thing that may cause investors to be hesitant about buying BlackSky is that it hasn't turned a profit since it went public in 2021 through a reverse merger with a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC).

That should change soon. In 2025, it reported revenue of $106.5 million, up 4.4%, and a loss of $2.09 per share, contracting from its loss of $2.67 per share in 2024. It also had its second consecutive year of positive adjusted earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (EBITDA) at $990,000. The company also booked a fourth-quarter loss of just $868,000 compared to its loss of $24.2 million in the prior-year period.

For 2026, management is predicting revenue to be between $120 million and $145 million, up 22% at the midpoint, and adjusted EBITDA between $6 million and $18 million, an increase of 122% at the midpoint.

A shift to high-margin SaaS and AI insights

Instead of just selling satellite photos, BlackSky is now moving to a software-as-a-service (SaaS) model, with tools that automatically highlight what has changed at a given location between satellite passes, and it provides the update within 90 minutes. Its move to a subscription-based model will likely result in higher gross margins that are more comparable to what software companies produce than the typical aerospace firm.

Diverse client bases help Lockheed and BlackSky

Over the past few years, the number of global conflicts has grown, requiring countries to reassess their defense needs. While Lockheed and BlackSky primarily market to the U.S. government, both have long-term contracts with U.S. allies.

Lockheed works with 50 countries, and BlackSky (though it keeps some of its deals confidential) has customers in the U.S., Europe, and Asia. That means even if the U.S. at some point trims its defense budget, these companies will have other customers to help them deliver growth.

Should you buy stock in BlackSky Technology right now?

news.Title: Apple Just Sent Investors a Message: Is The Stock a Buy?
news.Content: Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) has produced outstanding returns over the past 20 years. And through much of this period, the company relied on its popular devices, most notably the iPhone, to drive sales growth. However, the tech leader's strategy moving forward will likely be a bit different: Apple will rely increasingly more on its services segment. This isn't new information. Apple's push into services has been ongoing for years. And the company's most recent product announcements gave us more insight into part of the company's strategy.

news.Title: 搶進護國神山! 台積電徵才8千人 碩畢年薪上看220萬
news.Content:
搶進護國神山! 台積電徵才8千人 碩畢年薪上看220萬 民視財經網影音
2026年3月7日 週六 上午5:53

台積電
2330.TW

1,890 ( 0.53% )

財經中心／楊思敏、李澤民 台北報導
台大校園徵才博覽會熱鬧登場，今年天氣不錯，一早就吸引大量人潮。受到文組青睞的金融業，台新新光金開出7500個職缺，積極轉型的台泥，董事長張安平也來到現場，尋求專業人才。但人氣最高的，還是護國神山台積電，要招募8000人，碩士畢業新進工程師，年薪可達220萬元。
學生全擠在攤位前，仔細詢問工作內容，台大校園徵才博覽會人氣最高的攤位，非護國神山台積電莫屬。就連還在念書的學生，也提前來卡位實習機會。
廣告
廣告

大四學生：「製程的實習的職缺，研究所讀的東西就更專精。」

碩一學生：「先透過實習看看，台積電的工作環境，跟它有相關的可能壓力上，會不會讓我不適應，剛剛學長分享起來，覺得說好像又還是可以接受。」
台積電開出上千個實習職缺，今年更要在台灣，招募工程師和技術員共8000人，其中碩士畢業新進工程師，年薪可達220萬。

台積電今年預計招募8000名新鮮人。（圖／民視新聞）

外籍博士生：「台積電排名第一，每個人都會想要進去，所有的母廠都在台灣，每個人都想要得到最好的東西，台灣位處先鋒位置。」
台積電台灣人資營運處處長張進益：「我們業務成長以及，我們的技術開發等等的需求，（職缺）橫跨全台北中南，的確是（也）需要全球的人才，在我們公司裡面實習，將來也有機會，變成我們預先發聘的，這樣的一個人才。」

台大校長陳文章來到徵才博覽會現場。（圖／民視新聞）

受惠於AI，台灣電子業強勁成長、求才若渴，從上游半導體，到設備商艾司摩爾，也要在台招募600人，電源大廠台達電國內招1700人，全球近8000人，研發碩士新人起薪7萬5。
幾乎每年都會親自到徵才現場的台泥董事長張安平，談到這幾年公司積極轉型，今年鎖定有思考和國際溝通能力的人才，因應國際市場布局。
台泥董事長張安平：「工程師的職位，也還有很多100多位，可以動思未來的方向，然後願意在一個困難的情形下，願意做決定的人。」
文組學生高度關注的金融業，合併後的台新新光金，開出7500個職缺，富邦預計招募6900人，元大尋求30到50位儲備菁英，甚至尋求跨界產業研究員年薪上看300萬元。企業努力招手，要吸引新鮮人加入。

news.Title: Meet the Artificial Intelligence (AI) ETF With 20% of Its Portfolio Parked in Alphabet, Nvidia, Micron, and Amazon
news.Content:
Oops, something went wrong

Meet the Artificial Intelligence (AI) ETF With 20% of Its Portfolio Parked in Alphabet, Nvidia, Micron, and Amazon

Anthony Di Pizio, The Motley Fool

In this article: NVDA

Artificial intelligence (AI) stocks have led the broader market higher over the last few years. In fact, investors who haven't owned a slice of the AI revolution since it started gathering momentum at the start of 2023 have likely underperformed the benchmark S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) index.

Fortunately, there is a simple way to rectify that in 2026. The Roundhill Generative AI and Technology ETF (NYSEMKT: CHAT) exclusively invests in companies developing AI infrastructure, AI software, and AI platforms, with over one-fifth of its assets parked in Nvidia , Alphabet , Micron Technology , and Amazon alone.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Here's why this exchange-traded fund (ETF) could be a great addition to a diversified portfolio that's lacking exposure to the AI boom.

An complete AI portfolio packaged into one ETF

The Roundhill Generative AI and Technology ETF holds just 43 stocks. It's actively managed by a team of investment professionals who make adjustments to the portfolio based on what they believe will deliver the best returns.

This can lead to higher returns compared to passively managed ETFs that simply track indexes like the S&P 500, but on the flip side, volatility is a key risk because the AI industry is moving so quickly.

Volatility can also be a side effect of the Roundhill ETF's top-heavy portfolio construction. As I alluded to, the fund has invested 20.7% of its assets in just four of the AI industry's top companies, so its performance is sometimes disproportionately affected by them alone:

Roundhill ETF Portfolio Weighting

Data source: Roundhill Investments. Portfolio weightings are accurate as of March 1, 2026, and are subject to change.

Fortunately, those four stocks have been standout performers since the start of 2023, delivering an average return of 559% over the three-year period. For some perspective, the S&P 500 climbed by just 79%.

There is certainly a case for further upside in those four names. Nvidia's new Vera Rubin semiconductor platform for the data center is scheduled to enter mass production later this year, and it's expected to significantly bring down the cost of training and serving AI models. The company's chief financial officer, Colette Kress, says every major developer is likely to deploy them.

That's also good news for Micron, because its high-bandwidth memory solutions are embedded in Nvidia's AI chips, where they manage the seamless flow of data to unlock maximum processing speeds. In fact, the company's revenue growth is expected to accelerate from here thanks to AI-related demand.

As chips and other hardware components become more efficient, leasing computing capacity to developers via the cloud also becomes a more profitable business model due to much lower costs. Alphabet and Amazon operate two of the world's largest cloud platforms, so this will be a massive tailwind for both companies.

Some of the other prominent AI stocks in the Roundhill ETF include Microsoft , Advanced Micro Devices , Broadcom , Meta Platforms , Palantir Technologies , and two of Micron's largest global competitors, SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics .

A short track record, but blistering returns so far

The Roundhill Generative AI and Technology ETF was established in May 2023, so it doesn't have a very long track record. The AI industry has experienced very little turbulence over that period (broadly speaking), so we don't know how well this ETF will weather a potential storm when one inevitably arrives.

That said, the Roundhill ETF has gained 146% since its inception, obliterating the S&P 500, which returned 64% over the same period.

Those high returns come at a cost, because the ETF has an expense ratio of 0.75%, which means a $10,000 investment would incur an annual fee of around $75. That doesn't sound too bad at face value, but it's 25 times higher than the expense ratio of the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF , which is just 0.03%. An actively managed fund is typically more expensive to run because it requires the full attention of a team of experts, which costs money.

Considering its high cost, high portfolio concentration, and potential for volatility, investors shouldn't be betting the farm on an ETF like this one. Instead, it could be a great addition to a portfolio of other ETFs and individual stocks that currently lack exposure to the AI boom.

Should you buy stock in Tidal Trust II - Roundhill Generative Ai & Technology ETF right now?

news.Title: 1 Growth Stock Down 60% You'll Wish You'd Bought on the Dip, According to Wall Street
news.Content:
Oops, something went wrong

Types of car insurance

Tax brackets and rates

Student loan assistance

Market Domination Overtime

Stocks in Translation

1 Growth Stock Down 60% You'll Wish You'd Bought on the Dip, According to Wall Street

Anthony Di Pizio, The Motley Fool

Artificial intelligence (AI) is a revolutionary technology for businesses, but it also poses serious risks. As organizations rapidly deploy AI agents to boost the productivity of their human employees, they might be unwittingly exposing their sensitive data and mission-critical applications to hackers.

Zscaler 's (NASDAQ: ZS) zero-trust cybersecurity architecture is made for this moment. It was originally designed to secure corporate networks from unauthorized human access. Now, it's also being deployed to secure the activities of AI agents. This could be an enormous financial opportunity for Zscaler as AI adoption ramps up.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Zscaler stock is still trading 60% below its record high from 2021, when a frenzy in the tech markets drove its valuation to an unsustainable level. But the majority of the analysts tracked by The Wall Street Journal believe the stock is a buy right now, and their consensus price target points to significant potential upside from here.

Zero-trust security is ideal for the AI era

As the name implies, a zero-trust architecture treats every connection to a given corporate network as hostile, which plugs any potential vulnerabilities. It starts at the identity layer. Zscaler's Zero Trust Exchange analyzes every employee's login credentials, along with the device they are using and their location, to determine if it's really them trying to access the corporate network, or if it's an imposter.

That is especially important for remote workers who can't be physically supervised when accessing sensitive applications, but it doesn't stop there. The Zero Trust Exchange only connects employees to the apps they need to complete their jobs. So even if hackers breach the identity layer, they can't move laterally across the network, which limits their ability to inflict damage.

Then there is Zero Trust Branch, which ties Zscaler's "Zero Trust Everywhere" philosophy together. It runs every device, warehouse, factory, and retail location through the Zero Trust Exchange to isolate it from a cybersecurity perspective. Therefore, even if one of those assets is compromised, it can't infect the rest of the organization. This is key in the AI era because attackers are constantly probing for vulnerabilities at machine speed.

Now, Zscaler is unleashing the Zero Trust Exchange on AI agents. Rather than allowing them to roam free within the corporate network, organizations can now assign them restricted access only to the specific apps or datasets required for their tasks. Again, that means even if a hacker compromises an agent, the effect will be limited.

Solid growth at the top and bottom line

Zscaler wrapped up the first half of its fiscal year 2026 on Jan. 31. It generated a record $1.6 billion in revenue for the period, which was up 25.7% year over year. Following the result, management slightly increased its full-year revenue forecast from $3.3 billion to $3.32 billion (at the high end of the respective ranges), which is a sign of the company's growing momentum.

Zscaler has around 9,400 total customers, but as of Jan. 31, management said 550 of them had adopted the Zero Trust Everywhere philosophy. That was up by a whopping 323% from the same time last year. This suggests that customers are gradually buying more of Zscaler's product suite, which is very positive.

Zscaler is also making progress at the bottom line, thanks to prudent expense management. The company still lost $45.9 million during the first half of fiscal 2026 on a generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP) basis, but after excluding one-off and non-cash expenses, it produced an adjusted profit of $328.1 million. That was up 30.5% year over year.

Is Wall Street right to be bullish on Zscaler stock?

The Wall Street Journal tracks 50 analysts who cover Zscaler stock, and 37 have given it a buy rating. Six others are in the overweight (bullish) camp, while the remaining seven recommend holding. Not a single analyst in this group recommends selling.

The analysts have a consensus price target of $237.30, suggesting Zscaler stock could rise by 57% over the next 12 months or so. The Street-high target of $335, however, implies a potential upside of 122% instead.

The consensus target might be realistic because Zscaler is much cheaper than its peers right now. Its stock trades at a price-to-sales (P/S) ratio of just 7.9, compared to 10.7 for Palo Alto Networks and 20.9 for CrowdStrike .

If Zscaler stock were to hit $237.30, its P/S ratio would rise to 12.4, leapfrogging Palo Alto but remaining much cheaper than CrowdStrike. That might be achievable, since the company is growing its top line much faster than both of its peers. Its second-quarter revenue growth of 26% trounced the 15% growth produced by Palo Alto and the 22% growth generated by CrowdStrike in their most recent quarters.

All else being equal, a company growing faster than its competition would normally command a premium valuation, not a discounted one, so I think there is certainly scope for upside from here. As a result, I think Wall Street is right to be bullish on Zscaler's prospects.

Should you buy stock in Zscaler right now?

news.Title: 外資重砍台股3170億仍力挺它！「這檔晶圓代工廠」2月營收近200億　吸外資買入3.6萬張
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]記者邱梓欣／綜合報導
台股加權指數本週收在33,599.54點，週跌1814.95點，跌幅5.12％，據證交所籌碼動向，外資賣超3170.43億元。觀察外資買超上市個股部分，晶圓代工大廠聯電（2303）受惠22和28奈米製程需求升溫，帶動客戶庫存回補，訂單能見度趨於穩健；雖然2月因春節假期導致工作天數減少，但聯電仍在近日繳出亮眼財報，2月合併營收為新台幣193.45億元，較去年同期181.94億元年增6.33％；累計今年前二月合併營收402.07億元，較去年同期380億元年增5.81％；外資本周買超3.6萬張力挺，斥資23.6億元。
展望後市，聯電共同總經理王石先前在法說會中表示，預估晶圓的需求在今年首季仍呈穩健，且隨著22奈米平台的投片量加速增漲，王石認為，公司對今年抱有信心、將是成長的一年，且下半年有望優於上半年。
據證交所公布資料，外資本週（3/2～3/6）上市個股買超張數排名，第一名、聯電（2303）買超3萬6812張。第二名、南亞科（2408）買超3萬3113張。第三名、中華電（2412）買超3萬1183張。第四名、正新（2105）買超2萬8353張。第五名、長榮（2603）買超2萬1979張。
接續，第六名、兆赫（2485）買超2萬1777張。第七名、台玻（1802）買超1萬9021張。第八名、友達（2409）買超1萬7201張。第九名、廣達（2382）買超1萬6221張。第十名、華新（1605）買超1萬1715張。
◎《FTNN新聞網》提醒您：本資料僅供參考，投資人應獨立判斷，審慎評估並自負投資風險。

news.Title: Google Owns a $1 Billion Unicorn Defense Company Now
news.Content:
"Don't be evil." That was the motto Google adopted for itself back when it went public in 2004.
Within 14 years, this motto had evolved into "don't work with the U.S. military" (unofficially, one imagines), when Google parent Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) very publicly pulled out of a Pentagon contract called Project Maven that would have used its artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities for military purposes.

news.Title: 0050「五檔大換血」該加碼？台股周一破底警報響　內行3點解讀「換股下一步」
news.Content:
0050「五檔大換血」該加碼？台股周一破底警報響 內行3點解讀「換股下一步」 李瑋萱
2026年3月7日 週六 上午4:10

​ 中東戰火為全球政經局勢掀起海嘯 ，台股二二八連假開市後劇烈震盪， 大盤4日重挫近1500點後，隔日隨即大漲844點， 上沖下洗讓投資人心情如坐雲霄飛車；由於台指期6日夜盤又慘崩1030點，也讓台股周一破底警爆響起。另外，值得注意的是，台灣ETF受益人數最多的元大台灣50（0050）迎來關鍵大換血， 臉書財經粉專「股海老牛」 今（7）日也針對0050「5進5出」的成分股進行分析，指0050換股後「AI含金量」大幅提升，投資人等同於自動參與AI產業的長期爆發力。
廣告
廣告

0050長期穩居台灣ETF受益人數排行榜第1名，根據「 集保結算所」截至2025年12月中旬的統計， 0050 受益人數已突破 200萬人大關，且大幅領先排名第二的 國泰永續高股息（00878）的168萬人， 寫下台灣ETF史上首見。台股在 台積電（2330）等大型權值型領軍上漲下頻頻創高， 以0050為首的市值型ETF備受投資人喜愛，隨著受益人數增長， 0050的資產規模也在去年12月上旬一舉衝破 兆元大關。

0050成份股有哪些？ 「股海老牛」盤點， 0050 規模已高達1.32兆元，如今迎來 「五進五出」大換血，投資人買進的已然是 「更高AI含量」的台股主旋律。他進一步說， 0050此次 強勢入列的 5檔 新血，包含 金像電 （2368）、欣興 （3037）、 京元電子 （2449）、 鴻勁 （7769）、及受惠 AI資料爆發的記憶體大廠 華邦電 （2344）， 全數緊扣AI上游供應鏈，「 AI科技股全面接管」成為換股最驚人的亮點。
0050換股後有什麼影響？ 至於退出的成分股， ​ 「股海老牛」指出，包含代表 航運與內需的 統一超、萬海； 成熟製程晶片設計的 瑞昱、 聯詠，另外還有 貿聯-KY，但他強調，這不代表這5檔 基本面差，只是 市場資金正 湧向「純度最高」的AI領域。他總結，若持有 0050，未來布局有3項觀察點，一是 0500的AI曝險是否更集中？二是能否接受「波動變大」的可能？三是用指數當風向，不用追單一熱門股。另外，他也在文末提到，「 下周會是黑色星期一嗎？」

Investing.com’s stocks of the week

In this article: EZJ.L

Investing.com – It’s been an extremely turbulent week for equities.

With the Middle East conflict ongoing and showing no signs of slowing, investors are assessing its length, severity, and potential economic impact on the global economy.

This week’s volatility has resulted in some big moves. Here are Investing.com’s stocks of the week:

Memory names such as Sandisk, Western Digital, Micron and Seagate made headlines through 2025 and the beginning of this year following significant rallies. However, they have given back some gains this week.

In the last week, Sandisk has fallen by over 11%, Western Digital is down 7.9%, Micron dropped 4%, and fell Seagate 8.8%.

Airline names globally have been significantly impacted by the Middle East conflict.

American Airlines has plunged 17.1% in the last week, while Delta is down 13.4%, United Airlines has declined 18.5%, Southwest and Alaska Air Group have tumbled 20%, and JetBlue has plunged 22%.

European/UK names were also hit, with British Airways owner IAG down 20.5%, while EasyJet and Lufthansa fell around 13%.

Day One Biopharmaceuticals

Day One Biopharmaceuticals shares surged over 65% on Friday following news that the company will be acquired by Servier, an independent international pharmaceutical group.

The company will acquire Day One for $21.50 per share in cash, representing a total equity value of approximately $2.5 billion. The transaction is expected to close in the second quarter of 2026.

Marvell also rose on Friday, albeit up around 22% (as of 13:45 ET). The rally followed the company’s quarterly earnings release that saw it top consensus expectations, while also providing positive guidance.

Following the report, William Blair analyst Sebastien Naji reiterated an Outperform rating on the stock.

“Despite lingering questions around the scope and size of individual ASIC engagements, we believe Marvell is well positioned to grab its fair share of the AI infrastructure wallet with a broad portfolio of interconnect, custom ASIC, switching, and storage solutions,” the analyst wrote in a reaction note.

“Given the outlook for accelerating revenue growth over the coming quarters, we remain constructive on shares.”

The Trade Desk shares jumped more than 18% on Thursday, and despite a pullback on Friday, remain up over 23% in the last week.

Thursday’s climb followed rumors surrounding a potential partnership with OpenAI.

Following the reports, Evercore ISI analyst Mark Mahaney wrote in a note: “Relative to TTD’s 2025 gross spend of $13.4B, we believe Generative AI engines could be a significant source of incremental gross spend (e.g, press reports indicate OpenAI’s ambitions to drive $25B of annual revenue from advertising by 2030).”

However, Wedbush analyst Alicia Reese was more cautious, downgrading the stock to Underperform, stating: “We do not believe the incremental value of the rumored deal warrants the current share price.”

news.Title: Is Amazon Stock a Long-Term Buy?
news.Content:
There's no denying the fact that Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) is one of the most disruptive businesses out there. The company upended the retail sector. It introduced cloud computing to the world. And it's making inroads in healthcare and autonomous driving.
Management's forward-thinking mentality has made this " Magnificent Seven " stock a huge winner. Its shares have rocketed 647% and 11,500% higher in the past 10- and 20-year periods (as of March 3).

news.Title: 台塑董事會通過3/6~12/31擬處分南亞科61,972張，交易總金額估約144億元
news.Content:
公開資訊觀測站重大訊息公告
(1301)台塑-公告本公司董事會通過處分南亞科技股份有限公司普通股

news.Title: 《台北股市》0050大換股 彰顯AI供應鏈
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】富時羅素6日公布臺灣指數系列最新季度成份股調整，因為規模已突破兆元大關的元大台灣50所追蹤的指數，市場高度聚焦臺灣50指數與成份股的變動：新增金像電、鴻勁、京元電子、欣興、華邦電共五檔，出現近年罕見的「五進五出」盛況，合計所有指數調整一共牽動相關ETF資產規模高達2.29兆元創紀錄，而成份股增刪於20日盤後生效。
本次臺灣50指數納入上述五檔成份股的同時，刪除貿聯-KY、聯詠、統一超、瑞昱、萬海等五檔，候補名單則包括華城、創意、南電、藥華藥、力積電。
臺灣50指數成份股調整以市值為主要依據，通常可以反映市場對各產業的偏好程度，值得留意的是，本次被剔除的五檔成份股中，有統一超、萬海二檔為非科技股，入列的五檔新成份股，不僅全為科技股，更精確地說，皆與AI大趨勢脫不了干係。法人指出，這象徵台股AI供應鏈占的地位愈來愈重要，主流趨勢鮮明；相對地，投資元大台灣50時，AI比重也愈來愈高。
元大台灣50的資產規模高達1.32兆元、ETF排名第一，另一檔亦以臺灣50指數為追蹤的富邦台50，規模為3,311億元排名第五，因此臺灣50指數成份股的調整，牽動的ETF規模達1.65兆元；加計追蹤臺灣高股息指數、資產規模達5,288億元排第二的元大高股息，追蹤臺灣資訊科技、資產規模1,088億元的富邦科技，以及追蹤臺灣中型100、資產規模26.14億元的元大中型100，本次富時調整臺灣指數系列成份股，合計五檔ETF規模2.29兆元。
臺灣中型100指數新增成份股為貿聯-KY、高力、景碩、旺宏、聯詠、統一超、瑞昱、新代、聯邦銀、萬海10檔；並刪除玉晶光、金像電、材料*-KY、京元電子、三陽工業、台肥、中保科、欣興、華邦電、裕融10檔。
至於臺灣中型100指數成份股候補名單，則有群益證、長興、台勝科、國票金、中砂、帆宣、潤弘、矽格、華新科、洋基工程。
此外，元大高股息ETF追蹤的臺灣高股息指數，本次未有新增納入成份股，刪除裕融一檔。臺灣資訊科技指數納入成份股鴻勁、景碩、旺宏三檔，刪除玉晶光一檔；臺灣發達指數成份股納入高力、新代二檔；刪除材料*-KY、三陽工業、台肥、中保科等四檔。
富時羅素公布的指數審核結果，相關成份股納入及刪除變動將自20日交易結束後生效。如有指數成份股在下次定期審核前之期間被刪除，將以本次候補名單遞補，候補名單自即日起生效。(新聞來源 : 工商時報一陳昱光／台北報導)

news.Title: 《半導體》台積電2026校園徵才開跑 預計在台招募約8千人
news.Content:
【時報記者林資傑台北報導】晶圓代工龍頭台積電(2330)2026年校園徵才活動本周正式啟動，為持續支援業務成長與技術發展需求，2026年預計在台招募約8千名新進員工，工作地點遍及桃園、新竹、苗栗、台中、嘉義、台南及高雄等主要據點，展現持續擴編與深耕台灣布局的決心。
台積電表示，此次徵才包括工程師與技術員等多元職缺，歡迎電機、電子、光電、物理、材料、化學、化工、機械、資工、資管、工工、工管、環工、土木、人資、商管、會計等領域的應屆畢業生，或具備相關工作經驗者加入。
台積電近年來積極推動數位轉型，並致力於人工智慧（AI）與大數據應用，打造新一代智慧工廠，確保卓越製造的競爭優勢，因此也歡迎資訊相關領域人才加入，碩士畢業新進工程師的平均整體年薪可達新台幣220萬元。
台積電今（7）日前進台大校園參加校園徵才企業博覽會，廣徵對半導體具高度熱忱的人才，並將巡迴參與臺師大、臺科大、北科大、中央、陽明交大、清大、中興、逢甲、雲科、虎科、中正、成大、高科、高師大、中山與屏科大等校就業徵才，共舉辦17場實體活動。
除了實體活動外，台積電也將安排5場線上徵才說明會，提供中、英文場次，讓學生與求職者透過線上互動深入了解公司文化、職務內容與職涯發展，期望藉此吸引更多有志者參與獲取更多資訊。
此外，台積電2026年DNA暑期實習計畫（Development, Navigation, Advance Offer）同步展開，邀請大三以上同學（碩博士優先）加入，提供實戰機會與職涯導航，表現優異者有機會獲得正職預聘，在半導體產業的職涯發展預先布局，履歷投遞截止日為5月8日。
台積電視人才為最重要資產，承諾提供優質的工作機會與具競爭力的整體薪酬福利，並規畫員工職涯發展。在追求技術卓越之際，秉持誠信正直、承諾、創新和客戶信任的核心價值，致力落實共融的工作環境，鼓勵來自不同文化背景、專業領域與生活經驗的夥伴互相交流。
台積電並積極推動身心障礙人才及設備職類女性工程師的招募，在開放、樂於溝通的環境中，不斷激發創新及競爭力。誠摯邀請充滿熱情、勇於創新、渴望成長的夥伴加入台積電，探索職涯無限可能，共創全球半導體發展高峰。

news.Title: 《基金》外資單週賣超金額創史上最大 台股週線挫逾5%
news.Content:
【時報記者張佳琪台北報導】台股本週籠罩在地緣政治陰霾下，週二、週三台股連續兩日重挫，多頭雖欲反攻，加權指數單週仍大跌1814點。週線跌幅達5.12%，平均日均量9346.85億元。
外資大舉調節，本週外資累計賣超3170.43億元，創史上單週最高賣超金額，自營商也大舉減碼867.89億元。僅有投信法人連續第三週回補台股401.96億元，三大法人合計賣超3636.36億元。
PGIM保德信金滿意基金經理人郭明玉指出，本週雖然下半週回穩，從成交量下滑可看出盤面追價意願謹慎，在目前國際能源價格快速攀升恐影響通膨的考量下，市場短期避險升溫。由於台股評價面也在相對高位，郭明玉預估，後續震盪整理機率升高。針對外資態度，郭明玉表示，本週外資加大賣超力道主要著眼於美伊戰爭風險升溫，一旦市場恐慌降低，或是談判可能性提升，進而緩解戰事張力，市場風險偏好回升之下，外資也將緩和調節壓力，否則近期外資對整體亞股特別是東北亞股市避險為趨勢所驅。
郭明玉表示，AI巨頭資本支出持續上調，帶動伺服器、網通、代工、電力與記憶體等AI基建供應鏈全面走強，相對地，近期軟體與IT服務行業因AI顛覆風險承壓，出現估值快速收縮，使AI交易呈現「基建強、應用弱」的結構性分化。她說，隨著科技巨頭進入實體投資高峰，資金明顯朝具稀缺性的重資產與算力、HBM、網通與電力設備等現金流量佳族群挪動。至於軟體部分，雖部分軟體與IT服務產業面臨長期獲利壓力，但擁有資料護城河與深度流程整合的公司已出現被過度拋售的機會點。
郭明玉分析，台股企業獲利今年表現仍可期待，包括電子與金融股可望延續雙位數增長，且呈現逐季走高，傳產股也有望在低基期之下重返成長表現，因此無須看淡台股走勢。

news.Title: 《台北股市》臺灣50指數成分股5進5出 3月20日盤後生效
news.Content:
【時報記者莊丙農台北報導】富時羅素公布下列有關臺灣50指數、臺灣中型100指數、臺灣資訊科技指數、臺灣發達指數及臺灣高股息指數審核結果。其中，臺灣50指數納入金像電(2368)等5檔，刪除貿聯-KY(3665)等5檔，相關成分股納入及刪除變動將自2026年3月20日交易結束後生效。
本次審核結果，臺灣50指數成分股納入：金像電、鴻勁(7769)、京元電子(2449)、欣興(3037)、華邦電(2344)；成分股刪除：貿聯-KY(3665)、聯詠(3034)、統一超(2912)、瑞昱(2379)、萬海(2615)；候補名單：華城(1519)、創意(3443)、南電(8046)、藥華藥(6446)、力積電(6770)。
臺灣中型100指數成分股納入：貿聯-KY、高力(8996)、景碩(3189)、旺宏(2337)、聯詠、統一超(2912)、瑞昱、新代(7750)、聯邦銀(2838)；成分股刪除：玉晶光(3406)、金像電、材料*-KY(4763) 、京元電子(2449)、三陽工業(2206)、台肥(1722)、中保科(9917)、欣興(3037)、華邦電、裕融(9941)；候補名單：群益證(6005)、長興(1717)、台勝科(3532)、國票金(2889)、中砂(1560)、帆宣(6196)、潤弘(2597)、矽格(6257)、華新科(2492)、洋基工程(6691)。
臺灣資訊科技指數成分股納入：鴻勁、景碩、旺宏；成分股刪除：玉晶光。
臺灣發達指數成分股納入：高力、新代；成分股刪除：材料*-KY、三陽工業、台肥、中保科。
臺灣高股息指數成分股刪除：裕融。

news.Title: 國泰投信總座張雍川：AI需求強勁，戰爭帶來台股長線布局買點
news.Content:
國泰投信總座張雍川：AI需求強勁，戰爭帶來台股長線布局買點 陳怡慈
2026年3月6日 週五 下午11:14

國泰投信總經理張雍川今（ 7 ）日表示，地緣政治與中東戰爭影響下，台股短期波動難免；在 AI 需求非常強勁，帶動台灣相關半導體、零組件、伺服器組裝需求活絡下，台股逢低拉回為投資人長期布局很好的買點。
他建議，投資人在資產配置上，應該檢視自己手上的持股與 ETF 特性，適度分散及風險控管。
油價推升通膨不像 70 年代嚴重 張雍川說，戰爭帶來的油價飆升為短期影響因素，近年來油價占整個 CPI （消費者物價指數）的比重已經明顯降低，油價上漲對 CPI 的衝擊已經不像 1970 年代石油危機那樣嚴重，「所以我覺得投資人對於這樣的影響，不要過度的恐慌。」
廣告
廣告

他並表示，投資人先前已經有俄烏戰爭對市場影響的經驗了，如何因應美伊戰爭的變化，算是愈來愈有經驗。台股波動加大除了反映戰爭因素，另外跟今年以來股市上漲速度與幅度高於預期也有很大關係，台股拉回適度修正，對中長期投資人來講不見得是件壞事。

聯準會下半年可能降息 2 碼 受到美伊戰爭推高油價影響，張雍川認為，美國聯準會降息的步調可能會稍微延後，但是整個美國核心 CPI 年增率持續往下的趨勢仍然沒有改變。國泰投信預估，美國今年下半年仍有 2 碼（ 1 碼等於 0.25 個百分點）的降息空間。新的聯準會主席 Kevin Warsh 上任後，聯準會的貨幣政策應該會逐漸地更加清晰。
張雍川說，由於美國經濟成長動能還是相當強勁，加上下半年有大而美法案的減稅方案，以及臨近期中選舉，美國政府可望提出一些刺激經濟的利多政策，因而對下半年的美國經濟成長動能以及 AI 發展趨勢，「我們還是持續認為是一個樂觀的展望」。

news.Title: 《產業》台塑 超額配發現金0.5元
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】台塑受制石化行情低迷及關稅、匯率干擾，去年每股純損1.58元，惟為回應股東支持，且處分南亞科股票，增添未分配盈餘，6日董事會決議通過，二度動用未分配盈餘，採超額分配規劃，配發現金0.5元。
此外，為充實營運資金及強化財務結構，台塑董事會通過啟動第四度處分南亞科技股票計畫，預計3月6日至12月31日處分南亞科股票61,972張，因實際仍尚未出售，依董事會通過日期3月6日南亞科收盤價233元估算，交易總金額144.39億元。
另考量提升營運綜效與長期投資，台塑董事會通過將旗下獨資、營運項目包含OL3、PE、包裝及興建中1-己烯（1-Hexene）的台塑工業美國公司，與台塑美國以換股方式進行整併，藉此改善、提振營運效率。
為此，台塑擬以持有之台塑工業美國公司全部股份5,772.55股轉為台塑美國公司股份8,841股；如此一來，台塑工業美國公司為台塑美國公司100％持股子公司，台塑對台塑美國持股也從22.66％提高至24.82％。未來台塑將無須再認列獨資美國石化公司營運，直接透過對台塑美國營運認列即可。
台塑表示，100％獨資台塑工業美國公司（FIC）股本為5.77億美元，設有年產40萬噸的LLDPE廠及興建中年產10萬噸的1-已烯（稱C6）廠，並轉投資Formosa Olefins, LLC（設有年產120萬噸乙烯之乙烷裂解廠，稱OL3），持有33％股權，及轉投資Lolita Packaging,LLC（設有一座塑料包裝廠,稱Lolita），持有38％股權。
由於台塑美國公司PE廠所需原料C6，年需求量3萬噸全數外購，因台塑工業美國公司興建中C6廠預計5月完工投產，台塑美國公司取得台塑工業美國公司全部股份後，除可充分掌握C6料源，亦可優化台塑美國公司整體PE廠生產排程、品別調度及行銷等，包裝、倉儲及鐵路運輸更具調度彈性，整合後可提升營運綜效。
此外，台塑工業美國公司持有33％股權之OL3持續穩定獲利，台塑美國取得台塑工業美國公司全部股份後，對OL3持股由46％提高至79％，有助提升台塑美國經營績效。(新聞來源 : 工商時報一彭暄貽／台北報導)

news.Title: Marvell Technology (MRVL) Rockets 18% on Billion-Dollar Profitability
news.Content:
Marvell Technology Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) is one of the 10 Stocks to Watch Right Now.
Marvell Technology soared by 18.35 percent on Friday to close at $89.57 apiece, as investors took heart from its strong earnings performance for the full fiscal year 2026, swinging to billions of profits from hundred millions of net losses a year earlier.
In an updated report, Marvell Technology Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) said that it incurred a $2.67 billion net income in the full fiscal year ending January 31, reversing an $885 million net loss in fiscal 2025.

news.Title: 台積電2026年預計招8千名員工 碩士工程師起新220萬元
news.Content:
台積電 (2330-TW)(TSM-US) 今 (7) 日宣布 2026 年校園徵才活動於本周正式啟動，為了持續支援業務成長與技術開發需求，2026 年預計在台灣招募包含工程師與技術員等約 8,000 名新進同仁，碩士畢業新進工程師的平均整體年薪可達新台幣 220 萬元。
台積電工作地點涵蓋桃園、新竹、苗栗、台中、嘉義、台南、高雄等地；領域包括電機、電子、光電、物理、材料、化學、化工、機械、資工、資管、工工、工管、環工、土木、人資、商管、會計等領域的應屆畢業生，或具備相關工作經驗者加入。
近年來，台積電積極推動數位轉型，並致力於人工智慧 (AI) 與大數據應用，打造新一代的智慧工廠，確保卓越製造的競爭優勢，也歡迎資訊相關領域人才加入。
台積電今日前進臺大校園參加校園徵才企業博覽會，廣徵對半導體具高度熱忱的人才。除了臺大，台積公司將巡迴各大專院校參與校園就業博覽會及徵才說明會活動，包括臺師大、臺科大、北科大、中央、陽明交大、清大、中興、逢甲、雲科、虎科、中正、成大、高科、高師大、中山與屏科大等，共舉辦 17 場實體活動。同時，也將安排 5 場線上徵才說明會 (包含中、英語系)，歡迎有志加入者參與線上互動交流，獲取更多資訊。
此外，台積電 2026 年 DNA 暑期實習計畫 (Development, Navigation, Advance Offer) 也同步展開，邀請大三以上同學 (碩博士優先) 加入，履歷投遞截止日為 2026 年 5 月 8 日；此計畫提供實戰機會與職涯導航，表現優異者更有機會獲得正職預聘，在半導體產業的職涯發展預先佈局。
台積電視人才為最重要的資產，承諾提供優質的工作機會與具有競爭力的整體薪酬福利，並規劃員工職涯發展；在追求技術卓越的同時，秉持誠信正直、承諾、創新和客戶信任的核心價值，致力落實共融的工作環境，鼓勵來自不同文化背景、專業領域與生活經驗的夥伴互相交流，並積極推動身心障礙人才及設備職類女性工程師的招募。
在開放、樂於溝通的環境中，不斷激發創新及競爭力。台積電誠摯邀請充滿熱情、勇於創新、渴望成長的夥伴一同加入台積，探索職涯無限可能，共創全球半導體發展的高峰。

news.Title: 5-star analyst revamps Nvidia stock price target
news.Content:
Nvidia ’s ( NVDA ) bull case just got another massive vote of confidence from Wall Street .
Matt Bryson , a 5-star Wedbush analyst ( per TipRanks ), just bumped his price target on Nvidia stock to $300 from $230 , maintaining an outperform rating, which shows even more confidence in the longevity of the AI buildout.

White House eyes ‘any lawful use’ mandate for AI firms in new draft

In this article: GOOG

Investing.com — The Trump administration has drafted aggressive new guidelines for civilian artificial intelligence contracts, requiring companies to permit "any lawful" use of their models by the U.S. government, according to the Financial Times. The move follows a high-stakes standoff between the Department of War and Anthropic, which culminated Thursday in the Pentagon designating the AI firm a "supply-chain risk."

Market sentiment in the tech sector remained cautious following the report. Shares of AI-adjacent firms wavered as investors assessed the potential for a broader regulatory crackdown on "ethical" guardrails that conflict with national security objectives.

The Nasdaq 100 had slipped 1.51% by 15:59 ET (20:59 GMT), while Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) fell 0.42% and Alphabet Inc Class A (NASDAQ:GOOGL) was down 0.78% as the industry weighed the implications of the U.S. General Services Administration (GSA’s) "irrevocable license" requirement.

Anthropic designated a ‘supply-chain risk’

The new General Services Administration (GSA) rules portray a hardening stance within the military establishment. The Pentagon’s designation of Anthropic as a “supply chain risk”, a label typically reserved for foreign entities like Huawei, effectively bars any government contractor from utilizing the firm’s technology.

The "blacklisting" stems from a months-long dispute over Anthropic’s refusal to waive safeguards against mass domestic surveillance and the use of its Claude models in lethal autonomous weapons.

Secretary of War Pete Hegseth defended the move on Friday, stating that the U.S. requires "patriotic" technology partners who do not impose restrictive "red lines" on lawful operations. Anthropic has argued that the designation is legally unsound and plans to challenge the decision in court.

The Trump administration has granted a six-month transition period for agencies to migrate away from Anthropic’s systems.

Ideological neutrality and disclosure mandates

The newly published GSA draft mandates that AI contractors must not "intentionally encode partisan or ideological judgments" into their data outputs. The rule aims to strip what the administration describes as "embedded bias" or "wokeness" from government-funded models.

Companies must now disclose if their models have been modified to comply with non-U.S. regulatory frameworks, such as the European Union’s AI Act. Analysts at Evercore ISI noted that these requirements could force a "decoupling" of the American AI stack from global standards.

Traders are now watching closely for a response from OpenAI, which reportedly stepped in to fill the Pentagon’s vacuum shortly after Anthropic’s exile.

news.Title: 台積電2026校園徵才開跑！在台招募8,000人、碩士年薪220萬 重點一次看
news.Content:
晶圓代工龍頭台積電（2330） 7 日宣布正式啟動 2026 年度校園徵才計畫，因應先進製程與 AI 應用帶動的長期成長需求，今年預計在台灣招募約 8,000 名新進員工，職缺涵蓋工程師與技術員等多元職務，工作地點遍及桃園、新竹、苗栗、台中、嘉義、台南與高雄等主要營運據點，展現公司持續擴張產能與技術布局的人才需求。
台積電表示，隨著全球半導體需求持續升溫，加上 AI、高效能運算（HPC）與智慧製造推動技術升級，公司對人才的需求也同步增加。今年徵才對象涵蓋電機、電子、光電、物理、材料、化學、化工、機械、資訊工程、資訊管理、工業工程、工業管理、環境工程、土木以及商管、人資、會計等領域，除應屆畢業生外，也歡迎具備相關工作經驗的人才加入。
在薪酬方面，台積電指出，碩士畢業的新進工程師平均整體年薪可達約新台幣 220 萬元，反映半導體產業高技術門檻與人才競爭日益激烈的趨勢。業界普遍認為，在 AI 與先進製程需求持續擴張下，半導體產業的人才競逐將持續升溫，而龍頭廠商透過校園徵才提前布局，已成為人才供給的重要來源。
此次校園徵才活動首站於台灣大學校園徵才博覽會登場，後續將巡迴全台各大專院校舉辦說明會與徵才活動，包含台灣師範大學、台灣科技大學、台北科技大學、中央大學、陽明交通大學、清華大學、中興大學、逢甲大學、雲林科技大學、虎尾科技大學、中正大學、成功大學、高雄科技大學、高雄師範大學、中山大學與屏東科技大學等，共計舉辦 17 場實體活動。
除了實體活動外，台積電也將同步安排 5 場線上徵才說明會，提供中、英文兩種語言場次，讓有志加入半導體產業的人才能透過線上互動了解公司文化、技術發展與職涯規劃，擴大人才接觸面。
另一方面，台積電也同步啟動「DNA 暑期實習計畫」（Development、Navigation、Advance Offer），邀請大三以上學生參與，碩博士優先。公司指出，該計畫提供學生實際參與專案與研發的機會，履歷投遞截止日期為 2026 年 5 月 8 日，若表現優異，學生將有機會提前取得正職預聘資格，為未來職涯發展提前布局。
台積電強調，公司持續推動數位轉型，並積極導入 AI 與大數據技術打造智慧工廠，以確保先進製造的效率與品質。因此，除了傳統工程人才外，也特別歡迎資訊科技與 AI 相關領域的人才加入，共同推動智慧製造與製程優化。
在人才政策上，台積電表示，公司將人才視為最重要的資產，除了提供具競爭力的薪酬與福利外，也建立完整的職涯發展制度與培訓體系，同時推動多元共融的工作環境，鼓勵不同背景、專業與文化的人才交流合作。公司也積極招募身心障礙人士，以及鼓勵女性投入設備工程等技術職務，以提升產業多元化。
市場人士分析，隨著 AI 晶片需求持續攀升，加上 2 奈米與更先進製程即將進入量產階段，台積電未來幾年仍將維持高強度人才需求。透過大規模校園徵才與實習計畫，不僅有助於培養新一代半導體工程師，也反映台灣半導體產業在全球供應鏈中的長期競爭優勢。
台積電指出，歡迎對半導體產業充滿熱情、具備創新精神並渴望成長的人才加入，共同參與全球半導體技術發展，開創下一波科技浪潮。

news.Title: 《台北股市》摔1,814點 台股創歷史單周最大跌點
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】熱錢持續撤出台股，盤面由塑化股接棒扮演撐盤指標，加權指數6日下跌73點，收33,599點，低於2月11封關日33,605點，回吐農曆新年來漲幅，成交量再縮至6,554億元為2月10日以來最低，周線終結連二紅，下跌1,814點，為歷史單周最大跌點。
法人認為，美伊戰爭對股市最大的衝擊可能已過，且外資在本周大賣3,170億元，6日外資在台指期淨空單上減碼2,204口至38,930口，加上櫃買指數領先反彈，台股有機會守穩月線，後市除了觀察中東情勢，16日登場的輝達GTC大會也是重點。
籌碼面上，外資調節力道延續，6日再賣超352.36億元，但減碼金額見縮減，自營商賣超也見縮減至7.48億元；國家隊中的八大公股行庫買超73.37億元、連六買共782.19億元，投信則買超71.23億元。
周線來看，台股周線翻黑下跌1,814點，創下歷史單周最大跌點，並超越新春首周上漲1,808點，農曆新年來台股績效翻黑。
萬寶投顧董事長朱成志認為，觀察外資動向，新年以來賣超金額大增，僅投信持續回補，主要仍受到中東戰事升溫影響。不過，從歷史經驗來看，預料利空衝擊最大情況已過，外資在台指期淨空單也回補2,204口至38,930口，降至40,000口以下，研判後續還有持續上演軋空機會。
群益投顧研究部副總裁曾炎裕表示，荷莫茲海峽封鎖導致油價上漲，若呈現長期封鎖，油價可能往100美元挑戰，電力與運輸成本暴增通膨復燃，聯準會被迫維持高利率壓抑科技股估值。另戰爭導致外資避險情緒升溫，美元走強可能引發外資從新興市場撤資，除了韓股之外，台股也遭到外資減碼，權值股短線賣壓較重，新台幣也短線趨貶，壓抑市場表現。
凱基投顧分析，技術面觀察，台股6日價跌量縮，成交量雖然連二日低於20日均量，且上檔有下彎5日線反壓，但指數回測月線有守，觀察後續量能若進一步回升，且封閉3月4日跳空缺口，有望挑戰34,000點以上套牢區。(新聞來源 : 工商時報一陳昱光／台北報導)

news.Title: Morgan Stanley resets Broadcom price target after earnings
news.Content:
Broadcom ( AVGO ) reported its Q1 earnings on March 4. The company’s report was strong, with revenue hitting 29% year-over-year growth to a record $19.3 billion. The stock closed 4.8% higher at $322.77 on the next day, according to Yahoo Finance .
AI-heavy stock not crashing following the earnings report has become a rarity, even when the earnings are very strong, as we’ve seen with Nvidia . For more on that phenomenon, read my article “ Bank of America resets Nvidia price target after earnings .”

news.Title: DRAM缺貨到2028！「這檔」飆完就崩還能接？專家曝賺最肥一段買點
news.Content:
記憶體族群昨（6日）上演大翻臉戲碼，指標股南亞科前日強攻漲停，昨卻重摔 9.5%，終場以233元作收。分析師示警，南亞科的強彈僅屬「跌深反彈」而非正式買訊，他強調，不如靜待技術面確認「轉強點」，買在趨勢啟動時，才能賺得最安穩且最具效率。
供不應求看好至2028年 大廠爆搶貨潮
雖然記憶體股價震盪，但產業面的多頭底氣依然充足。南亞科總經理李培瑛日前明確表示，記憶體供不應求的態勢預計將一路持續到 2028 年；威剛也在法說會中釋出樂觀預期，強調產業有望「從年頭旺到年尾」，甚至出現雲端服務供應商（CSP）大廠主動搶貨的盛況。
瑞銀指出，在DDR供給受限的背景下，合約價漲幅遠強於預期，南亞科將成為直接受益者，不僅維持「買進」評等，更將推測合理股價由340元調升至360元。
技術面仍待轉強 專家建議等待買點
針對南亞科股價的雲霄飛車表現，摩爾投顧分析師陳昆仁指出，周四的漲停僅能視為「跌深反彈」，而非真正的轉強點。他解釋，關鍵在於股價當時並未成功站上60 分線的 60MA（移動平均線），因此昨日的回馬槍並不令人意外。
陳昆仁建議，投資人若想參與記憶體行情，應追求「最安心買點」而非盲目摸底。他提出一套兼具資金效益與安全性的「轉強戰法」，必須同時滿足以下兩大條件：
1、股價站上60分線的 60MA： 代表短線趨勢轉強。
2、KD 指標的 K 值站上 60：
◆當K值站上 50 時代表轉強。
◆當K值站上 60 時，代表資金效益開始「加速」，此時買進最具效率。
陳昆仁強調，記憶體族群目前籌碼較凌亂，不建議在噴漲時追高，投資人應等拉回至技術面支撐（如季線或 60MA），並出現上述轉強訊號後再行分批佈局。
◎

news.Title: 驚悚！夜盤又崩1030點 台積電1800危急？台股下周一「2大關」逃不過
news.Content:
全球金融市場驚現「黑色星期五」慘案！在油價飆漲、地緣政治風險及美國就業數據疲弱的三重壓力下，美股四大指數周五（6日）全面收黑。受此衝擊，台指期夜盤暴跌 1030 點，台積電期貨盤後也重挫逾3%，避險情緒急速升溫。法人預期，台股下周一開盤恐直接摜破月線（33250點）及33000點兩大關卡，近期急著搶短的散戶融資再度面臨新一波大逃殺。
台指期夜盤暴跌千點提前反映
受到美股四大指數全面走弱影響，台指期夜盤周五率先反映利空，終場狂瀉1030 點，收在32673點，而當天大盤指數收在33599點。法人研判，台股下周一開盤極可能再度上演「千點驚魂」，其中，指標股台積電期貨盤後下跌65元（3.4%），收1835元，預料將成為大盤最沉重的壓力來源。
值得注意的是，台股融資近兩日合計增加約60億元，顯示不少投資人在大盤未止穩前便急於進場加碼，然而，面對期指夜盤暴殺千點的情況下，這些融資籌碼下周一開盤即面臨套牢與帳面虧損，恐觸發連鎖斷頭賣壓。
油價飆破90美元 非農數據慘跌重創復甦希望
這波市場震盪的核心來自於中東戰火與美國就業放緩的雙重打擊。美國總統川普態度強硬，表示若伊朗未「無條件投降」，美方絕不達成任何停戰協議。卡達能源部長更發出嚴厲警告，一旦荷姆茲海峽持續封鎖，未來兩至三周內國際油價恐飆升至每桶150 元。
周五西德州原油（WTI）跳漲12%至每桶90.90美元，單周狂飆35%漲幅創下1983年以來最高紀錄。
雪上加霜的是，疲軟的非農就業報告也重擊市場信心。據美國勞工統計局數據，2月非農就業人數意外減少9.2萬人，不僅與原先預期的增加5萬人天差地遠，相較於1月修正後的12.6 萬人增幅，更顯示出勞動力市場正急劇萎縮。
疲弱數據引發衰退擔憂，恐慌指數 (VIX) 暴漲24%，衝上29.49，逼近30大關，改寫去年4月川普政府宣布對等關稅來新高。
面對連環利空重擊，美股四大指數全面棄守。道瓊工業指數重挫453點（或0.95%），收在 47501 點；標普 500 指數與那斯達克指數分別收跌1.33%與1.59%，最慘烈的重災區莫過於費城半導體指數，單日狂瀉 3.93%（307 點），晶片股哀鴻遍野。
個股表現同樣觸目驚心，美光與應用材料雙雙暴跌超過6%，輝達也重挫逾 3%，這股殺氣直接波及台股命脈，台積電ADR終場慘跌4.26%，以338美元作收，正步步逼近332美元的季線大關。
◎

news.Title: 恐怖！夜盤又崩1030點 台積電1800危急？台股下周一「2大關」逃不過
news.Content:
全球金融市場驚現「黑色星期五」慘案！在油價飆漲、地緣政治風險及美國就業數據疲弱的三重壓力下，美股四大指數周五（6日）全面收黑。受此衝擊，台指期夜盤暴跌 1030 點，台積電期貨盤後也重挫逾3%，避險情緒急速升溫。法人預期，台股下周一開盤恐直接摜破月線（33250點）及33000點兩大關卡，近期急著搶短的散戶融資再度面臨新一波大逃殺。
台指期夜盤暴跌千點提前反映
受到美股四大指數全面走弱影響，台指期夜盤周五率先反映利空，終場狂瀉1030 點，收在32673點，而當天大盤指數收在33599點。法人研判，台股下周一開盤極可能再度上演「千點驚魂」，其中，指標股台積電期貨盤後下跌65元（3.4%），收1835元，預料將成為大盤最沉重的壓力來源。
值得注意的是，台股融資近兩日合計增加約60億元，顯示不少投資人在大盤未止穩前便急於進場加碼，然而，面對期指夜盤暴殺千點的情況下，這些融資籌碼下周一開盤即面臨套牢與帳面虧損，恐觸發連鎖斷頭賣壓。
油價飆破90美元 非農數據慘跌重創復甦希望
這波市場震盪的核心來自於中東戰火與美國就業放緩的雙重打擊。美國總統川普態度強硬，表示若伊朗未「無條件投降」，美方絕不達成任何停戰協議。卡達能源部長更發出嚴厲警告，一旦荷姆茲海峽持續封鎖，未來兩至三周內國際油價恐飆升至每桶150 元。
周五西德州原油（WTI）跳漲12%至每桶90.90美元，單周狂飆35%漲幅創下1983年以來最高紀錄。
雪上加霜的是，疲軟的非農就業報告也重擊市場信心。據美國勞工統計局數據，2月非農就業人數意外減少9.2萬人，不僅與原先預期的增加5萬人天差地遠，相較於1月修正後的12.6 萬人增幅，更顯示出勞動力市場正急劇萎縮。
疲弱數據引發衰退擔憂，恐慌指數 (VIX) 暴漲24%，衝上29.49，逼近30大關，改寫去年4月川普政府宣布對等關稅來新高。
面對連環利空重擊，美股四大指數全面棄守。道瓊工業指數重挫453點（或0.95%），收在 47501 點；標普 500 指數與那斯達克指數分別收跌1.33%與1.59%，最慘烈的重災區莫過於費城半導體指數，單日狂瀉 3.93%（307 點），晶片股哀鴻遍野。
個股表現同樣觸目驚心，美光與應用材料雙雙暴跌超過6%，輝達也重挫逾 3%，這股殺氣直接波及台股命脈，台積電ADR終場慘跌4.26%，以338美元作收，正步步逼近332美元的季線大關。
◎

news.Title: 《台北股市》不斷更新！2月營收雙成長 這群土洋齊拱
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】2026年2月上市櫃營收哪些公司不但營收雙成長，且為外資投信同步鎖定的「土洋齊拱股」？「時報資訊」不斷電連續整理報導！截至6日累計613家公司已公布營收成績單，華邦電(2344)、新應材(4749)及牧德(3563)等8檔個股單月營收除繳出月增、年增雙成長的好成績外，更因各擁業績成長題材，近10日躍居外資及投信同步鎖定買超的簇擁標的。
2月營收繳出月增、年增雙成長個股共計74檔大多分布在半導體、生醫業及電週邊等類股。進一步篩選近10日外資、投信同步買超的「土洋齊拱股」，上市公司計有6檔、上櫃公司計2檔。外資及投信同步買超股，依合計買超張數排序，上市公司依序為華邦電(2344)、牧德(3563)、華固(2548)、智邦(2345)、緯穎(6669)及視陽(6782)。上櫃公司依序為新應材(4749)及系微(6231)。
8檔營收雙增土洋齊拱股，再進一步觀察其近10日股價波段表現，上市個股以牧德(3563)漲27.84%，表現最為突出，第二與第三名分別為緯穎(6669)及視陽(6782)，分別上漲14.38%及上漲7.18%；上櫃個股新應材(4749)以漲23.78%，名列第一，第二名為系微(6231)，上漲3.97%。顯見業績雙成長股，挾帶基本面、籌碼面雙優題材，躍居成為盤面指標，短線股價亦相對有表現。
●2月營收雙成長，土洋齊拱股排行：
※上市個股前五大
1.華邦電(2344)近10日外資及投信分別買超2.87萬張及1.70萬張，合計買超4.57萬張、買超51.59億元；近10日波段漲2.90%。
2.牧德(3563)近10日外資及投信分別買超0.26萬張及0.03萬張，合計買超0.29萬張、買超16.31億元；近10日波段漲27.84%。
3.華固(2548)近10日外資及投信分別買超0.19萬張及0.02萬張，合計買超0.21萬張、買超2.46億元；近10日波段漲6.51%。
4.智邦(2345)近10日外資及投信分別買超0.06萬張及0.04萬張，合計買超0.10萬張、買超14.87億元；近10日波段漲5.40%。
5.緯穎(6669)近10日外資及投信分別買超0.05萬張及0.04萬張，合計買超0.09萬張、買超37.28億元；近10日波段漲14.38%。
※上櫃個股
1.新應材(4749)近10日外資及投信分別買超0.46萬張及0.06萬張，合計買超0.52萬張、買超49.23億元；近10日波段漲23.78%。
2.系微(6231)近10日外資及投信分別買超0.07萬張及0.00萬張，合計買超0.07萬張、買超1.45億元；近10日波段漲3.97%。(編輯：財經內容中心)

news.Title: 《台北股市》不斷更新！最旺2月營收股 超狂人氣攏底這
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】2026年2月上市櫃營收哪些公司創下歷史最旺2月營收，且為盤面上人氣熱門競逐標的？「時報資訊」不斷電連續整理報導！截至6日累計613家公司已公布營收成績單，共計152家創下歷史最旺2月營收，其中華邦電(2344)、鴻海(2317)及南亞科(2408)等個股，單月業績不但改寫歷史同期之最，且各擁題材，躍居盤面上人氣的熱門焦點，近10日上市最強人氣王為華邦電(2344)，累計成交179.59萬張；上櫃則為威剛(3260)，累計成交18.82萬張。
2月營收創同期新高個股，上市公司計有89檔、上櫃公司計有63檔，大多分布在半導體、電零組及生醫業等類股。在成交量方面，因業績題材受矚目躍居短線盤面上熱門股標的，依近10日成交量排序，上市公司前10大個股分別為華邦電(2344)、鴻海(2317)、南亞科(2408)、欣興(3037)、玉山金(2884)、緯創(3231)、景碩(3189)、永豐金(2890)、定穎投控(3715)及聯茂(6213)。上櫃公司前10大個股分別為威剛(3260)、欣銓(3264)、中探針(6217)、台燿(6274)、致和證(5864)、群聯(8299)、創威(6530)、雙鴻(3324)、長科*(6548)及宜鼎(5289)。
最旺2月營收股，上市櫃人氣前30%個股，進一步觀察法人近期動態，三大法人近10日偏多站在買方個股，上市公司以鴻海(2317)、玉山金(2884)及永豐金(2890)法人買超最為踴躍，分別掃入10.40萬張、6.30萬張及5.83萬張。上櫃公司鎖定標的則為中探針(6217)、新應材(4749)及力旺(3529)，分別買超0.80萬張、0.57萬張及0.29萬張。上市櫃鴻海(2317)及中探針(6217)等個股，在各擁題材業績有底氣，盤面人氣交易相當熱絡，加上有法人加持，可望成為攻守兼備標的，持續吸引盤面資金聚攏。
●2月營收創同期新高，人氣爆棚股排行：
※上市個股前五大
1.華邦電(2344)近10日成交量179.59萬張；近10日三大法人買超4.11萬張、買超金額47.19億元。
2.鴻海(2317)近10日成交量89.47萬張；近10日三大法人買超10.40萬張、買超金額254.97億元。
3.南亞科(2408)近10日成交量84.64萬張；近10日三大法人買超0.75萬張、買超金額14.53億元。
4.欣興(3037)近10日成交量50.30萬張；近10日三大法人賣超1.27萬張、賣超金額53.20億元。
5.玉山金(2884)近10日成交量45.73萬張；近10日三大法人買超6.30萬張、買超金額22.15億元。
※上櫃個股前五大
1.威剛(3260)近10日成交量18.82萬張；近10日三大法人賣超2.37萬張、賣超金額68.65億元。
2.欣銓(3264)近10日成交量9.93萬張；近10日三大法人買超0.09萬張、買超金額1.45億元。
3.中探針(6217)近10日成交量9.51萬張；近10日三大法人買超0.80萬張、買超金額6.31億元。
4.台燿(6274)近10日成交量9.31萬張；近10日三大法人賣超0.83萬張、賣超金額42.46億元。
5.致和證(5864)近10日成交量8.20萬張；近10日三大法人買超0.21萬張、買超金額0.47億元。(編輯：財經內容中心)

news.Title: 《台北股市》不斷更新！最旺2月營收股 超狂人氣攏底這
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】2026年2月上市櫃營收哪些公司創下歷史最旺2月營收，且為盤面上人氣熱門競逐標的？「時報資訊」不斷電連續整理報導！截至6日累計613家公司已公布營收成績單，共計152家創下歷史最旺2月營收，其中華邦電(2344)、鴻海(2317)及南亞科(2408)等個股，單月業績不但改寫歷史同期之最，且各擁題材，躍居盤面上人氣的熱門焦點，近10日上市最強人氣王為華邦電(2344)，累計成交179.59萬張；上櫃則為威剛(3260)，累計成交18.82萬張。
2月營收創同期新高個股，上市公司計有89檔、上櫃公司計有63檔，大多分布在半導體、電零組及生醫業等類股。在成交量方面，因業績題材受矚目躍居短線盤面上熱門股標的，依近10日成交量排序，上市公司前10大個股分別為華邦電(2344)、鴻海(2317)、南亞科(2408)、欣興(3037)、玉山金(2884)、緯創(3231)、景碩(3189)、永豐金(2890)、定穎投控(3715)及聯茂(6213)。上櫃公司前10大個股分別為威剛(3260)、欣銓(3264)、中探針(6217)、台燿(6274)、致和證(5864)、群聯(8299)、創威(6530)、雙鴻(3324)、長科*(6548)及宜鼎(5289)。
最旺2月營收股，上市櫃人氣前30%個股，進一步觀察法人近期動態，三大法人近10日偏多站在買方個股，上市公司以鴻海(2317)、玉山金(2884)及永豐金(2890)法人買超最為踴躍，分別掃入10.40萬張、6.30萬張及5.83萬張。上櫃公司鎖定標的則為中探針(6217)、新應材(4749)及力旺(3529)，分別買超0.80萬張、0.57萬張及0.29萬張。上市櫃鴻海(2317)及中探針(6217)等個股，在各擁題材業績有底氣，盤面人氣交易相當熱絡，加上有法人加持，可望成為攻守兼備標的，持續吸引盤面資金聚攏。
●2月營收創同期新高，人氣爆棚股排行：
※上市個股前五大
1.華邦電(2344)近10日成交量179.59萬張；近10日三大法人買超4.11萬張、買超金額47.19億元。
2.鴻海(2317)近10日成交量89.47萬張；近10日三大法人買超10.40萬張、買超金額254.97億元。
3.南亞科(2408)近10日成交量84.64萬張；近10日三大法人買超0.75萬張、買超金額14.53億元。
4.欣興(3037)近10日成交量50.30萬張；近10日三大法人賣超1.27萬張、賣超金額53.20億元。
5.玉山金(2884)近10日成交量45.73萬張；近10日三大法人買超6.30萬張、買超金額22.15億元。
※上櫃個股前五大
1.威剛(3260)近10日成交量18.82萬張；近10日三大法人賣超2.37萬張、賣超金額68.65億元。
2.欣銓(3264)近10日成交量9.93萬張；近10日三大法人買超0.09萬張、買超金額1.45億元。
3.中探針(6217)近10日成交量9.51萬張；近10日三大法人買超0.80萬張、買超金額6.31億元。
4.台燿(6274)近10日成交量9.31萬張；近10日三大法人賣超0.83萬張、賣超金額42.46億元。
5.致和證(5864)近10日成交量8.20萬張；近10日三大法人買超0.21萬張、買超金額0.47億元。(編輯：財經內容中心)

news.Title: 《台北股市》不斷更新！16檔2月營收登天 法人壓寶一次看
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】2026年2月上市櫃營收哪些公司不但創下單月歷史新高，且為法人積極壓寶對象？「時報資訊」不斷電連續整理報導！截至6日累計613家公司已公布營收成績單，共計16家單月營收創歷史新高，其中新應材(4749)、華邦電(2344)及南亞科(2408)等個股，業績一把罩深受法人青睞，近10日上市吸金王由華邦電(2344)搶下，法人累計砸入銀彈47.19億元，買超4.11萬張；上櫃則為新應材(4749)，累計吸金54.13億元，法人買超0.57萬張。
16檔單月營收創歷史新高個股，上市公司計有6檔、上櫃公司計有10檔，大多分布在半導體、電週邊及文創業等類股。在法人買超方面，業績題材火爆亦成為法人積極鎖定的標的，依近10日法人「百萬級」銀彈壓寶股排序，上市公司依序為華邦電(2344)、南亞科(2408)、至上(8112)及jpp-KY(5284)，買超金額介於47.19億元~2.14億元。上櫃公司依序為新應材(4749)、信驊(5274)、鈊象(3293)、雍智科技(6683)、青雲(5386)及衛司特(6894)，買超金額介於54.13億元~0.57億元。
上市櫃單月營收新高股，法人重金壓寶前段班個股，進一步觀察股價表現，近10日股價表現勝大盤個股，其中以青雲(5386)表現最為亮眼，波段漲幅逾79.31%，雍智科技(6683)、衛司特(6894)分居二、三名，分別上漲26.15%及上漲23.78%；新應材(4749)上漲23.78%、jpp-KY(5284)上漲9.00%則分居第四及第五名。青雲(5386)等個股不但2月營收創下歷史新高，更有法人買超加持，且短線股價相對有表現，可望成為盤面上聚焦的標的。
●營收登天，法人重金壓寶股排行：
※上市個股
1.華邦電(2344)近10日三大法人買超金額47.19億元、買超4.11萬張；近10日波段漲2.90%。
2.南亞科(2408)近10日三大法人買超金額14.53億元、買超0.75萬張；近10日波段跌14.02%。
3.至上(8112)近10日三大法人買超金額7.22億元、買超0.97萬張；近10日波段跌2.67%。
4.jpp-KY(5284)近10日三大法人買超金額2.14億元、買超0.08萬張；近10日波段漲9.00%。
※上櫃個股
1.新應材(4749)近10日三大法人買超金額54.13億元、買超0.57萬張；近10日波段漲23.78%。
2.信驊(5274)近10日三大法人買超金額11.81億元、買超0.01萬張；近10日波段漲4.08%。
3.鈊象(3293)近10日三大法人買超金額9.21億元、買超0.12萬張；近10日波段漲4.53%。
4.雍智科技(6683)近10日三大法人買超金額0.95億元、買超0.01萬張；近10日波段漲26.15%。
5.青雲(5386)近10日三大法人買超金額0.66億元、買超0.04萬張；近10日波段漲79.31%。(編輯：財經內容中心)

news.Title: 《台北股市》三大法人06日賣超股：富邦金、華航、新興
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】台股06日加權指數收33599.54點，跌73.40點或0.22%，總成交值6554.73億元。三大法人賣超288.61億元，其中外資賣超352.36億元，投信、自營商分別買超71.23億元及賣超7.48億元。
三大法人賣超前十大個股，依類別分，4檔電子股、2檔金融股及4檔傳產股；依股價分，3檔百元股、3檔中價位股及4檔銅板股；賣超張數方面，6檔賣超上萬張，榜首為富邦金(2881)，賣超2萬2535張，華航(2610)、新興(2605)名列二、三名，分別賣超1萬6665張及賣超1萬5340張。第四及第五名為旺宏(2337)、元晶(6443)，其他依序為中信金(2891)、台積電(2330)、中工(2515)、南亞科(2408)及南亞(1303)。
至於前十大個股中賣超金額前三大，則為台積電(2330)172.27億元、富邦金(2881)20.01億元、旺宏(2337)14.69億元。
●三大法人06日賣超前十名：
1.富邦金(2881)收88.80元，跌1.70元或1.88%，成交量3.64萬張，三大法人賣超2萬2535張、估20.01億元，為連3日賣超，累計賣超3萬9759張、估35.51億元。
2.華航(2610)收18.90元，股價持平，成交量4.24萬張，三大法人賣超1萬6665張、估3.15億元，為連9日賣超，累計賣超18萬6041張、估36.63億元。
3.新興(2605)收34.00元，跌0.95元或2.72%，成交量4.38萬張，三大法人賣超1萬5340張、估5.22億元，由前一交易日買超2836張轉為賣超。

news.Title: 台股熱爆證券金雞發威 永豐金、玉山金前2月獲利雙創新高
news.Content:
玉山金控 (2884-TW) 與永豐金控 (2890-TW) 6 日率先公告 2026 年 2 月自結數據，兩家金控前 2 月累計獲利均繳出亮麗成績單，玉山金累計大賺 70 億元、EPS 0.44 元；永豐金在併購京城銀行綜效發揮下，累計獲利近 82 億元，雙雙創下歷年同期新高。雖然銀行仍是兩家金控穩健獲利的定海神針，但在台股大多頭行情下，證券子公司今年來貢獻度顯著提升。
永豐金控雖然 2 月受春節連假、營業天數較少影響，單月獲利為 30.89 億元 (月減 39%)，但累計前 2 月稅後純益達 81.92 億元，年增率高達 53%，整體獲利結構依舊紮實。
子公司永豐銀行連續第六年創獲利新高紀錄，稅後純益達 53.79 億元，年增 26%，由利息淨收益及手續費淨收益的雙位數增長所帶動，年增長各為 26% 與 11%。提存費用略減，主因新增逾放減少抵銷一般提存的增加。銀行逾放比率為 0.11%。
此外，京城銀行累計稅後純益 11.18 億元，除了 1 月份京城銀國際租賃處分利得 2.87 億元，利息淨收益跟手續費淨收益皆有顯著成長，銀行逾放比率為 0.06%。
永豐金證券前 2 月稅後純益達 18.12 億元，年增 74%，創下歷史新高。主要受惠於經紀業務與泛財富管理手續費的大幅增長。
玉山金控 2 月單月稅後純益達 30.2 億元，累計前 2 月稅後純益 70.4 億元，較去年同期成長 22.53%，每股稅後純益 (EPS) 為 0.44 元。
子公司玉山銀行累計稅後純益 61.2 億元，年增 12.92%。截至 2 月底，銀行合併存款餘額達 3 兆 7972 億元，合併放款總數為 2 兆 6762 億元。
玉山證券累計獲利 7.6 億元，玉山創投與投信前 2 月也分別貢獻 5 億元及 0.6 億元。
隨著大盤成交量能放大，市場周轉率提高，兩家金控旗下證券子公司的經紀手續費收入都相當可觀，台股多頭行情也推升了自營部位的資本利得，此外，投資人對於台股 ETF、複委託及財富管理產品的需求爆發，讓證券端的泛財管手續費成為銀行之外最穩定的第二成長曲線。

news.Title: 《美股》收盤速報：油價飆高 美股收黑
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】川普要求伊朗無條件投降，市場憂心美以聯手打擊伊朗的這場戰爭，可能無法在近期內結束，故油價再度創下新高紀錄，加上美國就業數據比預期差，以及失業率大增之下，美股三大指數周五(6日)全面走低，其中以那指跌1.6%跌幅最大。本周美股表現不佳，標普周線大跌2%，道瓊大跌3%，那指跌1.2%，費半更是重挫7.2%。日線大跌4%的費半，NVIDIA大跌3%，台積電ADR大跌超過4%，英特爾大跌5.5%，AMD大跌3.5%，美光重挫近7%，就連近日宣布財報亮眼的博通也跌0.7%。
美國WTI原油價格每桶突破90美元，本周累計大漲35%，創下自1983年原油期貨交易開始以來最大單周漲幅。美國六日，美國總統川普在Truth Social上發文稱，除非伊朗是無條件的要投降，否則這場戰爭不會達成任何協議。因此，油價才會飆漲。同時，倫敦布蘭特原油每桶更是衝高至92.69美元，大漲8.5%。
卡達能源部長告訴英國金融時報，海灣地區的能源生產商可能需要在未來幾天內宣布停止生產，所以預估油價會漲至每桶150美元，中東衝突可能會拖垮世界經濟。美國華頓商學院認為，如果本周末沒有任何突破，下周油價恐漲到100美元。
美國最新就業數據中，勞工統計局表示，二月非農就業人數大減9.2萬，與一月經下修後的增加12.6萬相比，簡直是南轅北轍，也遠不如預期的增加5萬人。同時，失業率也從4.3%升至4.4%。分析師指出，總體數據非常令人失望，雖然一月就業報告強勁，但還是會憂心美國就業市場正在走弱。還有近期能源價格大漲，恐會出現上世紀70年代，那種經濟成長趨緩以及通膨大漲兩者並存的停滯性通膨惡性循環。

news.Title: 南亞科爆量下殺逼跌停！「國家隊」急救2檔記憶體搶入破萬張　另砸36億挺台積電
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]記者薛明峻／台北報導
台股昨（6）日開低震盪，終場加權指數收在33599.54點，下跌73.40點，跌幅0.22%，成交量為6323.65億元。根據「玩股網」資料，「國家隊」八大公股銀行昨日在上市市場買超約72.18億元，觀察買超個股，權王台積電（2330）昨日承壓開低震盪，一度下跌20元至1880元，跌幅1.05%，八大公股銀行昨日砸36.7億元搶進，入手1943張，已連6日買超約2萬張。
由於AI人工智慧熱浪帶動記憶體需求大增，導致供給斷層、價格上揚，記憶體族群日前強漲一波，不過隨著台股昨日拉回，多檔記憶體個股帶量下殺，其中南亞科（2408）昨日慘跌9.51%逼近跌停，旺宏（2337）也重挫4.65%，八大公股銀行出手救援，2檔合計掃貨1.1萬張，斥資21.73億元。
根據「玩股網」資料，八大公股銀行昨日買超上市個股張數前10名，第一名為南亞科（2408），買超7135張；第二名旺宏（2337），買超4022張；第三名元晶（6443），買超3495張；第四名富邦金（2881），買超3229張；第五名中工（2515），買超2311張。
八大公股銀行買超張數第六名至第十名依序為：國際中橡（2104）買超2176張、新興（2605）買超2102張、光寶科（2301）買超1994張、台積電（2330）買超1943張、華航（2610）買超1362張。
◎《FTNN新聞網》提醒您：投資人應獨立判斷，審慎評估並自負投資風險。

news.Title: Where is Apple’s headquarters? Apple Park explained
news.Content:
Apple built its iconic headquarters known as Apple Park out of necessity. Its main office at 1 Infinite Loop was built in the early 1990s, and the tech giant needed more space to meet its rapid growth, having already used up a lot of the available office space in Cupertino.
Steve Jobs set Apple's vision for its role in the computer industry, and almost a decade after retaking control of the company in 1997, he set another vision—this time for the company's headquarters to move into the 21st century. Jobs wouldn't be around to see his vision come to life when the new headquarters—which includes over four miles of walking and jogging trails—opened in 2017. But it’s certainly a part of his legacy.

news.Title: 台股盤前／油價破90美元美股重挫！台指夜盤殺1030點　台股週一開盤不妙
news.Content:
台股盤前／油價破90美元美股重挫！台指夜盤殺1030點 台股週一開盤不妙 三立新聞網
2026年3月6日 週五 下午3:27

台積電
2330.TW

1,890 ( 0.53% ) CL=F

90.9 ( 12.21% )
財經中心／余國棟報導
國際市場利空齊發，油價衝破每桶90美元，加上美國就業數據意外轉弱，美股週五（6）日再度走低，四大指數同步收黑，也讓本週成為近一年來表現最差的一週。受到美股重挫衝擊，台指期夜盤大跌1030點，台積電期貨盤後下跌65元，市場避險情緒急速升溫，法人普遍預期台股週一開盤恐將面臨跳空開低壓力。
油價與經濟疑慮夾擊 美股創一年最差一週
從美股表現來看，市場同時受到中東戰事升溫與經濟數據轉弱的雙重打擊。美國總統川普強硬表示，若伊朗未「無條件投降」，美國不會達成任何結束戰爭的協議，市場憂心衝突可能進一步擴大，使能源供應風險快速升高。
廣告
廣告

受到地緣政治衝突影響，西德州中級原油（WTI）價格週五突破每桶90美元，單週漲幅高達35%，創下自1983年石油期貨交易以來最大單週漲幅。能源價格飆升也使市場再度擔心通膨壓力升溫，甚至可能引發「停滯性通膨」風險。

此外，美國最新公布的非農就業報告同樣令人失望。2月非農就業人口減少9.2萬人，遠低於市場預期增加5萬人，也與1月修正後增加12.6萬人形成強烈反差，失業率則從4.3%升至4.4%。疲弱的就業數據讓市場開始擔憂美國經濟動能轉弱，投資人風險偏好快速降溫。
在多重利空衝擊下，道瓊指數下跌453點，收在47501點；標普500指數下跌1.33%；那斯達克指數跌幅達1.59%；費城半導體指數更重挫307點，跌幅3.93%，科技與晶片股成為殺盤重心。
科技與金融股承壓 AI股與半導體同步走弱
科技與金融股普遍表現疲弱。資產管理巨頭貝萊德（BlackRock）因限制部分私人信貸基金資金贖回，引發市場對私募信貸風險的擔憂，股價單日重挫超過7%。
科技股方面，甲骨文（Oracle）收跌1.11%，主因公司與OpenAI取消在德州擴建人工智慧資料中心的計畫，市場擔憂AI投資動能出現變數。波音則逆勢上漲4.08%，市場傳出美國政府可能宣布一筆高達500架737 Max客機的大型訂單，激勵股價走強。
AI資料中心概念股則出現分歧，邁威爾科技（Marvell）因發布強勁營收展望，股價暴漲18.35%，成為少數逆勢上漲的科技股，但整體晶片族群仍難逃拋售壓力，拖累費半指數大幅下跌。
台指期夜盤重挫千點 台股週一開盤恐承壓
受到美股全面走弱影響，台股期貨市場也提前反映利空。台指期夜盤重挫1030點，顯示市場對下週開盤行情相當保守。台積電期貨盤後下跌65元，預料將成為壓抑大盤的重要因素。
籌碼面方面，三大法人合計賣超288億元，其中外資單日賣超高達352億元，顯示國際資金仍持續撤出台股市場。同時外資期貨淨未平倉空單仍維持在3.8萬口以上的偏空水位，短線市場壓力仍未解除。另一方面，融資餘額增加約35億元，代表部分散戶資金在市場震盪之際仍持續進場，若後續股市再度出現大幅回檔，恐加劇市場籌碼鬆動的風險。

Vertiv and EchoStar lead tech surge in S&P 500 rebalance

Investing.com -- S&P Dow Jones Indices announced a sweeping overhaul of its benchmark tracking on Friday, propelling several technology and industrial firms into the prestigious S&P 500. Shares of Vertiv Holdings Co (NYSE:VRT) surged 5.6% in after-hours trading following the news, while EchoStar Corporation (NASDAQ:SATS) and Lumentum Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:LITE) also saw significant gains.

The quarterly reshuffle is designed to maintain the integrity of the market’s most-watched gauges. S&P DJI stated that "The changes ensure that each index is more representative of its market‑capitalization range" across the large, mid, and small-cap tiers.

Vertiv, Lumentum, Coherent Inc (NYSE:COHR), and EchoStar will officially join the S&P 500 prior to the opening of trading on Monday, March 23. To make room for these additions, the index will remove Match Group Inc (NASDAQ:MTCH), Molina Healthcare Inc (NYSE:MOH), Lamb Weston Holdings Inc (NYSE:LW), and Paycom (NYSE:PAYC).

Higher up the ladder, the S&P 100 will see a notable influx of semiconductor and industrial heavyweights, including Micron Technology Inc (NASDAQ:MU) and GE Vernova LLC (NYSE:GEV). These moves come at the expense of veteran financial firms like PayPal Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:PYPL) and American International Group Inc (NYSE:AIG), which are exiting the blue-chip 100-member club.

Investors expect these adjustments to trigger billions in passive fund flows as institutional managers realign their portfolios with the new benchmarks. The effective dates are spread across the next two weeks, beginning with the SmallCap 600 adjustment on March 13.

Vertiv and EchoStar lead tech surge in S&P 500 rebalance

Investing.com -- S&P Dow Jones Indices announced a sweeping overhaul of its benchmark tracking on Friday, propelling several technology and industrial firms into the prestigious S&P 500. Shares of Vertiv Holdings Co (NYSE:VRT) surged 5.6% in after-hours trading following the news, while EchoStar Corporation (NASDAQ:SATS) and Lumentum Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:LITE) also saw significant gains.

The quarterly reshuffle is designed to maintain the integrity of the market’s most-watched gauges. S&P DJI stated that "The changes ensure that each index is more representative of its market‑capitalization range" across the large, mid, and small-cap tiers.

Vertiv, Lumentum, Coherent Inc (NYSE:COHR), and EchoStar will officially join the S&P 500 prior to the opening of trading on Monday, March 23. To make room for these additions, the index will remove Match Group Inc (NASDAQ:MTCH), Molina Healthcare Inc (NYSE:MOH), Lamb Weston Holdings Inc (NYSE:LW), and Paycom (NYSE:PAYC).

Higher up the ladder, the S&P 100 will see a notable influx of semiconductor and industrial heavyweights, including Micron Technology Inc (NASDAQ:MU) and GE Vernova LLC (NYSE:GEV). These moves come at the expense of veteran financial firms like PayPal Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:PYPL) and American International Group Inc (NYSE:AIG), which are exiting the blue-chip 100-member club.

Investors expect these adjustments to trigger billions in passive fund flows as institutional managers realign their portfolios with the new benchmarks. The effective dates are spread across the next two weeks, beginning with the SmallCap 600 adjustment on March 13.

news.Title: Tesla (TSLA) Sees a More Significant Dip Than Broader Market: Some Facts to Know
news.Content:
Tesla (TSLA) closed at $396.73 in the latest trading session, marking a -2.17% move from the prior day. The stock trailed the S&P 500, which registered a daily loss of 1.33%. At the same time, the Dow lost 0.95%, and the tech-heavy Nasdaq lost 1.59%.
Shares of the electric car maker have appreciated by 2.1% over the course of the past month, outperforming the Auto-Tires-Trucks sector's loss of 0.66%, and the S&P 500's gain of 0.58%.

news.Content:

The plan, approved by Nvidia's compensation committee on March 2, ‌ties executive ⁠cash bonuses to the achievement of specific revenue goals for ⁠the fiscal year ending January 31, 2027.

news.Title: Oracle and OpenAI End Plans to Expand Flagship Data Center
news.Content:
(Bloomberg) -- Oracle Corp. and OpenAI have scrapped plans to expand a flagship artificial intelligence data center in Texas after negotiations dragged over financing and OpenAI’s changing needs.
The collapsed talks created an opening for Meta Platforms Inc. to step in and consider leasing the planned expansion site in Abilene, Texas, from developer Crusoe, according to people familiar with the matter. Nvidia Corp., the leading AI chipmaker, helped facilitate Meta’s discussions with the developer, said the people, who asked not to be identified because the talks are private.
news.AI_Summary:
• Oracle and OpenAI have canceled plans to expand a data center due to financing and changing needs.
• Meta Platforms (META) is considering leasing the expansion site.
• Nvidia (NVDA) facilitated Meta's discussions with the developer.
news.Keywords: Data Center Expansion, Site Leasing, Partnership, AI Infrastructure

news.Title: 5000萬滾成破億！電商女王棄0050押台積電 沒到這價位絕不賣
news.Content:
被外界稱為「電商女王」的Wstyle品牌執行長周品均，在股市的投資戰績讓許多人相當驚訝，她曾毅然放棄元大台灣50，將高達近5000萬元本金全數投入台積電，這樣高度集中的投資策略，最終讓她成功將資產翻倍，累積破億元身價。她甚至霸氣表示，只要台積電還沒到達自己心中的目標價位，「打死都不下車」。
《鏡週刊》報導，周品均在深入研究後，她發現0050的成分股中，台積電權重竟然高達六成以上，與其把資金分散投資，不如直接鎖定最核心的公司，追求更高的報酬率，於是她果斷將其他投資獲利陸續轉出，集中近5000萬元資金重壓台積電。
報導指出，周品均第一次買進台積電時，股價僅在400多元，直到2024年股價突破900多元時才出場，報酬率直接翻倍。到了2025年4月，市場因美國政治與關稅議題出現震盪，台積電一度跌破800元，她從約850元一路分批買進到880元，之後當股價回升到約1180元附近時賣出，賺取將近四成的波段獲利。
之後當台積電回測至約1150元時，她又重新買回持股。她笑說，如果當初從400多元一路抱到現在，報酬率早已超過四倍。她透露，這一輪投資若沒有看到台積電股價達到2400元，自己不會輕易退場。
長期關注台積電的資深分析師杜金龍先前在《鈔錢部署》節目指出，從EPS推估來看，台積電的長線目標價可望達到3600元。他看好台積電四年後EPS有望增至180元，再以32年的本益比中位數20倍來計算，20倍乘以180就是3600元。
◎

news.Title: How IPG Photonics Stock Gained 42% Last Month
news.Content:
Shares of IPG Photonics (NASDAQ: IPGP) rose 42.4% in February 2026, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . It's no mystery why the maker of fiber lasers soared, either. The fourth-quarter report it published on Feb. 12 and blew past analyst estimates by a wide margin.
IPG Photonics crushed Wall Street's expectations Analyst consensus estimates suggested a fairly weak report. Adjusted earnings were expected to fall from $0.19 to $0.18 per diluted share, while revenue estimates pointed to roughly $247.7 million, or 5.7% year-over-year growth.
Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »
Instead, IPG Photonics more than doubled non-GAAP earnings to $0.46 per share on $274.5 million of top-line sales. That's a 17.2% revenue jump.
news.AI_Summary:
• IPG Photonics (IPGP) stock gained 42.4% in February due to a strong Q4 earnings report.
• The company exceeded analyst estimates for both earnings and revenue.
• Q4 adjusted earnings were $0.46 per share (vs. $0.18-$0.19 est.) on $274.5 million revenue (17.2% YoY growth vs. 5.7% est.).
• The report also mentions a company providing critical technology for Nvidia and Intel (INTC).
news.Keywords: Earnings Beat, Revenue Growth, Exceeded Estimates, Fiber Lasers

news.Title: 0050大換股 彰顯AI供應鏈
news.Content:
富時羅素6日公布臺灣指數系列最新季度成份股調整，因為規模已突破兆元大關的元大台灣50所追蹤的指數，市場高度聚焦臺灣50指數與成份股的變動：新增金像電、鴻勁、京元電子、欣興、華邦電共五檔，出現近年罕見的「五進五出」盛況，合計所有指數調整一共牽動相關ETF資產規模高達2.29兆元創紀錄，而成份股增刪於20日盤後生效。
本次臺灣50指數納入上述五檔成份股的同時，刪除貿聯-KY、聯詠、統一超、瑞昱、萬海等五檔，候補名單則包括華城、創意、南電、藥華藥、力積電。
臺灣50指數成份股調整以市值為主要依據，通常可以反映市場對各產業的偏好程度，值得留意的是，本次被剔除的五檔成份股中，有統一超、萬海二檔為非科技股，入列的五檔新成份股，不僅全為科技股，更精確地說，皆與AI大趨勢脫不了干係。法人指出，這象徵台股AI供應鏈占的地位愈來愈重要，主流趨勢鮮明；相對地，投資元大台灣50時，AI比重也愈來愈高。
元大台灣50的資產規模高達1.32兆元、ETF排名第一，另一檔亦以臺灣50指數為追蹤的富邦台50，規模為3,311億元排名第五，因此臺灣50指數成份股的調整，牽動的ETF規模達1.65兆元；加計追蹤臺灣高股息指數、資產規模達5,288億元排第二的元大高股息，追蹤臺灣資訊科技、資產規模1,088億元的富邦科技，以及追蹤臺灣中型100、資產規模26.14億元的元大中型100，本次富時調整臺灣指數系列成份股，合計五檔ETF規模2.29兆元。
臺灣中型100指數新增成份股為貿聯-KY、高力、景碩、旺宏、聯詠、統一超、瑞昱、新代、聯邦銀、萬海10檔；並刪除玉晶光、金像電、材料*-KY、京元電子、三陽工業、台肥、中保科、欣興、華邦電、裕融10檔。
至於臺灣中型100指數成份股候補名單，則有群益證、長興、台勝科、國票金、中砂、帆宣、潤弘、矽格、華新科、洋基工程。
此外，元大高股息ETF追蹤的臺灣高股息指數，本次未有新增納入成份股，刪除裕融一檔。臺灣資訊科技指數納入成份股鴻勁、景碩、旺宏三檔，刪除玉晶光一檔；臺灣發達指數成份股納入高力、新代二檔；刪除材料*-KY、三陽工業、台肥、中保科等四檔。
富時羅素公布的指數審核結果，相關成份股納入及刪除變動將自20日交易結束後生效。如有指數成份股在下次定期審核前之期間被刪除，將以本次候補名單遞補，候補名單自即日起生效。

news.Title: 台塑 超額配發現金0.5元
news.Content:
台塑受制石化行情低迷及關稅、匯率干擾，去年每股純損1.58元，惟為回應股東支持，且處分南亞科股票，增添未分配盈餘，6日董事會決議通過，二度動用未分配盈餘，採超額分配規劃，配發現金0.5元。
此外，為充實營運資金及強化財務結構，台塑董事會通過啟動第四度處分南亞科技股票計畫，預計3月6日至12月31日處分南亞科股票61,972張，因實際仍尚未出售，依董事會通過日期3月6日南亞科收盤價233元估算，交易總金額144.39億元。
另考量提升營運綜效與長期投資，台塑董事會通過將旗下獨資、營運項目包含OL3、PE、包裝及興建中1-己烯（1-Hexene）的台塑工業美國公司，與台塑美國以換股方式進行整併，藉此改善、提振營運效率。
為此，台塑擬以持有之台塑工業美國公司全部股份5,772.55股轉為台塑美國公司股份8,841股；如此一來，台塑工業美國公司為台塑美國公司100％持股子公司，台塑對台塑美國持股也從22.66％提高至24.82％。未來台塑將無須再認列獨資美國石化公司營運，直接透過對台塑美國營運認列即可。
台塑表示，100％獨資台塑工業美國公司（FIC）股本為5.77億美元，設有年產40萬噸的LLDPE廠及興建中年產10萬噸的1-已烯（稱C6）廠，並轉投資Formosa Olefins, LLC（設有年產120萬噸乙烯之乙烷裂解廠，稱OL3），持有33％股權，及轉投資Lolita Packaging,LLC（設有一座塑料包裝廠,稱Lolita），持有38％股權。
由於台塑美國公司PE廠所需原料C6，年需求量3萬噸全數外購，因台塑工業美國公司興建中C6廠預計5月完工投產，台塑美國公司取得台塑工業美國公司全部股份後，除可充分掌握C6料源，亦可優化台塑美國公司整體PE廠生產排程、品別調度及行銷等，包裝、倉儲及鐵路運輸更具調度彈性，整合後可提升營運綜效。
此外，台塑工業美國公司持有33％股權之OL3持續穩定獲利，台塑美國取得台塑工業美國公司全部股份後，對OL3持股由46％提高至79％，有助提升台塑美國經營績效。

news.Title: 淡季不淡 10檔2月營收創高
news.Content:
2月適逢農曆春節期間，因長假效應，工作天數較少，再加上部分公司提前於元月拉貨，2月營收走跌似在預料之中，然截至昨（6）日止，仍有由股王信驊（5274）領軍的10家上市櫃公司走出自己的路，傳來2月營收攀頂的佳音，提前預告今年首季淡季不淡。
儘管2月農曆春節假期長達九天，在上班天數銳減的狀況下，仍有10家上市櫃公司馬年一開春就財源廣進，並順利繳出2月營收創歷史新高的佳績，這10家營收創高股分別包括新應材、雍智、青雲、鈊象、jpp-KY、聯嘉投控、聯亞、信驊、竹陞科技和南亞科。
今年的2月營收創高股可謂是各擁爆點，除遊戲股王鈊象搭上旺季效應，營收連三個月創歷史新高外，其他個股多算是逆勢創高股。
2月大啖AI紅利股為數仍不少，其中最受市場關注的是股王信驊，在AI伺服器與一般伺服器需求同步轉強下，2月營收以10.11億元首度突破10億元大關，另jpp-KY除AI伺服器機櫃需求熱絡挹注外，歐洲航太子公司ADE營運回穩、軍工產業訂單挹注，湊成三利多，也成功推升2月營收首度站上4億元的關卡。至於全力拓展AI智慧城市與智慧宅機電系統整合市場的聯嘉去年展開AI新布局，成功拿下7.3億元的專案訂單，該訂單於今年2月開始出貨，成為2月營收奔高的新引擎。
此外，聯亞受惠於資料中心（Data Center）相關產品出貨量大增帶動2月營收狂奔，雍智2月營收暴增因探針卡業務比重提升，測試載板持續放量，也都與AI脫不了關係。
除AI題材外，新應材、竹陞科技則因沾光台積電而營收步步高升，其中新應材因坐擁台積電Rinse（表面改質劑）獨供光環而營收大躍進，竹陞科技更是因台積電等半導體廠擴廠頻頻，而寫下營收連增21個月的佳績。
2月營收創高股表現雖鶴立雞群，但論年增幅還是以記憶體族群最為驚人，拜報價連漲之賜，成功入列2月營收攀頂股的南亞科、青雲，2月營收年增幅分別達到586.71％與1,025.37％，不僅在2月創高股中，表現令人刮目，就連在台股逾1,800家上市櫃公司中，年增幅亦可望名列前矛。

news.Title: 摔1,814點 台股創歷史單周最大跌點
news.Content:
熱錢持續撤出台股，盤面由塑化股接棒扮演撐盤指標，加權指數6日下跌73點，收33,599點，低於2月11封關日33,605點，回吐農曆新年來漲幅，成交量再縮至6,554億元為2月10日以來最低，周線終結連二紅，下跌1,814點，為歷史單周最大跌點。
法人認為，美伊戰爭對股市最大的衝擊可能已過，且外資在本周大賣3,170億元，6日外資在台指期淨空單上減碼2,204口至38,930口，加上櫃買指數領先反彈，台股有機會守穩月線，後市除了觀察中東情勢，16日登場的輝達GTC大會也是重點。
籌碼面上，外資調節力道延續，6日再賣超352.36億元，但減碼金額見縮減，自營商賣超也見縮減至7.48億元；國家隊中的八大公股行庫買超73.37億元、連六買共782.19億元，投信則買超71.23億元。
周線來看，台股周線翻黑下跌1,814點，創下歷史單周最大跌點，並超越新春首周上漲1,808點，農曆新年來台股績效翻黑。
萬寶投顧董事長朱成志認為，觀察外資動向，新年以來賣超金額大增，僅投信持續回補，主要仍受到中東戰事升溫影響。不過，從歷史經驗來看，預料利空衝擊最大情況已過，外資在台指期淨空單也回補2,204口至38,930口，降至40,000口以下，研判後續還有持續上演軋空機會。
群益投顧研究部副總裁曾炎裕表示，荷莫茲海峽封鎖導致油價上漲，若呈現長期封鎖，油價可能往100美元挑戰，電力與運輸成本暴增通膨復燃，聯準會被迫維持高利率壓抑科技股估值。另戰爭導致外資避險情緒升溫，美元走強可能引發外資從新興市場撤資，除了韓股之外，台股也遭到外資減碼，權值股短線賣壓較重，新台幣也短線趨貶，壓抑市場表現。
凱基投顧分析，技術面觀察，台股6日價跌量縮，成交量雖然連二日低於20日均量，且上檔有下彎5日線反壓，但指數回測月線有守，觀察後續量能若進一步回升，且封閉3月4日跳空缺口，有望挑戰34,000點以上套牢區。

news.Title: 廖繼弘專欄－地緣政治短期衝擊 台股順勢緩和乖離
news.Content:
美國和以色列聯手轟炸伊朗，伊朗強硬回擊，中東戰火升高及油價上漲影響，投資人出脫風險性資產避險，重創全球股市，尤其今年漲勢強勁的韓股和日股反轉大跌，快速拉回月線下，費城半導體指數回測季線，給台股帶來沉重的修正壓力，大盤拉回月線及1月29日高點32,996點以下，日技術指標高檔交叉向下，進行漲多調整走勢。
隨著美媒體報導，伊朗有意和美談判，美國總統川普表示擬派軍艦護航通過伊朗控制荷姆茲海峽的油輪，國際油價漲勢稍緩，美股等國際股市止跌反彈，短線跌深的韓股強勁反彈，台股也守住去年12月底27,350低點延伸之中期上升線反彈，快速彈回月線上，月線仍上升、9周KD值也維持80以上高檔鈍化，短線整理，但中期走勢尚未轉弱。
台股今年至2月35,579高點漲幅達22.84％，高點和季線、年線正乖離率分別高達18.1％及41.58％，12周及12月RSI分別達86.79及85.61，都是歷史極端高值，雖然部分是占大盤權值45％左右的台積電大漲形成，但也表示大盤漲多過熱。所謂漲多就是利空，容易因為利空衝擊而下跌，這對漲多的韓股、台股和日股短線影響特別明顯。
歷史經驗觀察，地緣政治衝擊對股市引發的動盪是短暫的，長期趨勢主要仍看總體濟基本面和企業獲利而定，除非中東戰火延續較長時間，國際原油價格大漲，如布蘭特原油每桶百美元以上，影響到全球經濟，不會改變股市多頭方向。大摩分析報告指出，地緣政治風險事件發生後的一個月、六個月、12個月後，標普500指數平均上漲2％、6％及8％；對於此次美伊戰火影響，多數美投行都表示經濟穩健成長及企業獲利持續擴張，股市修正幅度應有限，回檔應是布局機會。
道瓊指數和標普500指數短線回測半年線，NASDAQ指數跌落半年線，和台股關連性高的費半指數則回測季線小彈，但台積電ADR僅跌落月線，所以台股和2月初修正走勢一樣，表現較費半指數強。台積電、台達電、台光電、欣興、南電和華通等指標強勢股都守在月線上反彈，讓台股維持偏強調整走勢。
美股近期出現一波由「AI恐懼」驅動的拋售潮，企業軟體、資安、保險經紀、財富管理和支付相關個股重挫，Meta等四大CSP科技巨頭也因融資和AI變現疑慮影響，股價表現疲弱。不過受惠於四大CSP等資本支出擴大至6,760億美元，輝達、Google和亞馬遜等新世代產品陸續上線，AI算力需求持續爆發成長，可望支撐台灣AI供應鏈營運表現，AI基礎建設與半導體供應鏈仍是台股最重要的多頭指標。
短期回測月線後，和季線的正乖離率縮小至9.51％，六周及RSI拉回至66.4及71.1，中期明顯超買過熱現象獲得紓緩，不過，美伊戰事時間可能比美方預期久，僵持數周或更長，而伊朗封鎖荷姆茲海峽，使得布蘭特原油每桶上漲至85美元，短期仍將影響國際金融情勢，引發股市震盪。目前台股和年線的正乖離率仍達32.45％偏高水平，大盤漲多進入高檔震盪調整緩和乖離，有利中長多行情穩健續航。

news.Title: Anterix (ATEX), Qualcomm (QCOM) Expand Collaboration for Next-Gen Utility Wireless
news.Content: Anterix Inc. (NASDAQ: ATEX ) is one of the stocks that should double in 3 years . The partnership focuses on transitioning the industry from basic spectrum access to a comprehensive connectivity platform, enabling utilities to deploy and evolve private networks.

news.Title: Intel (INTC) Faces Lawmaker Scrutiny Over Testing of China-Linked Chip Tools
news.Content: Intel Corporation (NASDAQ: INTC ) is one of the stocks that should double in 3 years . On March 5, a bipartisan group of US lawmakers, led by Senator Elizabeth Warren and Senator Tom Cotton, raised significant national security concerns regarding Intel’s testing of chipmaking equipment from ACM Research. The lawmakers argue that ACM Research, while California-based, maintains deep operational roots in China and serves sanctioned Chinese entities like YMTC and SMIC.

U.S. denies report of sweeping AI chip export controls

In this article: NVDA

This article first appeared on GuruFocus .

A report suggesting the U.S. government could impose sweeping new controls on exports of advanced AI chips quickly drew a firm denial from Washington.

The U.S. Commerce Department said Thursday it has no plans to revive rules resembling the Biden administration's AI diffusion framework , pushing back on a Bloomberg report that claimed officials were drafting regulations to expand export restrictions globally.

A Commerce spokesperson said the earlier rule was burdensome, overreaching, and disastrous, adding that the department's focus remains on supporting secure exports of the American technology stack rather than tightening broad restrictions.

The report had suggested U.S. officials were considering a system that would require companies to obtain government approval before exporting high-end AI accelerators from firms such as Nvidia ( NASDAQ:NVDA ) and Advanced Micro Devices ( NASDAQ:AMD ) .

news.Title: Microsoft keeps Anthropic AI available despite Pentagon blacklist
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .
Microsoft ( NASDAQ:MSFT ) says it plans to keep Anthropic's AI tools available to customers , even after the Pentagon labeled the startup a potential supply-chain risk.
According to a CNBC report, Microsoft confirmed that Anthropic's modelsincluding its Claude AIwill continue to be accessible across several of its platforms , such as Microsoft 365, GitHub, and the company's AI Foundry services. The only exception will be projects tied directly to the U.S. Department of War , which fall under the government's new restrictions.
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft (MSFT) will continue to offer Anthropic's AI tools to customers.
• This decision stands despite the Pentagon designating Anthropic as a potential supply-chain risk.
• Anthropic's models will remain accessible on platforms like Microsoft 365 and GitHub.
news.Keywords: AI Tools, Supply Chain Risk, Pentagon Blacklist, Cloud Platforms

news.Title: House Panel Advances 12-Bill Online Child Safety Package Targeting Big Tech
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .
Lawmakers in Washington are again turning their focus toward Big Tech's role in protecting children online, as a key House committee advances a broad package of legislation targeting digital platforms. The effort could affect companies including Meta Platforms ( NASDAQ:META ), Alphabet ( NASDAQ:GOOG ) and Apple ( NASDAQ:AAPL ), which operate or support major social media ecosystems used by millions of young users. The package, consisting of 12 bills, represents the committee's most substantial move this year to address concerns around how online platforms may expose minors to harmful content, scams, drug sales and gambling. The proposal is moving forward with support from House Republican leadership, potentially clearing the way for a vote on the House floor.
news.AI_Summary:
• A House panel is advancing a 12-bill package targeting Big Tech's role in online child safety.
• The legislation could impact companies like Meta Platforms (META) and Alphabet (GOOGL).
• The bills aim to address concerns about minors' exposure to harmful content, scams, and drug sales online.
news.Keywords: Child Safety Legislation, Big Tech, Digital Platforms, Online Harm

news.Title: Tesla Stock Falls -- Why Analysts See Big Value in Megapack Batteries
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .
Shares of Tesla ( NASDAQ:TSLA ) dipped about 2% on Friday morning as investors weighed fresh commentary on the company's energy business and broader demand tied to the rapid expansion of artificial intelligence data centers.
The move followed a report from William Blair analyst Jed Dorsheimer, who reviewed global data-center construction trends and said demand for new facilities remains elevated. His tracking database shows more than 2,100 planned or announced projects, up about eight percent from the prior month, with total capacity in the pipeline estimated at roughly 174 gigawatts.

• Tesla (TSLA) shares dipped as investors considered commentary on its energy business and AI data center demand.
• Demand for new data center facilities remains elevated, with over 2,100 planned projects.
• The total capacity in the pipeline is estimated at roughly 174 gigawatts.
news.Keywords: Data Center Demand, Energy Business, Megapack Batteries, Infrastructure Growth

Analyst rethinks under-the-radar stock backed by Nvidia

In this article: NVDA

Nvidia ’s ( NVDA ) backing is often seen as a vote of confidence in a company’s technology and growth potential.

The U.S. chip giant announced this week that it will invest $2 billion in Lumentum Holdings ( LITE ) and another $2 billion in Coherent Corp. ( COHR ), as it looks to strengthen supply chains needed for the massive buildout of AI infrastructure.

Both companies develop optical technologies that use light to transmit data or perform sensing functions. Faster data transit is critical for running AI models.

Nvidia is also making multi-billion-dollar purchase commitments with each company.

“Together with Lumentum, NVIDIA is advancing the world’s most sophisticated silicon photonics to build the next generation of gigawatt-scale AI factories,” Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said in a statement .

Investors have already pushed the stocks sharply higher. Lumentum shares have surged about 76% year-to-date and are nearly 10x higher over the past 12 months as of March 5.

Coherent stock has gained about 37.5% this year and is up roughly 250% over the past 12 months.

Analysts significantly boost Lumentum price target

Analysts sharply lifted their price targets on Lumentum following the news of Nvidia’s investment.

Rosenblatt analyst Mike Genovese raised his price target on the stock to $900 from $580 and maintained a buy rating, The Fly reported.
