Why Micron Stock Is Sinking Today

Keith Noonan, The Motley Fool

Micron (NASDAQ: MU) stock is getting hit with another round of sell-offs in Friday's trading. The company's share price was down 2.8% as of 12:45 p.m. ET. At the same point in the daily session, the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq Composite had fallen 1.2% and 1.3%, respectively. The memory-chip leader's stock had been down as much as 5% earlier in the session.

Stocks are falling today as investors react to a weaker-than-expected jobs report and ongoing concerns about the war with Iran. Micron stock may also be under pressure due to a new report suggesting that artificial intelligence ( AI ) processors from Nvidia and AMD could soon face greater export restrictions.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Micron falls as investors weigh macroeconomic and geopolitical risks

The Bureau of Labor Statistics published its February jobs report this morning, and the results have sent stocks tumbling. While economists had forecasted that the U.S. economy lost 50,000 nonfarm jobs last month, the actual number of payroll reductions came in at 92,000. The data has raised concerns that the economy is weakening.

Investors are also continuing to process unfolding developments in the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran. Oil prices have already been rising rapidly, and higher energy prices and supply chain disruptions could lead to a significant uptick for inflation. Growth investors have been hoping that the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates multiple times this year, but higher inflation would make rate cuts less likely.

Could Micron soon face higher export hurdles?

News hit yesterday that Nvidia had stopped making its H200 chips designed for the Chinese market. According to a report published by Bloomberg the same day, the U.S. is considering requiring export licenses for the sale of AI processors from Nvidia and AMD to all foreign countries.

Micron's high-bandwidth-memory (HBM) chip s are used as components in Nvidia's and AMD's high-end processors, and this category of products has played the driving role in the memory specialist's explosive stock gains over the last year. While it's likely that export licenses would be granted for most countries, the implementation of licensing requirements could result in some sales headwinds for Micron.

Should you buy stock in Micron Technology right now?

Broadcom Shares Rise 5% Post Q1 Earnings: Buy, Sell or Hold?

In this article: SWKS

Broadcom AVGO shares appreciated 4.8% post the first-quarter fiscal 2026 results reported on Wednesday. The company registered non-GAAP earnings of $2.05 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 0.99% and jumping 28.1% year over year.

Revenues rallied 29.5% year over year to $19.31 billion and beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 0.13%. The strong results were driven by strong Semiconductor solutions revenues, which soared 52% year over year, driven by a 106% surge in AI revenues. AI networking revenues grew 60% year over year and represented one-third of AI revenues.

Broadcom expects a positive second-quarter fiscal 2026 performance, with AI revenues of $10.7 billion, suggesting a 140% year-over-year upsurge. AI networking is expected to accelerate in the second quarter of fiscal 2026 and grow to 40% of the total AI revenues. Semiconductor revenues are expected to be $14.8 billion, indicating 76% year-over-year growth. Broadcom expects revenues of $22 billion, indicating 47% year-over-year growth for the second quarter of fiscal 2026. However, the gross margin is expected to be flat sequentially at 77%.

So, what should investors do with the AVGO stock right now? Let us dig deeper to find out.

AVGO Rides on Strong AI Growth Amid Stiff Competition

AVGO shares have jumped 69.7% in the trailing 12 months, outperforming the broader Zacks Computer and Technology sector’s and the Zacks Electronics – Semiconductors industry’s returns of 25.2% and 53.2%, respectively. The outperformance can be attributed to an innovative product portfolio, growing clientele and an expanding partner base. AVGO’s prospect benefits from rising AI revenues despite growing concerns over overspending on AI-related infrastructure and services by hyperscalers.

AVGO Stock’s Performance

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

In the first quarter of fiscal 2026, Broadcom’s revenues from custom accelerators jumped 140% year over year. The momentum is expected to continue in the current quarter, thanks to a clientele that includes Google, Meta Platforms and Anthropic. The company continues to gain market share in AI networking, driven by the first-to-market Tomahawk 6 switch at 100 terabit per second, as well as Broadcom’s 200G SerDes, which are capturing demand from hyperscalers.

For 2027, Broadcom expects AI revenues from chips to surpass $100 billion.

However, the sluggish non-AI revenue view for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 is creating a headwind for investors. AVGO’s soft gross margin guidance for the fiscal second quarter indicates a higher AI mix in revenues.

The company continues to face stiff competition from NVIDIA NVDA, Advanced Micro Devices AMD and Skyworks SWKS in the AI domain. NVIDIA is benefiting from strong demand for Hopper and Blackwell architectures, while AMD’s prospects are benefiting from strong demand for EPYC and Instinct processors. Skyworks is benefiting from growing demand for its solutions across edge IoT, automotive and infrastructure end markets, as well as the pending acquisition of Qorvo.

AVGO’s Earnings Estimate Revision Shows Positive Trend

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for fiscal 2026 earnings is pegged at $10.25 per share, up three cents over the past 30 days, indicating 50.3% growth from the fiscal 2025 reported figure. The consensus mark for fiscal 2026 revenues is pegged at $95.48 billion, suggesting 49.5% growth from the fiscal 2025 reported number.

Consensus Estimate Trend

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for the second-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings is pegged at $2.18 per share, unchanged over the past 30 days, indicating 38% growth from the figure reported in the year-ago quarter. The consensus mark for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 revenues is pegged at $20.44 billion, suggesting 36.2% growth from the figure reported in the year-ago quarter.

Here’s Why You Should Hold AVGO Stock Now

Broadcom shares are trading at a premium, as suggested by the Value Score of D. In terms of the forward 12-month price/sales (P/S), AVGO is trading at 14.58X, higher than the broader sector’s 6.2X and industry’s 7.85X. Broadcom is also trading at a premium against peers, NVIDIA, AMD and Skyworks, shares of which are currently trading at 12.87X, 6.77X and 2.23X, respectively.

AVGO Shares Are Trading at a Premium

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

Although Broadcom’s expanding AI portfolio, along with a rich partner base, reflects solid top-line growth potential, a stretched valuation makes the stock risky for investors.

Broadcom currently carries a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), which implies that investors should wait for a more favorable point to start accumulating the stock. You can see the complete list of today’s Zacks #1 Rank (Strong Buy) stocks here.

Want the latest recommendations from Zacks Investment Research? Today, you can download 7 Best Stocks for the Next 30 Days.

news.Title: Can Microchip's Expanding Portfolio Help Its Stock Deliver in 2026?
news.Content:
Microchip Technology MCHP shares have gained 16.2% in a year, underperforming the Zacks Semiconductor – Analog and Mixed industry’s return of 44.7% and the Zacks Computer & Technology sector’s appreciation of 31.6%. The company is facing challenging macroeconomic conditions and high inventory levels. Microchip’s channel inventory decreased to 201 days at the end of the third quarter of fiscal 2026, while underutilization stood at $51.7 million.

The company’s expanding portfolio is expected to boost prospects. Today, MCHP announced a 24-channel mixed-signal IC named LX4580, designed to simplify high-reliability control systems in aviation and defense. The LX4580 is offered in a compact 144-pin LQFP package, providing a redundant architecture for mission-critical and fault-tolerant applications.

On Jan. 15, Silicon Storage Technology ("SST"), a subsidiary of MCHP, and United Microelectronics announced the completion of all requirements for SST’s embedded SuperFlash Gen 4. It has been released to production with full automotive grade 1 capability on UMC’s 28HPC+foundry process platform.

On Jan.13, 2026, Microchip announced the release of its JANPTX family of non-hermetic plastic Transient Voltage Suppressor devices that meet the MIL-PRF-19500 qualification, offering high-reliability protection for aerospace and defense applications. The company launched a custom-designed software on Jan. 8 for its MEC1723 Embedded Controller, specifically designed to provide support for NVIDIA DGX Spark personal AI supercomputers.
news.AI_Summary:
• Microchip Technology (MCHP) shares have gained 16.2% in a year, underperforming industry benchmarks.
• The company faces challenging macroeconomic conditions and high inventory levels.
• MCHP announced new products including a mixed-signal IC (LX4580) for aviation/defense and automotive-grade embedded SuperFlash Gen 4.
• A custom software for NVIDIA DGX Spark personal AI supercomputers was also released.
news.Keywords: Semiconductor IC, Aviation Defense, Automotive Grade, AI Supercomputers

news.Title: Marvell Jumps 10% Premarket After Earnings Beat, Analysts Lift Price Targets
news.Content:

Marvell Technology ( NASDAQ:MRVL ) drew strong investor attention Friday after the semiconductor company reported fourth-quarter results and guidance that exceeded expectations, sending its shares roughly 10% higher in premarket trading. The upbeat report triggered a wave of analyst reactions pointing to strengthening demand tied to artificial intelligence infrastructure. BofA upgraded Marvell to Buy from Neutral and lifted its price target to $110 from $90, saying the company's earnings call strengthened confidence in its exposure to AI optical connectivity and highlighted potential opportunities tied to Microsoft ( NASDAQ:MSFT ) custom chip programs. Analysts also suggested the company could be approaching a turning point in the transition tied to Amazon ( NASDAQ:AMZN ) custom chip efforts.

news.Title: Nvidia pauses new AI startup bets after backing OpenAI, Anthropic
news.Content:
Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) appears ready to step back from making major equity investments in artificial intelligence startups.
Speaking at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media and Telecom conference in San Francisco on March 4, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang suggested the chipmaker may have written its final big checks to leading AI developers such as OpenAI and Anthropic.
The company recently reduced its investment commitment to OpenAI from a previously announced $100 billion deal to roughly $30 billion . Huang also indicated that Nvidia’s $10 billion investment in Anthropic, made in November, may mark the end of its direct backing of AI startups.
While the official explanation centers on the companies potentially going public later this year, the broader picture suggests Nvidia may be repositioning itself to avoid conflicts as AI competition escalates.
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) may be concluding its major equity investments in AI startups like OpenAI and Anthropic.
• CEO Jensen Huang indicated that the $100 billion OpenAI deal is unlikely, and the $10 billion Anthropic investment may be the last.
• This shift could be a repositioning to avoid conflicts as AI competition intensifies.
news.Keywords: AI Startup Investment, Equity Investment, Strategic Shift, Competition Avoidance

Formula 1 and Apple's big gamble kicks off this weekend

Pras Subramanian · Senior Reporter

In this article: AAPL

Formula 1 ( FWONK ), the premier motorsport series that combines 200+ mph racing, cutting edge tech, and glamorous global locations the likes of Monte Carlo, is poised for a huge 2026.

New rules for cars and engines and new teams from Audi and Cadillac mean more eyeballs for F1, already the most-watched racing series, when the season kicks off in Australia this weekend.

More from Yahoo Scout

How much did Apple pay for F1 broadcasting rights?

What are the risks of F1 moving from ESPN?

What do investors think about the Apple F1 deal?

How will Apple's ecosystem enhance F1 fan experience?

And there's a big change coming to the all-important US market, which has been growing steadily since the pandemic. Gone is ESPN ( DIS ), which broadcast F1 to the masses, and in its place is tech giant Apple ( AAPL ), which will exclusively offer up F1 livestreams and VOD replays, among other things, on its Apple TV subscription service starting this weekend.

For Apple, it seems the deal is a no-brainer, but it’s more nuanced for a sport like F1 that’s still growing in the US — and can’t afford any missteps. F1’s Apple partnership represents a huge growth opportunity to meet viewers on multiple platforms, but for F1 it's also a risk to turn away from traditional broadcast, with its larger audience and mix of casual and hardcore fans.

Now, anyone who wants to watch F1 has to pony up $12.99 a month for Apple TV, which could shrink that growing US audience.

F1 shuns broadcast for Big Tech

And just before the season starts, Cupertino did something unthinkable. Last week, Apple and one of its biggest streaming rivals, Netflix ( NFLX ), announced a cross-platform F1 content deal. Netflix's “Drive to Survive” docuseries, which made F1 mainstream in the US, will stream its new season simultaneously on Netflix and Apple TV in the US.

“This is the first time in Netflix’s history that one of its original docuseries has ever appeared on a competing streaming platform. Not once. Not ever,” wrote marketing expert and Business of Speed newsletter writer Vincenzo Landino in a recent post.

Landino called it the deal "nobody saw coming,” but that could be said about Apple’s foray into sports too.

Known more for streaming hits like Ted Lasso and Severance , Apple showered money on prestige programming to get subscribers on board. It dipped its toes into sports too, taking exclusive streaming rights of Major League Soccer, though MLS games appear on broadcast as well.

Apple's involvement with F1 began in earnest with “F1: The Movie," which was released last summer. It was a huge investment for the company from both a production and distribution standpoint, but it also became a huge hit, and Apple was front and center for it.

But last fall, Apple went all in on the sport by snagging exclusive rights for live F1 programming in the US, meaning it could only be seen on the Apple TV app and Apple devices.

Apple reportedly paid around $150 million a year for US broadcast rights, which ESPN had owned since 2018, and steadily grew its viewership to the delight of F1 owner Formula One Group, an offshoot of Liberty Media.

ESPN said F1 viewership increased from an average of 554,000 viewers per race in 2018 to 1.3 million in 2025, up 135%, with 16 races this year setting audience records.

While 1.3 million viewers is only half the 2.7 million of the average NASCAR race, the latter's audience is declining. Plus, F1’s audience is more affluent and diverse , with a growing female and minority audience coveted by advertisers.

And with that on the line, Apple swooped in.

“Formula 1’s growth in America has been extraordinary, and we’re proud to build on that momentum — combining the power of Apple TV with the broader Apple ecosystem to create even more ways for fans to connect with the sport,” said Eddy Cue, Apple’s senior vice president of services, in a statement Thursday morning.

For its part, F1 says it's bullish on the new partnership.

“It’s not just Apple TV. It’s Apple Music, Apple News, the Apple stores,” Formula One group CEO Derek Chang said this week at Morgan Stanley’s tech and media conference, per Sports Business Journal . “They have so many touch points that go well beyond what you think about from a traditional television standpoint. We don’t focus on reach in an archaic definition of how many people are watching you on TV, but really, [it’s] how do you touch your fans? How do you engage with your fans?”

Chang noted the box office success of Apple’s “F1: The Movie” and praised Apple and Netflix’s deal, which includes not only “Drive to Survive” on Apple, but also the Canadian Grand Prix simulcast on Netflix.

But some Formula One investors are not happy, with Wolfe Research noting that some are calling the Apple deal "a disaster," because of the perception that Apple TV means less distribution for F1 than ESPN would have for an important growth market like the US.

While Apple doesn't break out subscriber numbers, The Information reports Apple had 45 million subscribers by the end of 2025. ESPN has roughly 60 million pay TV subscribers (a figure that's fallen from 100 million in 2021), and 25 million ESPN+ digital-only subscribers.

But Wolfe Research deviates from the take that Apple is bad for F1.

“We disagree with the idea that the Apple TV deal was a massive negative,” wrote Wolfe analyst Peter Supino in a note. “A unique deal like [the Netflix/Apple deal] would almost certainly not happen with a legacy platform. Yes, ESPN has more reach, but ~2/3 of ESPN's reach is from linear TV, which is a terrible platform for F1's races which often air at 1 a.m. ET," due to the global nature of the sport, he said.

Supino believes Formula One Group is “too cheap” at these levels — which he defines as 21 times 2027 free cash flow estimates — and has an Outperform rating on the stock, with Apple a part of the formula.

F1 enters Apple's ecosystem

For Apple, rolling the dice on F1 to boost its content offerings, and of course its brand association with the preeminent racing series, is no brainer. In addition, $150 million a year for F1 rights is peanuts for Apple, which earned an astounding $112 billion in profit latest fiscal year.

But it also means fans can forget about just flipping the TV on and coming across a live F1 race; those days are over, a gamble for Formula One.

Will the loss of the casual fan be big for the sport, or will the ubiquity of Apple products and the ability for F1 to serve custom content across iPhones, Apple Music, and even Apple Maps (which now includes detailed renderings of race tracks and audio walking tours with paired with Apple Fitness) mean there’s more for fans to access, where they are, and when they please?

“Every piece touches every other piece. An operating system for how a sport lives in your life: on your screen, in your ears, in your steps, on your home screen, on your wrist,” Business of Speed’s Landino wrote. “Apple started with a movie. Then it bought the rights. Now it’s running the ecosystem.”

That’s the bet Formula One is making with Apple, and vice versa. Tune in, or log on to Apple TV on your device of choice this weekend, to see if these two big names made the right call.

news.Content:

news.Title: Why American Express Stock Slipped 12% In March
news.Content: Shares of American Express (NYSE: AXP) slipped 12.3% in February, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . The stock is down 20% from its highs, even after announcing strong 2026 earnings guidance and raising its dividend.

news.Title: 2度面試台積電都遭拒！ 碩士哥憂「被列黑名單」 過來人揭真相
news.Content:
不少人都希望能進入台積電工作，但未必都能如願。有網友求助，表示自己是台大碩士，也曾兩度收到台積電的面試邀約，卻都未被錄取，擔憂是否被列入「黑名單」，引發熱議。
該名網友在論壇Dcard上以「台積這樣算進黑名單嗎？」為題發文求助，表示自己大學就讀的並非台清交成電機相關科系，是碩士時才轉讀台大資訊網路與多媒體研究所，自認成績一般。畢業後，曾兩次收到台積電的面試邀請，第一次面試時，他先寫了多益英文考卷，接著與主管及小主管面談，介紹自己的背景與能力，也表達願意配合加班，但最終卻沒有下文。第二次面試時，是智慧製造部門，他才剛結束自我介紹，面試的主管就直接告訴他「不適合」當場勸退，讓他十分錯愕不解。他嘗試詢問面試主管，若只看自我介紹就覺得不適合，為何會有面試邀約，對方只稱是更上層的主管「撈履歷」才安排該次面試。自此之後，儘管他仍定期更新履歷，但再也沒有收到台積電的面試邀請，讓他不禁懷疑，自己是否因什麼因素被列入黑名單？
▼原PO表示曾兩度到台積電面試，但都未被錄取，第二次甚至是只說完自我介紹就被拒絕，讓他十分不解。（示意圖，非新聞當事人／取自 Pexels ）
此案例吸引眾多網友留言討論，有人同情原PO的遭遇：「自我介紹完就勸退，好鬧」，還有人安慰原PO：「那邊沒進是上天保佑你」、「智慧製造是帶線課長吧，你就算進去也待不下去」。至於原PO的遭遇，有網友認為的確有可能是人資亂撈履歷造成的：「基本上就是人資亂槍打鳥，單純看是頂大學歷就約來面試，但其實跟部門需求不符」、「據說血汗部門會蹲守系統撈人，你可能那時候請人推完沒有趕快去撈，所以被產線的上頭撈去面試了」。
▼有網友分享自己面試成功的經驗，表示在面試時若強調願意配合加班，或許能提高率取機率。（示意圖／取自 pixabay ）
此外，也有人分享增加錄取機率的做法：「面試給主管一副很渴望加班+很缺錢的感覺，被問薪資也說依照公司規定64000+主動說完全配合加班之類的，最後就拿到offer了」，認為若表現出願意全力投入工作的積極態度，或許能提高錄取機會。
（封面圖／東森新聞資料照）

news.Title: 〈美股早盤〉非農爆冷＋油價飆升！主要指數開盤跳水
news.Content:
美股主要指數周五 (6 日) 開盤走低，延續近期震盪走勢，市場同時消化疲弱的美國就業數據與中東衝突升溫帶來的通膨疑慮。美國 2 月非農就業意外減少 9.2 萬人，顯示就業市場降溫，而油價因地緣政治緊張局勢飆升，推升通膨憂慮。受此影響，美股開盤承壓，債券殖利率盤中震盪，比特幣跌破 7 萬美元，顯示市場避險情緒升溫。
截稿前， 道瓊工業指數 跌近 880 點或近 1.8%， 那斯達克綜合指數 跌逾 300 點或近 1.4%， 標普 500 指數 跌近 1.5%， 費城半導體 指數跌近 2.3%。台積電 ADR 挫近 2.9%。
美國最新就業數據意外轉弱，加上市場對中東衝突推升能源價格的憂慮升溫，衝擊投資人情緒，美股主要指數期貨週五盤前走低。標普 500 期貨一度下跌逾 1%，美元走強，美債殖利率走勢震盪，市場同時重新評估聯準會（Fed）利率政策前景。
美國勞工部公布，2 月非農就業人數減少 9.2 萬人，與市場原本預期增加 5.9 萬人形成明顯落差；失業率則升至 4.4%，高於市場預期的 4.3%。數據顯示，美國就業市場動能出現降溫跡象。
與此同時，另一份數據顯示，美國 1 月零售銷售按月下滑 0.2%，略優於市場預期的下滑 0.3%，但仍顯示消費動能偏弱。
截至紐約時間上午盤前，道瓊工業指數期貨下跌約 357 點或 0.74%，標普 500 期貨下跌約 0.77%，那斯達克 100 期貨則下跌約 0.97%。
就業市場轉弱 聯準會政策陷兩難 最新就業數據可能重新讓聯準會將焦點放回就業市場。近期決策官員原本更關注通膨壓力，但就業市場若持續降溫，可能增加市場對降息的預期。
摩根士丹利財富管理首席經濟學家曾特納 (Ellen Zentner) 表示，最新數據可能讓聯準會陷入兩難局面。
她指出，如果就業市場出現明顯轉弱，理論上將支持降息，但若油價持續維持高檔，可能再度推升通膨壓力，聯準會可能因此選擇暫時維持利率不變。
市場目前正同時消化多項訊號。一方面，疲弱的就業數據提高市場對聯準會降息的預期；另一方面，中東衝突導致油價上升，也引發通膨重新升溫的疑慮。
中東衝突推升油價 能源市場風險升高 隨著美國與以色列對伊朗的軍事行動升級，中東能源供應面臨衝擊。市場擔憂波斯灣原油運輸可能受阻，推升油價上漲。
布蘭特原油價格目前接近每桶 90 美元，能源市場波動加劇。市場人士指出，荷姆茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）航運幾乎停滯，導致區域內原油儲存設施逐漸滿載，進一步擾亂全球能源供應。
在能源價格上升的背景下，白宮也正評估多項措施以緩解市場壓力。知情人士透露，川普政府目前並未優先考慮由美國財政部直接在期貨市場交易石油，以干預油價。
聯準會理事華勒 (Christopher Waller) 則表示，他不預期伊朗戰事會對通膨造成長期影響。他指出，聯準會在評估通膨趨勢時，更重視剔除能源與食品價格波動的核心通膨指標。
華勒受訪時表示：「這場衝突不太可能造成持續性的通膨壓力。」他指出，能源價格通常波動較大，因此政策制定者在評估未來通膨時，更關注核心通膨的走勢。
截至台北時間周五（6 日）22 時許： 道瓊工業指數 下跌 816.18 點或 1.70%，暫報 47,138.56 點
那斯達克綜合指數 下跌 327.69 點或 1.44%，暫報 22,421.30 點

紐約輕原油上漲 8.75% 至每桶 88.10 美元
布蘭特原油 上漲 5.70% 至每桶 90.28 美元
黃金 上漲 0.66% 至每盎司 5,1112.00 美元
美元指數 升至 99.32
焦點個股： Alphabet(GOOGL-US) 早盤股價下跌 1.51%，至每股 296.35 美元
根據媒體報導，Google 母公司 Alphabet 今日正式宣布，將對其 Google Play 應用程式商店的抽成比例進行大幅下調。這項舉措象徵著行動應用市場競爭格局的重大轉型。
陶氏化學 (DOW-US) 早盤股價上漲 1.19%，至每股 34.12 美元
陶氏化學 ((Dow Inc.) 盤前繼續上漲 3%，此前 3 日連漲走出反轉行情。消息面上，3 月 5 日，陶氏歐洲有限公司宣布上調聚醚多元醇產品價格。陶氏指出，這次價格調整主要受到中東地區局勢變化的影響，導致能源、原料以及物流成本大幅上升。此外，摩根大通將陶氏化學評級從中性上調至增持，目標價從 26 美元上調至 40 美元。
Meta(META-US) 早盤股價下跌 3.54%，至每股 637.20 美元
Meta 表示，未來一年將允許人工智慧競爭者在 WhatsApp 上運作，並藉此化解歐盟反壟斷監管機構可能採取的臨時命令。 Meta 發言人表示，未來 12 個月，我們將應對歐盟執委會的監管程序，在歐洲透過 WhatsApp Business API 支援通用型 AI 聊天機器人。
今日關鍵經濟數據： 美國 2 月非農新增就業報 - 9.2 萬人，預期 5.8 萬人，修正後前值 12.6 萬人
美國 2 月失業率報 4.4%，預期 4.3%，前值 4.3%
美國 2 月平均每周工時報 34.3 小時，預期 34.2 小時，前值 34.2 小時
美國 2 月平均每小時薪資年增率報 3.8%，預期 3.7%，前值 3.7%
美國 2 月平均每小時薪資月增率報 0.4%，預期 0.3%，前值 0.4%
美國 2 月勞動參與率報 62.0%，前值 62.1%
美國 1 月銷售月增率報 - 0.2%，預期 - 0.3%，前值 0.0%
美國 1 月核心零售銷售月增率報 0.0%，預期 0.1%，前值 0.0%
華爾街分析： 美國銀行的 Michael Hartnett 表示，一場持久的伊朗戰爭對日本和歐洲由銀行股帶動的反彈構成了風險，因為投資者正放棄這些市場，轉而投向原油和美元。
這位策略師指出，投資人可能會轉向那些「長期衝突的受益者」資產，而代價則是犧牲韓國、日本和歐洲等「能源股票敞口極小的石油進口國」。美國科技股和全球國防工業是可能在這一輪輪動中獲益的產業。

news.Title: Texas Instruments to accelerate deployment of humanoid robots with Nvidia
news.Content: Texas Instruments ( TXN ) announced it is accelerating the safe deployment of humanoid robots into the real world with Nvidia ( NVDA ). By combining TI’s real-time motor control, sensing, radar and power technologies with Nvidia’s advanced robotics compute, ethernet based sensing and simulation technologies, robotics developers can validate perception, actuation and safety earlier and more accurately. TI connects Nvidia physical AI compute to real-world applications with deterministic control, sensing, power and safety at every joint and subsystem. This partnership will help developers move faster from virtual development to production-ready, scalable and safety-compliant systems. As part of this collaboration, TI designed a sensor fusion solution by integrating its mmWave radar technology with Nvidia Jetson Thor using Nvidia Holoscan Sensor Bridge to enable low-latency, 3D perception and safety awareness for humanoid robots. TI will showcase the solution at Nvidia GTC, March 16-19, in San Jose, California.
news.AI_Summary:
• Texas Instruments (TXN) is accelerating the deployment of humanoid robots with Nvidia (NVDA).
• The partnership combines TI's motor control, sensing, and power technologies with Nvidia's robotics compute and simulation capabilities.
• This collaboration aims to help developers validate perception, actuation, and safety earlier and more accurately.
• TI designed a sensor fusion solution integrating its mmWave radar with Nvidia Jetson Thor.
news.Keywords: Humanoid Robots, Robotics Compute, Sensor Fusion, Real-Time Control

news.Title: Waystar announces expanded collaboration with Google Cloud
news.Content: Waystar ( WAY ) announced an expanded collaboration with Google ( GOOG ) Cloud to accelerate its agentic AI capabilities and advance the industry toward an autonomous revenue cycle. Waystar delivers the mission-critical infrastructure that healthcare providers need to get paid. Across an extensively deployed payer-provider-patient network and more than one million providers, Waystar captures and normalizes rich financial and clinical data that fuels its AI-powered platform. By learning from downstream payment outcomes, Waystar creates a self-learning revenue cycle that continuously improves upstream prior authorization, patient coverage identification, and denial prevention – generating a powerful flywheel effect that delivers increasingly accurate, outcome-driven automation.
news.AI_Summary:
• Waystar has expanded its collaboration with Google (GOOG) Cloud to enhance its agentic AI capabilities.
• The partnership aims to advance the healthcare revenue cycle toward autonomy.
• Waystar's AI-powered platform uses financial and clinical data to improve prior authorization, coverage identification, and denial prevention.
news.Keywords: Agentic AI, Google Cloud, Healthcare Revenue Cycle, AI Platform

news.Title: Is Nvidia (NVDA) Shifting its Investment Strategy Towards OpenAI and Anthropic?
news.Content: NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA ) is one of the Best IT Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts . On March 4, Reuters reported that NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA)’s latest comments suggest that the company may be nearing the end of its investments in AI leaders OpenAI and Anthropic as both firms eye potential public listings. At a recent Morgan Stanley conference, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang noted that a $100 billion dollar investment in OpenAI is probably not in the cards as the company expects an IPO. He also noted that the $10 billion stake in Anthropic is likely Nvidia’s final one, amid reports of the startup’s potential public debut despite its ongoing Pentagon dispute. In September 2025, Nvidia and OpenAI had discussed a potential $100 billion deal. However, Nvidia recently finalized a $30 billion investment deal calling it to be the last opportunity to invest in a “consequential company.” Moreover, a recent report by the Financial Times also suggests that Nvidia and OpenAI have abandoned their $100 billion deal considering the health of the AI sector.
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang suggests the company may be ending major equity investments in AI leaders like OpenAI and Anthropic.
• The $100 billion OpenAI deal is unlikely due to the company's potential IPO, and the $10 billion Anthropic stake may be Nvidia's last.
• This strategic shift could be to avoid conflicts as AI competition escalates.
news.Keywords: AI Investment Strategy, Equity Investments, Startup Funding, Competitive Landscape

news.Title: Microsoft (MSFT) to Deliver New Cloud PC Devices With ASUS and Dell
news.Content:
Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT ) is one of the Best IT Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts . On February 26, Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) announced that it is collaborating with ASUS and Dell to launch two new Cloud PC devices including the ASUS NUC 16 and Dell Pro Desktop.
Management highlighted that the Cloud PC devices are designed for seamless access to Windows 365 Cloud PCs. These PCs can boot directly into the cloud-hosted Windows environment, eliminating local data, apps, or admin access to minimize vulnerabilities. Microsoft launched Windows 365 Link in 2024, which pioneered this device category by allowing users to connect to their Cloud PCs in seconds through a locked-down OS called Windows CPC. The company has collaborated with ASUS and Dell to expand the Cloud PC device portfolio.

news.Title: Best Health & Fitness Stocks to Buy Now for Strong Growth
news.Content:
An updated edition of the January 13, 2026, article.

The health and fitness industry has grown from a niche segment into a powerful global movement, driven by a broad shift toward healthier lifestyles. Consumers are no longer content with occasional exercise — they increasingly seek balanced nutrition, structured workout routines and well-rounded wellness solutions. Demand is rising across gyms, dietary supplements and personalized programs, while technological advances have made managing personal health easier and more engaging. Wearable devices, fitness platforms and virtual coaching services now provide real-time insights, tailored guidance and ongoing motivation. At the same time, greater awareness of obesity, chronic illnesses and mental health has strengthened the emphasis on preventive, everyday wellness.

Major technology companies are helping accelerate this transformation. Apple AAPL, through its Apple Watch ecosystem and Fitness+ platform, integrates activity tracking with guided workout experiences. Amazon AMZN is expanding its presence in healthcare via One Medical, combining AI-powered tools with virtual care services to enhance accessibility and convenience. Together, these innovations are reshaping how individuals approach wellness, blending fitness, healthcare and daily life while driving industry growth.

Market forecasts highlight the scale of this opportunity. The global health and wellness market is expected to reach $11 trillion by 2034 at a steady 5.4% CAGR from 2025. Preventive healthcare initiatives, workplace wellness programs and supportive policy measures continue to boost demand. Meanwhile, specialized offerings — such as boutique fitness studios and premium wellness clubs — reflect a broader, more holistic focus on physical, nutritional and mental well-being. This evolving landscape is creating fresh growth opportunities for companies like Garmin Ltd. GRMN, Herbalife Ltd. HLF and American Well Corporation AMWL.

For investors, the takeaway is clear: wellness represents a durable, long-term theme. As consumers place greater priority on their health, demand for fitness, nutrition and digital health solutions is likely to stay strong. Our Health & Fitness Screen highlights key companies in this space — including the three mentioned above — helping investors identify opportunities in a market poised for sustained growth.

Ready to uncover more transformative thematic investment ideas? Explore 37 cutting-edge investment themes with Zacks Thematic Investing Screens and discover your next big opportunity.
news.AI_Summary:
• The health and fitness industry is growing, driven by a shift towards healthier lifestyles and technological advances.
• Companies like Apple (AAPL) and Amazon (AMZN) are contributing to this transformation through wearables, platforms, and virtual care.
• The global health and wellness market is projected to reach $11 trillion by 2034, with a 5.4% CAGR from 2025.
news.Keywords: Health and Wellness, Wearable Technology, Digital Health, Market Growth

news.Title: 土洋大戰這兩檔淪重災區！台積電、台達電遭外資血洗 台股硬抗跌網狂飆：小兒竟然沒認輸
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]記者張書翰／綜合報導
由於美以聯軍攻擊伊朗導致西亞危機持續延燒，情勢相當不穩，台股加權指數今（6）日數次在紅黑中搖擺，最終下跌73.4點，以33599.54點作收，跌幅0.22%，成交金額為6323.65億元。據證交所盤後公布籌碼動向，外資今賣超約352.36億元；自營商（合計）賣超約7.48億元；投信則買超約67.2億元，三大法人合計賣超約292.63億元；
觀察集中市場三大法人今天籌碼動向，外資及陸資（不包括外資自營商）賣超約352.36億元；自營商（合計）賣超約7.48億元，其中自營商自行買賣部分，買超約23.72億元，避險部分賣超約31.21億元；投信買超約67.2億元，合計三大法人賣超約292.63億元。
電子權值股收盤部分，台積電（2330）下跌10元，跌幅0.53%，收1890元；鴻海（2317）下跌1元，跌幅0.45%，收223元；台達電（2308）下跌15元，跌幅1.12%，收1320元；聯發科（2454）下跌10元，跌幅0.56%，收1765元；日月光投控（3711）下跌11.5元，跌幅3.25%，收342元。
AI族群方面，指標股英業達（2356）下跌0.1元，跌幅0.24%，收41.8元；緯創（3231）上漲2元，漲幅1.56%，收130.5元；至於其他AI股方面，宏碁（2353）上漲0.2元，漲幅0.75%，收26.9元；技嘉（2376）上漲1元，漲幅0.46%，收219元；世芯-KY（3661）上漲40元，漲幅1.22%，收3310元。
對此，股民紛紛表示「小兒竟然沒認輸」、「外資繼續撤退」、「繼續買 外資賣完就只能買了」、「大媽跟長老還有錢」、「大媽繼續融資護盤」。

news.Title: 群聯2025年每股純益41.98元　下半年配息17元
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中新竹2026年03月6日電）記憶體控制晶片廠群聯 (8299) 2025年歸屬母公司淨利新台幣87.39億元，每股純益41.98元，董事會決議2025年下半年每股配發17元現金股利。
受惠人工智慧（AI）應用帶動資料儲存需求攀升，群聯2025年第4季營收227.99億元，歸屬母公司淨利46.29億元，營收與獲利同創歷史新高，每股純益21.74元。
群聯2025年總營收726.64億元，年增23.3%，歸屬母公司淨利87.39億元，每股純益41.98元，董事會決議2025年下半年每股配發17元現金股利。
群聯自結2月營收121.98億元，月增17%，年增170%。群聯表示，隨著AI訓練與AI推論應用持續擴展，資料產生量爆發成長，帶動儲存需求顯著提升。NAND Flash（儲存型快閃記憶體）供給持續緊張，使得市場供需結構維持偏緊格局。
群聯執行長潘健成說，群聯過去幾年加大研發投資，積極布局多元應用市場，涵蓋企業級儲存、資料中心、車用電子、工業應用以及AI相關解決方案。隨著AI產業及應用快速崛起，群聯累積的技術與產品布局逐步開花結果。
為尋求與國內外產業大廠進行產品技術合作、市場業務合作或策略聯盟機會，同時充實營運週轉金及因應長期營運發展所需，群聯董事會決議辦理私募普通股，總額以1800萬股為限。
為償還既有借款暨充實中期營運週轉資金，群聯擬委由第一商業銀行及台北富邦商業銀行共同統籌主辦3年期授信總額度不超過120億元聯合授信案，授信總額度並得視募集情形在25%範圍內調整。

news.Title: 台塑擬再度出售南亞科股票6.1972萬張
news.Content:
為充實營運資金及強化財務結構，台塑(1301) 6日董事會通過啟動第四度處分南亞科技股票計畫，預計3月6日至12月31日處分南亞科股票 61,972張，因實際仍尚未出售，依董事會通過日期3月6日南亞科收盤價233元估算，交易總金額144.39億元。
由於去年台塑及台化、台塑化同步公告三度處分南亞科股票；後續台化、台塑化是否跟進台塑，再度啟動南亞科股票處分計畫，引發關注。
南亞科因DRAM缺貨漲價潮催化，股價表現持續攀高。台塑集團為強化財務結構，台塑、台化、台塑化去年完成第二次處分計畫，各出售南亞科1.8萬張，合計套現78.5億元，並宣布啟動第三次處分計畫，預計從11月12日至今年1月30日，分別再出脫南亞科1萬8,972張，持股比降至8.8053％。
台塑表示，當初投資南亞科並非以交易為目的，因此在會計界定上，是放在未分配盈餘項下，原本每季就會按持有成本與市價的差別認列未實現損益，因此一系列處分不會有處分利益，不影響各公司EPS，惟未分配盈餘會因此增加。

news.Content:
（中央社記者曾仁凱台北2026年03月6日電）受亞洲石化產能過剩衝擊，台塑 (1301) 2025年歸屬母公司淨損新台幣100.48億元，連續第2年吞虧，每股淨損1.58元。台塑今天董事會仍決議每股配發現金股息0.5元，與去年維持相同，對照台塑今天收盤價50.2元，現金殖利率約1%。
台塑去年營運虧損，不過趁著記憶體產業進入超級循環，台塑去年底3度出脫轉投資南亞科持股，藉此增加未分配盈餘，為配息提供底氣。
台塑今天董事會也再度通過將第4輪處分南亞科持股計畫，預計於3月6日至12月31日期間，處分持有的南亞科持股6萬1972張，以南亞科今天收盤股價233元計算，換算金額高達144.39億元，希望藉此充實營運資金及強化財務結構。
另外，台塑董事會今天也決議，處分轉投資「台塑工業美國公司」全部股權，予「台塑美國公司」。
台塑補充說明，此舉主要是為了提升2家轉投資公司的營運績效，台塑擬將100%持有的「台塑工業美國公司」全部股份，與持有22.66%的「台塑美國公司」進行股份轉換。
股份轉換比例方面，依據兩家外部專業機構的鑑價結果，其中「台塑工業美國公司」每股價值為5萬614美元，「台塑美國公司」每股價值為3萬3047美元。因此將以「台塑工業美國公司」1股轉換「台塑美國公司」1.5316股，即「台塑美國公司」需增資發行新股8841股，轉換台塑持有的「台塑工業美國公司」全部股份。
股份轉換後，台塑持有「台塑美國公司」股權比重將由原本22.66%提高至24.82%，「台塑工業美國公司」則成為「台塑美國公司」100%持股子公司。

news.Title: Marvell Tech shares rally on forecast for multi-year AI-chip growth
news.Content:
March 6 (Reuters) - Marvell Technology shares surged nearly 12% before the opening bell on Friday as investors bet on strengthening demand for its ‌AI-focused custom chips and interconnect technologies following an upbeat long-term forecast.
AI‑chip ‌spending has accelerated industry-wide. Broadcom, a key supplier of custom accelerators and networking silicon, this week ​projected more than $100 billion in AI chip sales next year, underscoring demand widening beyond Nvidia and deepening hyperscaler build-outs.
news.AI_Summary:
• Marvell Technology shares surged nearly 12% pre-bell on an upbeat long-term forecast for AI-focused chips.
• Investors are betting on strengthening demand for its custom chips and interconnect technologies.
• The forecast signals strong demand beyond Nvidia, with Broadcom also projecting over $100 billion in AI chip sales.
news.Keywords: AI Chip Demand, Custom Chips, Interconnect Technology, Revenue Forecast

news.Title: 台股震盪逾500點! 小資族抄底買爆台積電"一週750億元"
news.Content:
財經中心/葉為襄 嚴凱台北報導
中東衝突將近一周，台股跟著上演雲霄飛車行情，今天（6）高低震盪超過500點，終場小跌73點收在33599點，成功守穩在月線之上，但散戶越挫越勇，爆買台積電零股，小資族抄底魂爆發，一週來爆買台積電零股高達750億元。
驚魂砲火撕裂伊朗民眾，中東衝突將近一周，美股、台股陷入高度戒備，週五開低以33483點開出，開盤後一小時翻紅，最高站上33829點，終場收跌73點，收在3萬3599點，成交量再縮減，僅剩6532億，其中權值股台積電疲軟，收在1890元，下跌10元，但小資族抄底不手軟，只要跌就買，一週下來，光台積電零股交易就達750億元。專職投資人 阿樂表示我覺得台灣股市有個最棒的地方叫做「零股」，所以呢，不管高價、不管低價，我認為其實這個都跟你原本的存股標的沒有關係。因為股價會漲，它不是因為說，啊，它的股價比較低它就會漲，股價會漲是因為這個資金會到這個產業，因為它備受期待。
投資專家說零股交易要挑穩定成長的公司，但是受到中東情勢影響，台股修正之下法人動向也出現分歧，自營商賣超7.48億、外資賣超352億多元，倒是投信逆勢買超67億。
台股震盪逾500點! 小資族抄底買爆台積電"一週750億元"(圖/民視財經網)
分析師 翁偉捷說若在兩週之內能夠結束的話，那可能在油價部分會重新回到每桶 70 塊美元這樣的一個價格。不管是持有現金，還是轉進到這個重資產、低淘汰率的這些相關的哈囉（High-low）概念股，那我覺得都還算是不錯的一個調整，至少以現在目前投資人的狀況來說，是以降低風險為主。
台股震盪逾500點! 小資族抄底買爆台積電"一週750億元"(圖/民視財經網)
專家提醒在戰事和油價變數還沒落幕前，市場操作還是傾向保守為宜，金融市場何時回穩、下週將是關鍵期。
《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。
原文出處： 台股震盪逾！小資族越挫越勇 零股交易爆量力挺「這個股」

news.Title: 0050換股！「增刪5檔」 納鴻勁剔萬海
news.Content:
富時羅素（FTSE Russell）今（6）日公布「台灣指數系列」成分股定期審核結果。其中，擁有232萬多股民的元大台灣50（0050）追蹤的臺灣50指數，納入金像電、鴻勁、京元電子、欣興、華邦電5檔；剔除萬海等5檔，相關變動將於下周一起正式計算。
台灣50指數 納入金像電（2368）、鴻勁（7769）、京元電子（2449）、欣興（3037）、華邦電（2344）；刪除貿聯-KY（3665）、聯詠（3034）、統一超（2912）、瑞昱（2379）、萬海（2615）。
候補名單為華城（1519）、創意（3443）、南電（8046）、藥華藥（6446）、力積電（6770）。
台灣中型100指數 納入貿聯-KY（3665）、高力（8996）、景碩（3189）、旺宏（2337）、聯詠（3034）、統一超（2912）、瑞昱（2379）、新代（7750）、聯邦銀（2838）、萬海（2615）。
刪除晶光（3406）、金像電（2368）、材料*-KY（4763）、京元電子（2449）、三陽工業（2206）、台肥（1722）、中保科（9917）、欣興（3037）、華邦電（2344）、裕融（9941）。
候補名單為群益證（6005）、長興（1717）、台勝科（3532）、國票金（2889）、中砂（1560）、帆宣（6196）、潤弘（2597）、矽格（6257）、華新科（2492）、洋基工程（6691）。
台灣資訊科技指數 納入鴻勁（7769）、景碩（3189）、旺宏（2337）；刪除玉晶光（3406）
台灣發達指數 納入高力（8996）、新代（7750），刪除材料*-KY（4763）、三陽工業（2206）、台肥（1722）、中保科（9917）
台灣高股息指數 刪除裕融（9941）。
台灣指數公司表示，如有指數成分股在下次定期審核前之期間被刪除，將以本次候補名單遞補，候補名單自即日起生效。臺灣高股息指數自指數審核生效日起之連續五個交易日為指數定期審核過渡期，此期間每檔股票之權重採用過渡期間權重，過渡期間生效日為2026年3月23日、24日、25日、26日和27日。
陳依旻／財經特派記者副組長，主跑央行、證交所、投信投顧等

news.Title: 戰爭受惠股撐盤巨震509點 台股本周跌1814點
news.Content:
[ 非凡新聞 ]記者謝旻蓁,攝影林家弘
台股周五呈現上沖下洗格局，市場仍陷中東戰爭陰霾，資金流入趨於保守，台積電陷平盤震盪，終場下跌10元來到1890元，其他大型電子權值股同步回檔，盤面上亮眼族群，仍聚焦在戰爭題材股，像是台塑化、欣天然、台聚、亞聚等類股都亮燈漲停，另外面板、光電族群也都有題材面漲勢，終場跌幅收斂，下跌73點來到33599點，成交量縮減至6532億元。
台股在經歷前兩日大幅震盪後，周五振幅變小，市場觀望態勢濃厚，盤面上大型電子權值股暫時熄火休息，台積電失守1900元關卡，不少股民也想趁著波段低點進場佈局。
民眾：「我個人理財習慣是比較偏向是ETF的部分，還是會以像是0050這種比較大型的為主，這樣波動的話是比較不太會去擔心。」
民眾：「以長線來看，（台積電股價）都會慢慢增加，所以有低點就可以持續慢慢買入。」
民眾：「因為它如果現在比較低的話，現在進場之後有可能更高，0050就跟著大盤，遇到（戰爭）這種事情就去調整自己的配置。」
先前漲勢暢旺的低軌衛星概念股漲跌互見，矽光子族群走勢分化，南亞科、華邦電等記憶體概念股跌幅擴大，市場資金避風港輪動快速，除了戰爭題材股延續，面板族群受惠於報價帶動，群創、友達股價走高，光電股、塑化以及天然氣概念股也有強勁漲勢。
華冠投顧分析師 陳韋廷：「它有力圖守住月線的味道，今天剛好配合現在油價在上漲，那整個塑化類股，台塑、台塑化、台化，甚至華夏、台聚、亞聚這些塑化類股往上拉，讓整個指數撐住，矽光子的光聖或者是低軌衛星的昇達科，他們近期剛好配合盤勢做一個修正，目前的成交量大概只有5至6千億，等待事件後續的比較消化，整個市場買盤回來，再重新往上攻擊。」
專家分析，短線技術面已出現反彈力道，後續持續關注外資買賣超力道對月線支撐的影響，中長期而言則要留意戰爭局勢變化，是否進一步為國內科技業龍頭埋下變數。
永誠投顧分析師 陳建誠：「如果外資的期貨空單沒有再拉高，我認為台股的短線的回檔，大概就是我們來看這兩天的低點在3萬2千8這個地方，大概就是一個短期的底部，大家比較擔心的是比如說我們台灣的天然氣，我們的發電從卡達這邊進天然氣，以台積電來講，它又是用電量非常大，我們的用電的需求會不會因為能源，造成我們能源吃緊進而去影響我們產業。」
專家指出，緊接著下周將迎來台積電等AI科技股的營收表現，投資人要留意股價波動變化，投資策略上建議保留部分現金水位，配置在長線基本面穩健的族群。（記者 謝旻蓁、林家弘／台北採訪報導）

news.Title: Jim Cramer Says Buy 2 Trillion-Dollar AI Stocks -- Wall Street Agrees.
news.Content:
Jim Cramer is best known as the host of CNBC's Mad Money and coanchor of Squawk on the Street . But he used to be a hedge fund manager at Cramer Berkowitz, where he earned an exceptional return of 24% annually for 14 years before retiring in 2001.
Cramer recently recommended buying Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) around $344 per share. He also recommended buying Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) around $239 a share. Both stocks have dropped since Cramer made the calls, but most Wall Street analysts also think Alphabet and Amazon are undervalued.
news.AI_Summary:
• Jim Cramer recommended Alphabet (GOOGL) at approximately $344 per share and Amazon (AMZN) at around $239 per share.
• Although both stocks have declined since his recommendations, many Wall Street analysts also view them as undervalued.
• Both are considered trillion-dollar AI stocks.
news.Keywords: Stock Recommendations, Undervalued Assets, AI Sector, Wall Street Consensus

news.Title: 《半導體》群聯去年EPS41.98元 擬私募上限1800萬股
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】群聯(8299)公告民國114年營業收入726.64億元，營業毛利248.57億元，營業利益82.66億元，稅前淨利102.05億元，本期淨利87.41億元，歸屬於母公司業主淨利87.39億元，每股盈餘41.98元。董事會決議114年股東常會決議辦理之私募普通股案不繼續辦理募集發行。
另決議辦理私募普通股案，總額度上限1800萬股，於股東會決議之日起一年內，單次或分次辦理。
本次募集之資金用途尋求與國內外產業大廠進行產品技術合作、市場業務合作或策略聯盟機會，同時充實營運週轉金及因應公司長期營運發展所需。預計可降低公司之經營風險，強化財務結構，提升公司未來營績效之效益。(編輯：林家祺)

news.Title: 解約儲蓄險去買股 1月保險給付件數年增7成
news.Content:
[ 非凡新聞 ]記者林浩宇
台股近期高檔震盪，市場投資氣氛依舊熱絡，也讓部分民眾開始重新調整資產配置。保發中心最新統計顯示，今年1月保險給付金額已連續3個月衝破2000億元。壽險業者分析，其中一大原因就是不少民眾選擇解約儲蓄型保單，把資金轉往股票，甚至投入護國神山台積電。另一方面，投資型保單與美元利變型商品買氣同樣升溫，也帶動壽險業1月總保費收入，創下4年新高。
民眾 吳小姐：「我大概解了大概9張、10張（保單）左右，然後因為之前的儲蓄險，可能利率比較低一點。」
其實像吳小姐這樣解約保單，重新配置資金的情況，近期並不少見，保發中心公布最新數據，今年1月的保險給付金額高達2620億元，已經連續3個月超過2000億元，件數更超過689萬件，年增將近7成。
壽險業高層分析，其中一個重要原因，竟是不少民眾解約保單領回資金，接著投入ETF、股票，甚至直接布局台積電，民眾吳小姐就是其中之一。
民眾 吳小姐：「我都會選比較績優的，像台積電也有，我覺得現在就是AI，台積電本身的基本面都很好，所以我覺得基本上放長期，都一定不會有問題，只是賺多賺少。」
而吳小姐不只把解約保單的資金投入股市之外，也把部分資金轉往投資型保單，像這樣的人還真的不少，保發中心最新的統計也顯示，壽險業1月總保費收入衝上3135億元，不只比去年同期年增48%，更寫下4年新高紀錄。壽險業者也指出，主要有兩大成長動能，包含美元利變險以及投資型商品熱賣。
保經公司業務副總 程睿紳：「以目前的部分，投資型保單可能占整體業績的7成到8成。光今年1月份，我們自己通訊處的業績，對比去年同期1月份，保費收入將近增加40%左右，剛好1月份是年終發放，二來剛好進入台股，我們說的瘋馬時期。」
至於保費收入扣除保險給付之後，整體的保費淨流入達515億元，不只創下去年6月以來新高，也連續8個月呈現保費淨流入，在投資市場表現亮眼的情況之下，業者預期今年2、3月仍有望維持保費淨流入，短期內不會出現入不敷出的窘境。（記者 林浩宇、邱文傑／台北採訪報導）

news.Title: 美股現出走潮、台股等遭殃？00400A經理人喊AI基本面無虞：聰明選股是關鍵
news.Content:
中東局勢緊張衝擊國際油價創下近期新高，市場憂慮美伊衝突短期內難以緩解，致使5日美股持續震盪，四大主要指數盡墨。國際動盪局勢同步造成本週台股波動加劇，加權指數呈現急跌急漲態勢，4日更以單日跳空下挫1,494點，創下台股歷史第三大跌點紀錄，（6）日加權指數在33,500點前後徘徊，最終以33,599點作收。
對此，國泰投信表示，近期市場波動加劇，投資人可逢回適時展現貪婪，建立具成本優勢的部位，即將於3月23日至3月25日展開募集的國泰台股動能高息主動式ETF基金（00400A），由專業團隊配合市場趨勢「以動制動」、隨時靈活調整投組，正是時候幫助投資人從3月波動格局中找尋長期投資機會。
國泰台股動能高息主動式ETF基金（00400A）經理人梁恩溢指出，近期AI類股雖受地緣政治衝突拖累而出現回檔，但觀察其跌勢多屬「非理性震盪」。從政策面分析，根據美國總統川普過往的決策邏輯，不論是2018年貿易戰期間提出的「實體清單」，或是2025年的「對等關稅」，皆已明確將AI等科技產業定調為國家級的「戰略性資源」。因此，回歸基本面審視，近期的股價修正反而為長線投資人創造了絕佳的「逢低布局」契機。
梁恩溢強調，AI產業目前僅處於成長週期的起步階段，回顧全球科技發展史，從2000年代初期個人電腦普及化奠定台灣電子供應鏈地位，到2011年前後智慧型手機掀起行動通訊革命，再到2024年正式開啟AI元年，並預計算力需求將持續成長至2040年，每一波生產力革命皆帶動台廠供應鏈實質受惠並壯大，在AI具備不可替代性的戰略價值下，新科技將持續為台股注入強大成長動能，長線趨勢依舊看多。
然而，AI產業鏈分配精密，數百家企業錯落在產業鏈的上、中、下游與周邊，從中如何挑選深具成長潛力且與時俱進的個股，極度考驗對產業的熟稔度與市場靈敏度。梁恩溢說明，00400A的優勢，在於擁有國泰投信投研團隊透過大數據深度剖析產業，精準鎖定市場風口，再憑藉經理人多年操盤經驗，靈活調控投資組合，在市場震盪中主動尋求提前布局深具優勢產業的機會。
梁恩溢進一步表示，00400A作為全台首檔導入月配息機制的主動式台股ETF，不僅有望精準捕捉「動能成長」的獲利契機，在面對市場劇烈波動時，更具備「收益防守」的核心價值，選股邏輯不單以企業息率為唯一標準，更深度評估企業的成長動能與現金流狀態，避開「高息陷阱」，透過挑選具有成長性的公司，讓高股息需求的投資不再被動，打造兼具防禦韌性與進攻動能的投資組合。

news.Title: 外資連六賣3276億神山壓盤 傳產扛大旗成台股救星｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
在油價飆破80美元、通膨壓力升溫與中東戰火延燒的夾擊下，美股科技股表現分歧，市場避險情緒明顯升高。道瓊工業指數下跌1.61%，那斯達克指數下跌0.26%，標普500指數下跌0.56%，費城半導體指數下跌1.17%；其中與燃油較為相關的航空業、旅遊業、運輸業、物流業、民生消費等族群承壓，晶片股也持續受地緣政治與高油價干擾。不過盤面並非全面重挫，AI題材股各自表現，顯示資金流向明顯題材分化；台積電ADR同步走弱1%，也讓半導體族群氣氛偏保守。
亞股方面，在中東局勢與油價上揚陰影下，區域市場漲跌互見。日股走揚0.62%，韓股小漲0.02%，港股上漲1.57%，上證指數也同步上漲0.38%。
回到台股，今(6)日加權指數下跌73.40點，收在33,599.54點，成交金額6,323.65億元，雖然大盤開低後一度下探33,322.52點，但盤中跌勢逐步收斂，周線收黑。權值股方面， 台積電(2330) 再度成為盤面關鍵，受美股與ADR偏弱影響下挫10元， 聯發科(2454) 、 鴻海(2317) 與 台達電(2308) 也同步承壓；不過強勢族群並不缺席，受惠國際油價走揚， 台塑化(6505) 盤中漲停， 台塑(1301) 、 台化(1326) 表現強勢，成為盤面抗震指標。題材股方面，通訊網通股 兆赫(2485) 亮燈漲停， 群創(3481) 再度衝上成交王。顯示在權值股休兵之際，資金仍持續在題材股與高成交人氣股間快速輪動，讓盤勢呈現「指數震盪、題材各自表現」的格局。
📝盤點熱門股：群創、凱基台灣TOP50、元晶 今日熱門成交股方面，面板股 群創(3481) 以84.08萬張成交量再次奪下成交王，股價強漲，也是前五大成交股唯一收紅，市場資金聚焦面板族群與低價電子股輪動，加上題材面帶動人氣，使買賣動能明顯升溫；低軌衛星概念股 元晶(6443) 股價下跌但成交仍熱絡，主因市場對低軌衛星題材想像空間持續發酵，吸引資金頻繁進出。
記憶體族群方面， 旺宏(2337) 股價重挫並登上成交排行榜前段，市場關注其爆出5902萬元違約交割事件後的後續影響，反而帶動短線交易量放大；DRAM股 南亞科(2408) 則在盤中震盪後成交放量，市場關注記憶體族群動向，使資金積極進出。另一方面， 凱基台灣TOP50(009816) 也躋身成交前五名，股價小跌但交易仍相當活絡，顯示在大盤震盪之際，部分資金仍透過ETF進行布局與調節。
📌三大法人買賣超 三大法人今日合計賣超292.63億元。其中依然是外資賣壓最重，提款352.36億元，資金持續撤出權值與電子族群，顯示國際資金對盤勢仍偏保守；自營商同樣站在賣方，調節7.48億元。相較之下，投信持續扮演撐盤角色，買超67.21億元，成為三大法人中唯一站在買方的一方，顯示內資資金仍逢低承接、布局台股標的。
🔭重大財經事件展望 下周一（3/90）國際財經事件，先看美國市場，焦點放在美國1月CB就業趨勢指數與2月消費者通膨預期指數，將牽動市場對就業韌性、通膨再起與利率路徑的再定價；歐洲方面，留意德國1月工業生產數據，觀察製造業動能與景氣復甦是否延續；亞太區則聚焦日本1月薪資收入，作為內需回溫與通膨黏著度的關鍵線索；港澳方面，市場將緊盯大陸統計局公布2月CPI、PPI，以及人行2月金融數據（M0、M1、M2、社會融資規模增量、新增人民幣貸款，可能落在10日公布），若數據偏強或偏弱都可能放大陸港股與大宗商品的波動。
台灣方面，國內焦點包括群益投信新基金上市記者會、和潤新春展望記者會，並留意國發會發布1月景氣燈號與出口統計，作為景氣溫度計與外需回補力道的觀察指標；企業動態則以法說會最吸睛，重點可鎖定 聯電(2303) 、 台達電(2308) 、 仁寶(2324) 、 研華(2395) 、 聯詠(3034) 、 中租-KY(5871) 、 力旺(3529) 、 精測(6510) 、 達發(6526) 、 亞德客-KY(1590) 等大廠釋出的接單能見度與毛利展望，牽動半導體、AI伺服器與高價股族群的短線情緒。
註：加權指數成交金額含盤後定價，不含零股、鉅額、拍賣及標購
（核稿編輯：劉凱銘）

news.Title: 外資連六賣3276億神山壓盤 傳產扛大旗成台股救星｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
在油價飆破80美元、通膨壓力升溫與中東戰火延燒的夾擊下，美股科技股表現分歧，市場避險情緒明顯升高。道瓊工業指數下跌1.61%，那斯達克指數下跌0.26%，標普500指數下跌0.56%，費城半導體指數下跌1.17%；其中與燃油較為相關的航空業、旅遊業、運輸業、物流業、民生消費等族群承壓，晶片股也持續受地緣政治與高油價干擾。不過盤面並非全面重挫，AI題材股各自表現，顯示資金流向明顯題材分化；台積電ADR同步走弱1%，也讓半導體族群氣氛偏保守。
亞股方面，在中東局勢與油價上揚陰影下，區域市場漲跌互見。日股走揚0.62%，韓股小漲0.02%，港股上漲1.57%，上證指數也同步上漲0.38%。
回到台股，今(6)日加權指數下跌73.40點，收在33,599.54點，成交金額6,323.65億元，雖然大盤開低後一度下探33,322.52點，但盤中跌勢逐步收斂，周線收黑。權值股方面， 台積電(2330) 再度成為盤面關鍵，受美股與ADR偏弱影響下挫10元， 聯發科(2454) 、 鴻海(2317) 與 台達電(2308) 也同步承壓；不過強勢族群並不缺席，受惠國際油價走揚， 台塑化(6505) 盤中漲停， 台塑(1301) 、 台化(1326) 表現強勢，成為盤面抗震指標。題材股方面，通訊網通股 兆赫(2485) 亮燈漲停， 群創(3481) 再度衝上成交王。顯示在權值股休兵之際，資金仍持續在題材股與高成交人氣股間快速輪動，讓盤勢呈現「指數震盪、題材各自表現」的格局。

說 明：
1.事實發生日:115/03/06
2.公司名稱:群聯電子股份有限公司
3.與公司關係(請輸入本公司或子公司):本公司
4.相互持股比例:不適用
5.發生緣由:本公司為償還既有借款暨充實中期營運週轉資金，擬委由第一商業銀行
及台北富邦商業銀行共同統籌主辦三年期授信總額度不超過新臺幣壹佰貳拾億元聯合授
信案，授信總額度並得視募集情形在25%範圍內調整。
6.因應措施:無。

本公司與授信銀行團洽商並議定一切有關授信條件，及代表本公司議定及簽署聯合授信
合約書及相關文件，並視實際情況全權處理之。

news.Title: 《半導體》南亞科、華邦電、旺宏2月營收再登高 強勁增幅不停歇
news.Content:
【時報記者葉時安台北報導】記憶體製造廠南亞科(2408)、華邦電(2344)、旺宏(2337)公布今年2月營收，南亞科連續四個月創新高、華邦電連續三個月改寫歷史新高紀錄，旺宏也再創40個月以來新高，累積前2月營收，南亞科成長597.10%、華邦電增加91.24%、旺宏年增55.6%，漲幅顯著，預估今年明顯的營運成長率將延續。
南亞科2026年2月份自結合併營收為新台幣156.07億元，月增加1.94%、年增加586.71%，連續四個月創新高。南亞科前2月合併營收為新台幣309.17億元，年增加597.10%。
華邦電自行結算的2026年2月份營收報告，華邦含新唐科技等子公司今年2月份合併營收為119.73億元，月增加1.65%、年增加88.45%，連續三個月改寫歷史新高紀錄。華邦電累計2026年前2月合併營收為237.52億元，年增加91.24%。
旺宏公布內部自行結算之2026年2月份合併營收為新台幣30.30億元，月增加0.4%、年增加60.0%，再創40個月以來新高。旺宏累計2026年1月至2月合併營收為新台幣60.47億元，年增加55.6%。
展望2026全年，由於產業面受到HBM產能排擠傳統DDR4/DDR5及NAND Flash供給，預計全年度都將處於供不應求的賣方市場。DRAM市場預估2026年及2027上半年新增產能有限，多種DRAM產品將持續缺貨；而NAND方面，預估今年下半年NAND Flash的缺口可能比市場預期的更大。
半導體資本支出湧入HBM與DDR5等AI伺服器關鍵產品，車用、工控、網通及消費性電子成熟產品線出現嚴重的結構性缺口，NOR Flash方面，供給吃緊，旺宏擁有穩定產能與多元應用布局可望受惠。

news.Title: 華邦電2月營收再小創新高，AI帶動需求續強
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-03-06 16:28:10 周佩宇 發佈
華邦電(2344)公布2月合併營收119.73億元，月增1.65%、年增88.45%，續創歷史新高；累計2026年前2月合併營收達237.52億元，年增91.24%。公司先前亦公告1月自結稅後盈餘27.83億元，年增562.29%，每股盈餘0.62元，年增幅達576.92%。
華邦電指出，目前整體產能維持滿載，市場需求持續強勁，尤其來自車用、網通、Edge AI與智慧裝置等應用領域。隨著AI相關需求快速成長，帶動記憶體用量提升，公司看好今年營運動能將延續去年下半年回升趨勢，整體營運有望持續向上。
在產業供需方面，公司表示，多數記憶體廠將產能轉往AI相關高階產品及DDR5，使DDR4以下等較舊世代產品供給偏緊，市場缺口短期內仍難完全補齊。在需求支撐下，相關產品價格仍呈現溫和上升趨勢，公司也持續與客戶進行價格協商，有助維持毛利率表現。
此外，華邦電亦持續推進產能布局，台中廠擴產計畫已啟動，最快今年中開始裝機，預計年底逐步貢獻產能；高雄廠產能亦將陸續開出。隨著新產能逐步加入，公司預期將進一步支撐未來營收規模與成長動能。
(圖/資料庫)

news.Title: 《台北股市》三大法人6日賣超前十大 電金傳都倒地 權王挨7刀
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】台股06日加權指數收33599.54點，跌73.40點或0.22%，總成交值6532.66億元。三大法人賣超292.64億元，其中外資賣超352.36億元，投信、自營商分別買超67.21億元及賣超7.48億元。
三大法人賣超前十大個股，依類別分，4檔電子股、2檔金融股及4檔傳產股；依股價分，3檔百元股、3檔中價位股及4檔銅板股；賣超張數方面，6檔賣超上萬張，榜首為富邦金(2881)，賣超2萬2535張，華航(2610)、新興(2605)名列二、三名，分別賣超1萬6665張及賣超1萬5340張。第四及第五名為旺宏(2337)、元晶(6443)，其他依序為中信金(2891)、台積電(2330)、中工(2515)、南亞(1303)及南亞科(2408)。
至於前十大個股中賣超金額前三大，則為台積電(2330)172.93億元、富邦金(2881)20.01億元、旺宏(2337)14.69億元。
●三大法人06日賣超前十名：
1.富邦金(2881)收88.80元，跌1.70元或1.88%，成交量3.64萬張，三大法人賣超2萬2535張、估20.01億元，為連3日賣超，累計賣超3萬9759張、估35.51億元。

4.旺宏(2337)收102.50元，跌5.00元或4.65%，成交量17.40萬張，三大法人賣超1萬4331張、估14.69億元，為連2日賣超，累計賣超1萬7898張、估18.52億元。

6.中信金(2891)收51.40元，跌0.10元或0.19%，成交量3.04萬張，三大法人賣超1萬353張、估5.32億元，為連5日賣超，累計賣超6萬6708張、估34.71億元。
7.台積電(2330)收1890.00元，跌10.00元或0.53%，成交量3.38萬張，三大法人賣超9149張、估172.93億元，為連7日賣超，累計賣超9萬4052張、估1811.82億元。

news.Title: 台股狂震像大怒神 專家揭止跌關鍵：大舉抄底時機還沒到
news.Content:
台股近日波動劇烈，4日終場重挫1494點，創下史上第三大跌點，隔日（5日）早盤又一度暴漲超過1400點，最終收漲844點，寫下史上第五大漲點，今（6）日盤勢再度劇烈震盪，盤中震幅超過500點，終場小跌73點作收，連續幾天的大起大落，讓不少投資人直呼彷彿坐上雲霄飛車。對此，臉書財經粉專「股海老牛」也針對近期盤勢提出分析與觀察。
股海老牛提醒，近期台股在高檔區頻繁出現大量成交，代表上方累積不少套牢籌碼，雖然下方仍有一定支撐力道，但短線要再大幅上攻並不容易，預期指數可能會先在3萬3000點到3萬5000點之間來回整理。
股海老牛也提到，台股近日急殺，逼出不少違約交割案例，其中記憶體股旺宏堪稱「新人殺手」，該股3日跌停、5日又攻上漲停，劇烈震盪之下爆出高達5902萬元的違約交割金額，而6日股價走勢再度反轉，重挫4.65%，顯示市場情緒仍相當不穩。
股海老牛形容，下跌就像一把鋒利的刀，如果在空頭趨勢尚未結束前急著進場接刀，很可能會「滿手是血」。因此投資人應先觀察是否出現以下6個止跌訊號，例如公司宣布實施庫藏股、是否出現融資斷頭，或是國安基金進場護盤等。
從技術面來看，股海老牛指出止跌的關鍵通常包括低檔爆出大量、指數不再破底，以及K線留下長下影線，這些都可能代表市場已有資金開始進場承接。如果之後再搭配幾根強勢紅K，則代表止跌回升的機會將進一步提高。
摩爾投顧分析師鐘崑禎則表示，近期亞洲股市普遍出現大幅下跌，主要受到油價大漲的影響，未來市場仍需觀察油價是否明顯回落，才是投資人真正大舉進場抄底的時機。
◎

news.Title: 再創新高！華邦電2月營收衝近120億元 年增88%
news.Content: 記憶體大廠華邦電（2344）今（6）日公布2月營收119.73億元，雖逢農曆新年，仍繳出月增1.65%、年增88.45%成績，並寫下歷史新高。

news.Title: 《台股盤後》下跌73點、月線有守；週K翻黑
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-03-06 15:46:29 新聞中心 發佈
受到中東戰火未歇及國際油價持續攀升影響，市場觀望氣氛濃厚，台股今(6)日走勢震盪，早盤受到台積電失守1900元大關，以及日月光投控、鴻海、廣達等電子權值股走弱拖累，加權指數一度下跌超過350點、最低觸及33322.52點，不過隨後在台塑化領軍的油電燃氣股、台化/台塑領軍的塑膠股強勢走強，搭配電子股走穩，加權指數終場僅下跌73.40點或0.22%，收在33599.54點、月線有守，成交量明顯縮減至6311.07億元。週K翻黑、本週共計下跌1814.95點或5.12%。
油價大漲引發市場對通膨壓力以及聯準會是否會降息的擔憂，衝擊美股週四下跌。亞洲股市方面，因油價大漲、美股昨日走跌，拖累日經225指數以低盤開出後、一度重挫逾700點，之後因日圓走貶，激勵日經指數翻紅，終場漲0.62%；韓國KOSPI指數收漲0.02%。
台股今日呈現量縮震盪格局，賣壓集中在權值股與部分電子族群，導致指數小幅收黑。電子股走勢不同調，台積電開盤即跌破1900元關卡，終場以1890元作收、下跌0.53%，日月光投控、台達電、聯發科、鴻海同步下挫，健策則受惠終端需求回溫與訂單穩定，推升股價一度衝上漲停，終場收漲近9%。
在29大類股表現上，以油電燃氣股漲勢最強、指數收漲8.84%，台塑化、欣高、山隆、欣天然齊攻漲停，其次為塑膠股上漲2.97%、造紙上漲2.29%，中石化、華夏、再生-KY、亞聚、台達化、台苯、國喬、聯成、台聚同步鎖漲停。整體看來，儘管少數傳產類股有資金輪動進駐，但市場仍以觀望情緒為主。
三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人總計賣超292.64億元；其中，外資及陸資(不含外資自營商)賣超352.36億元，投信買超67.21億元，自營商賣超7.48億元。

news.Title: 台股持續疲軟！專家揭「選股3大SOP」示警最忌諱1事
news.Content:
財經中心／周孟漢報導
美國與以色列聯合對伊朗發動「史詩怒火行動」邁入一週，國際油價持續高漲，引發投資人擔憂。台股今（6）日開低下跌189點、以33,483.94點開出，盤中一度由黑翻紅，終場以33,599.54點作收，小跌73.40點。眼看市場如此震盪，讓不少人深感不安。對此，存股達人陳重銘點出「3大關鍵」強調投資最忌諱的就是「這1舉動」。
台股今開低後雖一度翻紅，隨後又再度下挫震盪；終場指數就以33,599.54點作收、小跌73.40點。（示意圖，與本新聞無關／民視新聞網資料照）
存股達人陳重銘透過臉書 發文 ，坦言這幾天，自己的訊息欄幾乎被問翻了，透露許多人看著大盤站上3萬點，心裡本來就毛毛的，結果國際局勢一緊張、戰爭陰影籠罩，很多人開始慌了，好奇「老師，是不是該清空持股？萬一真的打起來，股市崩盤怎麼辦？」。
陳重銘強調「投資最忌諱的就是『隨風起舞』」。（圖／翻攝自臉書社團《不敗教主-陳重銘》）
對此，陳重銘強調「投資最忌諱的就是『隨風起舞』」，回顧過去幾十年，從海灣戰爭、金融海嘯到近年的地緣衝突，「市場哪一次不是在恐慌中重挫，又在韌性中回升？如果因為害怕戰爭就隨便砍掉手上的好公司，砍掉的不是風險，而是未來的財富」，認為大盤3萬點，確實是一個需要高度警覺的數字。但面對戰爭帶來的波動，需要的不是逃跑，而是一套「耐震」的選股SOP。
陳重銘進一步提醒股民，「如果手裡握著的是真正賺錢的公司，戰爭只是暫時的噪音」。（示意圖，與本新聞無關／民視新聞網資料照）
陳重銘指出，在這個動盪的時刻，聰明的投資人會反過來思考「這3大關鍵」，「哪些公司具備『護城河』，就算局勢再亂，大家還是得掏錢買它的產品？」、「當恐慌性拋售發生時，哪些原本貴到買不下去的優質股，終於跌回了『便宜價』？」、「持股名單裡，有沒有那種禁不起風吹草動、純靠題材炒作的虛胖股？」。
陳重銘進一步提醒股民，「如果手裡握著的是真正賺錢的公司，戰爭只是暫時的噪音；但如果手裡握著的是投機的泡沫，那3萬點加上戰爭，確實會讓你傾家蕩產」，強調「與其每天盯著戰爭新聞嚇自己，不如靜下心來，把投資組合做一次徹底的『壓力測試』。我們無法控制世界和平，但我們可以控制自己的口袋不隨波逐流。趁著現在，給自己的投資換一套更強大的邏輯，在 3 萬點的風浪中，穩穩守住你的資產」。
《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。
原文出處： 台股持續疲軟！陳重銘親揭「選股3大SOP」示警投資「最忌諱這1事」

news.Title: 台股暴漲暴跌將成常態？群益投顧董座蔡明彥揭「基本面穩健但紅包行情告段落」
news.Content: 中東局勢與資金面不確定性持續升溫，台股近期暴漲暴跌，加權指數震盪幅度動輒破千點，將來會成為常態嗎？群益投顧董事長蔡明彥今（6）受訪時坦言，以股價淨值比來看，台股目前已達1995年以來平均值的「兩倍標準差以上」，評價確實偏高。去年科技產業獲利亮眼帶動行情，但今年農曆年後的紅包行情可能已告一段落，市場需要時間消化漲幅並進行整理。

news.Title: 油價成關鍵變數，台股整理後回歸基本面，研華連飆漲停成風向球
news.Content:
【財訊快報／黃啟乙】從國際股市的表現來看，市場情緒已逐漸趨於穩定。接下來週末期間，若國際油價能出現較明顯回落，將有助於舒緩市場對中東局勢的疑慮，並為下週股市反彈創造條件。 不過，此次美伊衝突的發展，仍可能延續一段時間。此外，台股在前一段時間積累不小漲幅，順勢出現回檔整理，也屬於市場正常現象。
隨著企業年報陸續公布，市場焦點將逐漸回歸基本面表現。整體來看，業績優於市場預期的公司，較有機會在整理過程中脫穎而出。
以研華(2395)為例，去年每股盈餘回升至12.25元，股價在經過一段時間整理築底後開始展開反攻，近期更連續拉出兩根漲停，顯示資金對基本面轉佳個股的關注度升高，也可能成為市場觀察的重要風向球。

news.Title: 《台北股市》3月首周殺聲隆隆 外資砍破3000億元 投信獨自力挺
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】美伊戰事升溫，周四美股主指盡墨，周五台股無力開低，盤中一度回神翻紅，而後仍不敵空方壓力加權指數再度轉黑，維持在平盤下直至收盤。今日外資(不含外資自營商)賣超352.3648億元，投信買超67.208億元，自營商賣超7.4812億元，三大法人賣超292.63億元。本周下挫1814點，周K翻黑。
今日外資再砍352.36億元，較前日賣超金額略有收斂，至目前為止已連6日賣超，合計賣超金額突破3000億，為3276.07億元，本周賣超3170.43億元。
本土法人部分，投信持續獨自力挺台股，今日加碼買超67.20億元，本月以來5個交易日皆為買超，合計買超401.96億元；自營商續跟隨外資倒貨，今日賣超7.48億元，連7賣合計924.18億元。
台股今日收跌73點、報33599點、成交量縮至6311億元。盤面上以塑化族群、面板股領漲，權值股部分，權王台積電(2330)跌10元、報1890元；台達電(2308)下跌15元、跌幅約1.1%；鴻海(2317)董事長今開工儀式上釋出今年營運將會不錯消息，股價僅小跌1元。
國際油價飆漲，資金搶進塑化相關概念股，中石化(1314)、台塑化(6505)、華夏(1305)、亞聚(1308)、再生-KY(1337)、山隆(2616)、欣天然(9918)、欣高(9931)、台達化(1309)等多檔刷一排漲停。
面板報價連3月上漲，電視、顯示器續漲，面板三雄逆勢走高，群創(3481)、彩晶(6116)勁揚超過半根，群創更是人氣爆棚，量能達84.3萬張奪下成量排行第一，友達(2409)漲幅約3.6%。
統一投顧表示，川普明確表態「不接受」哈米尼之子接任、中東戰火持續延燒、油價飆高、美擬推AI晶片「全球許可制」，輝達及AMD出口恐都要華府點頭，眾利空因素恐不利指數上攻。惟邁威爾盤後公布財報表現優於預期、證交所引資團隊3月深入全球金融中心紐約，提升市場信心，預估指數高檔震盪整理。3月中旬還有NVIDIA GTC大會、全球最大光通訊展與衛星展等題材支撐，AI中長線趨勢未變。（編輯：邱致馨）

news.Content:

自營商賣超7.48億元，投信買超67.21億元，外資及陸資賣超352.36億元。

news.Title: 外資連六賣再砍352億、投信不離棄 三大法人賣超292.64億元
news.Content:
台股今 (6) 日持續受到中東戰爭局勢不明朗、量縮震盪，尾盤下跌 73.4 點或 0.22%，收 33599.54 點，成交金額大縮至 6311 億元，創近 2 個月新低量；三大法人合計賣超 292.64 億元。
觀察三大法人今天籌碼動向，外資賣超 352.36 億，呈現連六賣；自營商賣超 7.48 億元；投信買超 67.21 億元；三大法人合計賣超 292.64 億元。

news.Title: 【Follow法人】外資續砍台積電破萬張 回頭狂掃群創逾12萬張
news.Content:
（下午4時32分更新分析師觀點）
台股今（6）日陷入震盪，終場收跌73點。三大法人合計賣超292.63億元，外資則是持續站在賣方，賣超352.36億元，累計6個交易日賣超金額達3276.07億元。資深證券分析師蔡明翰表示，根據過去經驗，外資大量賣超逐步收斂時就高機率見到底部，外資買賣超動向往往落後，反而不要看得太重。觀察外資買賣超個股，今日以群創為買超冠軍，回頭狂掃12萬張，同為面板雙虎的友達則居次，買超3.6萬張，不過外資今日仍提款台積電，賣超逾一萬張。

news.Title: 【台股盤後】電子疲弱傳產強勢　指數震盪收跌73點單週下挫1814點
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中台北2026年3月6日電）台股今天在傳統產業股走強支撐下，指數開低後震盪走高，高低落差逾500點，終場下跌73.4點，收在33599.54點，成交值新台幣6311.07億元；本週指數累計下挫1814.95點。
傳統產業股今天表現相對強勢，中東局勢緊張，國際油價高漲，上游原料價格同步揚升，推升台聚 (1304) 、華夏 (1305) 、亞聚 (1308) 、台達化 (1309) 、台苯 (1310) 和國喬 (1312) 等多檔強攻漲停，整體塑膠類股指數上揚2.97%。
造紙、鋼鐵和橡膠類股指數上揚逾2%，食品、紡織和觀光類股也有不錯表現，類股指數上揚逾1%。
電子類股指數下跌0.4%，表現相對疲弱。其中，台積電 (2330) 下跌10元，收在1890元。台達電 (2308) 、鴻海 (2317) 、聯發科 (2454) 和日月光投控 (3711) 等權值股也紛紛收跌。
高價股漲跌互見，股王信驊 (5274) 上漲185元，收在9705元，川湖 (2059) 下跌115元，收在3205元，新應材 (6739) 上漲66元，站上1000元大關，達到1050元，台股出現36千金。
資深分析師劉坤錫表示，台股目前呈現類股輪動走勢，中東局勢變化將是牽動國際股市及台股未來走向的關鍵，是近期市場關注焦點。

造紙、鋼鐵和橡膠類股指數上揚逾2%，食品、紡織和觀光類股也有不錯表現，類股指數上揚逾1%。

news.Title: 〈台股盤後〉馬年開春漲幅沒了 周線長黑跌1814點被打回封關前
news.Content:
台股今 (6) 日持續受到中東戰爭局勢不明朗、量縮震盪，尾盤下跌 73.4 點或 0.22%，收 33599.54 點，成交金額大縮至 6311 億元，創近 2 個月新低量，單周下跌 1814.95 點或 5.12%，將馬年開春首周的漲幅 1808.78 點全部吞噬。
觀察今日主要權值股表現，台積電 (2330-TW) 下跌 10 元或 0.5%，收 1890 元；台達電 (2308-TW)、鴻海 (2317-TW)、聯發科 (2454-TW)、廣達 (2382-TW) 等也全數收黑，日月光投控 (3711-TW) 跌逾 3%。
記憶體族群再度成為重災區，南亞科 (2408-TW) 重挫 9%，華邦電 (2344-TW)、旺宏 (2337-TW) 也跌逾 4%，另外，欣興 (3037-TW)、光聖 (6442-TW)、亞德客 - KY(1590-TW) 等也跌逾 4%，京元電子 (2449-TW)、川湖 (2059-TW) 等跌 3%。
不過，穎崴 (6515-TW) 逆勢漲停、研華 (2395-TW)、健策 (3653-TW) 等漲約 9%，金像電 (2368-TW)、富世達 (6805-TW) 等漲逾 7%；面板 3 月價格可望續強，群創 (3481-TW) 漲逾半根停板、友達 (2409-TW) 也漲 3%。
另外，中東情勢升溫，持續推升國際油價續揚，台塑化 (6505-TW) 今日再度漲停，台塑 (1301-TW)、台化 (1326-TW) 以及遠東新 (1402-TW) 等也漲 4-5%。

news.Title: 【台北股市】跌73.40點
news.Content:
（中央社台北2026年3月6日電）台北股市今天走勢震盪，收盤跌73.40點，為33599.54點，跌幅0.22%，成交金額新台幣6311.07億元。
加權指數開盤為33483.94點，盤中最高33829.49點，最低33322.52點；不含金融股指數30040.31點，跌64.17點。
八大類股漲跌幅：泥窯股跌0.10%、食品股漲1.33%、塑化股漲1.58%、紡織股漲1.77%、機電股跌0.41%、造紙股漲2.29%、營建股漲0.11%、金融股跌0.27%。
委買張數2269萬7383張，委賣張數1327萬5863張，成交張數1010萬788張。
收盤時上漲586家，下跌412家，持平97家。
成交量前5名個股為群創、凱基台灣TOP50、元晶、旺宏、南亞科。
漲幅前5名個股為虹光、GIS-KY、新唐、倚天酷碁-創、晶彩科。
跌幅前5名個股為工信、鴻碩、永冠-KY、邁科、南亞科。

news.Title: 盤中黑翻紅又下挫震盪！台股終場小跌73點　台積電收1890元
news.Content:
即時中心／綜合報導
美國與以色列聯合對伊朗發動「史詩怒火行動（Operation Epic Fury）」邁入一週，國際油價持續高漲，引發投資人對通膨以及聯準會是否會降息的擔憂，美股週四（5日）全面收跌。台股今（6）日開低下跌189點、以33,483.94點開出，盤中一度由黑翻紅，但隨後又再度下挫震盪；終場指數就以33,599.54點作收、小跌73.40點，跌幅0.22％，成交量6,311.07億元。台積電（2330）終場以1,890元作收、下跌10元。
電子權值股方面，鴻海（2317）收在223元，跌1元；聯發科（2454）收1,765元，下跌10元；廣達（2382）收289元，跌0.5元；台達電（2308）以1,320元作收，下滑15元；日月光投控（3711）收342元，跌11.5元；聯電（2303）收62元，跌0.1元；大立光（3008）收在2,380元，漲20元。
金融方面，富邦金（2881）收88.8元，下跌1.7元；國泰金（2882）收在73元，跌0.6元；中信金（2891）以51.4元作收，跌0.1元；兆豐金（2886）收在39.3元平盤價；華南金（2880）收在35.2元，跌0.2元；第一金（2892）收29.4元，漲0.35元；合庫金（5880）以平盤23.4元作收。
今日成交量前10名個股依序為群創、元晶、旺宏、南亞科、友達、力積電、中石化、華邦電、兆赫、華通。此外，漲幅前五名為虹光、倚天酷碁-創、晶彩科、新唐、GIS-KY；至於跌幅前五名則為工信、鴻碩、永冠-KY、邁科、南亞科。
《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。
原文出處： 快新聞／盤中黑翻紅又下挫震盪！台股終場小跌73點 台積電收1890元

news.Title: 巨震逾500點！台股收盤下跌73點 南亞科爆量逼近跌停
news.Content:
投資人擔憂中東戰火升溫，周四道瓊下跌近800點，費半也跌逾1%，衝擊台股今（6）日開盤下跌逾300點，低點來到33322.52點，隨後一度翻紅漲157點，來到33829.49點，指數上下震盪逾500點，但在電金賣單釋出下又翻黑，終場跌73.4點收33599.54點，成交量縮至6311億。
台積電下殺10元收1890元，記憶體股又急挫，昨日漲停的南亞科及旺宏下殺9.51%及4.65%，金像電逆勢強漲逾7%。
台股昨收33672.94點，大漲844.06點或2.57%，總成交值7853.94億元。三大法人賣超456.66億元，外資賣超514.95億元，投信、自營商買超146.03億元及賣超87.75億元。
美股道瓊下跌784.67點或1.61%，收47,954.74點。S&P500下跌38.79點或0.56%，收6,830.71點。NASDAQ下跌58.50點或0.26%，收22,748.99點。費城半導體下跌92.72點或1.17%，收7,821.76點。

news.Title: 台大校園徵才3/7登場！台積電、聯發科龍頭齊聚 高薪上看8萬
news.Content:
臺灣大學校徵3月7日登場！104人力銀行表示，與台積電、聯發科、美光、國泰金控等上百家科技業與金融業上市櫃公司齊聚「椰林大道」徵才，歡迎新鮮人前往應徵。
根據104人力銀行數據顯示，今年2月共有105萬個正職工作，當中有78萬個不限工作經歷歡迎新鮮人佔75%；薪資方面，最近3年新鮮人月薪中位數可達3.6萬元，以資訊軟體、金融、營建三類人才月薪中位數可突破3.8萬元最具薪資競爭力。
104人力銀行集團行銷長張寶玲指出，市場缺工與AI熱潮成為企業聘用新鮮人的有利條件，大型科技及營造業針對搶手的工程師職缺開出7~8萬元的高月薪，鼓勵新鮮人「敢出發 就有路」放膽爭取理想的工作。
（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: 400萬人屏息以待！26檔3月除息台股ETF 00919配息金額唯一創高
news.Content: 根據CMONEY最新統計資料顯示，截至3月4日，共有26檔台股ETF公布將在3月除息，400萬受益人屏息以待。其中包括群益台灣精選高息（00919）、FT臺灣永續高息（00961）、國泰台灣領袖50（00922）、中信綠能及電動車（00896）、大華優利高填息30（00918）共5檔年化配息率超過10%。

news.Title: 想進台積電看過來！ 桃竹苗要辦21場校徵 釋5萬職缺還有近10萬補助
news.Content:
畢業季將至，勞動部桃竹苗分署攜手20所大專院校，自3月起舉辦21場校園徵才博覽會，包含台積電、聯發科、美光等1,800家企業，釋出逾5萬個工作機會，結合政府近160億元「投資青年就業方案」資源與各項就業補助，不僅要讓學子與產業接軌，更要以優渥補貼成為社會新鮮人最堅實的職涯後盾。
首場將於3月11日在中原大學揭開序幕，接續由3月14日國立陽明交通大學接棒、3月21日國立清華大學、3月22日國立中央大學及3月24日明新科技大學等校辦理。參與企業橫跨科技製造、工程建設、金融服務及社會人文等領域，除台積電、瑞昱半導體、聯發科、世界先進、台灣美光等科技製造指標企業外，亦匯聚中鼎工程、台塑企業、奇美實業、和泰汽車、凱基金融、第一商業銀行、富邦人壽及桃園機場等各界知名企業共襄盛舉，反映各產業企業對青年專業人才的高度需求。
桃竹苗分署長賴家仁表示，勞動部已於112年推動「投資青年就業方案第二期」，整合跨部會資源，4年投入近160億元，全面支持青年從職涯探索、技能培訓到就業銜接的各階段需求。分署同步推動多項青年就業獎補助措施，其中「支援青年就業計畫」最高可領4萬8,000元，協助青年安心就業；另「青年跨域就業促進補助」結合租屋與異地就業交通補助，最高補助9萬6,000元，有效降低跨縣市就業負擔，提升留任與穩定度。
賴家仁表示，校園徵才不僅是企業延攬人才的重要平台，更是青年掌握產業趨勢、及早規劃職涯的重要契機。透過現場面試、履歷健診及職涯諮詢等服務，協助青年縮短摸索時間，明確就業方向，為踏入職場做好充分準備。
（封面示意圖/翻攝自勞動部桃竹苗分署）

news.Title: 6檔台股紅包開跑！抽中景碩最高一張可望賺15萬元
news.Content: 台股抽籤紅包來了！近期共有6檔個股將進行上市櫃現金增資公開申購，其中以ABF載板廠景碩（3189）最受矚目，若以目前股價計算，抽中一張潛在獲利超過15萬元，報酬率突破一倍；此外半導體光罩廠光罩（2338）潛在獲利也超過2萬元，成為近期投資人關注的抽籤標的。

news.Title: 台股ETF 3月除息秀！5檔年化配息率破10% 00919配息唯一創高
news.Content:
26 檔台股 ETF 將在 3 月上演除息秀，其中，備受市場矚目的群益台灣精選高息 (00919-TW)、FT 臺灣永續高息 (00961-TW)、國泰台灣領袖 50(00922-TW)、中信綠能及電動車 (00896-TW)、大華優利高填息 30(00918-TW) 五檔年化配息率超過 10%，400 萬受益人屏息以待。
進一步觀察，這 26 檔將除息的台股 ETF，以月配型產品佔多數，共計多達 13 檔，有 10 檔是季配，2 檔半年配與 1 檔雙月配，在產品類型上劃分為高息型、產業型與市值型，以高息型 17 檔最多。
值得一提的是，擁有約 120 萬名受益人的 00919 此次為第 12 次配息，金額達 0.78 元，是唯一一檔配息金額創新高的台股 ETF，預估年化配息率 12.82%，為連續 12 季維持 10% 以上，除息日為 3 月 17 日，參與除息最後買進日為 3 月 16 日，配息發放日為 2026 年 4 月 14 日。
市場法人指出，近期因伊朗戰事，台股遭遇亂流，在市場震盪中穩步達成財務目標，高息股便可納入考量，如果能有股息、又有潛在的價差空間可期，台股精準高息 ETF 就是最佳標的。像 00919 這樣維持配息金額新高，就值得投資人多關注。
群益台灣精選高息 ETF 經理人謝明志表示，台股近日受到中東緊張局勢影響震盪劇烈，金融市場變化瞬息萬千，要能抵禦台股市場的波動度，建議配置中要有高息 ETF，因為在面臨市場波動時，高息資產具備易漲抗跌的特性，可為投資組合帶來平衡風險效益，又可兼顧穩健收益需求。在沒有經濟衰退和沒有升息的背景下，台股沒有轉為空頭市場的疑慮，中長期後市表現仍可期，投資人可逢低分批布局。
※

news.Title: 《台北股市》零股股東也能領紀念品 網推10檔銅板股
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】受美日韓等國際股市連袂強彈帶動，台股昨（5）日暴力大漲844點，但相較早盤一度大漲近1500點，解套賣壓逢高湧現，使單日漲幅接近砍半，加上美伊戰火持續，地緣政治複雜難解，法人對台股短線後市仍偏保守。
網友則認為，比起貿然進場搶股票，不如鎖定低基期龍頭股，買零股換紀念品更穩當，並點名包括華新(1605)、群創(3481)、友達(2409)、中光電(5371)、茂迪(6244)等10檔銅板股，今年股東會紀念品都相當不錯，且有3家最低不到20元，就能換到市價200~300元的優質好米，CP值最高。
相較貿然進場搶短撿股變接刀，不少網友開始將目光投向股東會紀念品，就有人細心整理出10檔百元銅板股，均送出台灣在地好米，且不限1張，零股股東也能領。
其中，華新、宏盛(2534)、群創等3家，均送出1公斤大包裝，出手最大方，友達、中光電、茂迪等3家，也致贈600公克，且不乏宜蘭等地的優質好米。
華新、群創送1公斤包裝米
根據網友整理的零股紀念品，可見至少10家銅板股都送白米回饋股東，其中友達、宏盛、研勤(3632)等3家，股價20元有找最便宜，中光電股價則落在80元上下，身價最高。
其中，華新送益田米1000g、友達送源頭米600g、希華(2484)送宜蘭米500g、宏盛送西螺米1000g、群創送青田米1000g、研勤送穗美人300g、永新-KY(4557)送養氣米600g、光聯(5315)送台灣米600g、中光電送心苑米600g，以及茂迪的優選米600g。
展望台股後市，群益投顧分析，大盤短線急殺後有反彈可能，但地緣政治不確定因素未除，波段低點仍需進一步確認，建議逢彈適度技術性短打，中期靜待落底訊號，再擇優分批布局。
第一金投顧則表示，台股短線正乖離率仍偏大，加上地緣政治風險未除，需沉著面對，操作上需嚴控持股水位，留意地緣政治、荷姆茲海峽通行狀況及油價等3大變數。
分析師也提醒，台股若無法扭轉5日均線反壓的情況，預期還是維持整理格局，弱勢股可以考慮進行減碼。(新聞來源：旺得富理財網 李宗莉)
※

news.Content:

Lightwave Logic Q4 Earnings Call Highlights

In this article: LWLG

Perkinamine commercialization progress: Lightwave Logic said its Perkinamine electro‑optic polymer is moving from research toward commercial validation—showing high‑speed, low‑voltage performance, improved reliability, and several customer programs advancing to stage‑three with wafer tape‑outs and expected chip returns in Q2 2026.

Stronger liquidity and runway: A December 2025 public offering (≈$32.8M net) plus a $4.9M overallotment left the company with about $69 million in cash, and management says it is funded beyond December 2027.

Foundry and manufacturing buildout: The company has agreements with four major foundries (including Silterra and GlobalFoundries), planned wafer runs in H1 2026, and is ramping Denver back‑end processes to support prototyping and a potential production scale‑up targeted for 2027.

Interested in Lightwave Logic Inc.? Here are five stocks we like better.

Lightwave Logic (NASDAQ:LWLG) used its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results call to emphasize continued execution toward commercialization of its Perkinamine electro-optic polymer platform, highlighting progress in reliability work, silicon photonics foundry integration, and a growing set of customer engagements moving through the company’s staged development cycle.

Commercialization focus and polymer platform progress

President and CEO Yves Lemaitre characterized 2025 as an “execution year,” saying the company moved “aggressively from research validation towards structure commercialization.” He said the Perkinamine platform continued to demonstrate high-speed bandwidth, low drive voltage, compact device footprint, and compatibility with silicon photonics and the broader semiconductor ecosystem.

→ Uber and Joby Aviation Team Up: Game Changer or Hype?

Lemaitre said Lightwave Logic expanded reliability datasets, particularly addressing issues that have challenged prior polymer generations, including temperature stability and photo-oxidation. He also pointed to advances in back-end-of-line integration, describing novel solutions for electro-optic polymer deposition and encapsulation aligned with semiconductor fab tools and processes.

Financial results and liquidity

For full-year 2025, the company reported revenue of approximately $237,000, primarily from licensing and non-recurring engineering (NRE), compared with $96,000 in 2024. Net loss was approximately $20.3 million, or a loss of $0.16 per share, improving from a net loss of $22.5 million, or $0.19 per share, in 2024.

→ BigBear.ai Stock Is Down Big, But Smart Money Is Quietly Buying

Research and development expense was approximately $11.5 million, down from $16.8 million in the prior year, while general and administrative expense rose to approximately $9.5 million from $6.4 million.

Lightwave Logic also highlighted balance sheet strengthening actions. In December 2025, the company completed a public offering that generated approximately $32.8 million in net proceeds from issuing 11.6 million shares. The company ended 2025 with about $69 million in cash, which Lemaitre said was roughly double the $34.9 million reported at the end of the third quarter. In January 2026, the company exercised the over-allotment option, adding another $4.9 million in cash. Based on the operating plan, management said it believes the company is funded beyond December 2027.

Customer programs: stage-three activity and near-term revenue expectations

→ Archer Aviation Stock Tanks—The Real Story Is What Wall Street Overlooked

Lemaitre said the company’s “design win cycle matured meaningfully” in 2025, with three programs advancing to “stage three” (prototype to final product) during the year. He added that a fourth Fortune Global 500 customer was added to that stage-three list in 2026, while about 15 additional engagements are progressing through stages one and two.

Stage-three work is currently centered on wafer-level tape-outs followed by chip processing and testing, with possible iterative design optimization, according to Lemaitre. He framed this phase as where “real technical programs conversion into commercial agreements begins,” adding that the company is supporting customers within foundry environments.

Management provided several program-level updates:

Tier-one customer focused on 1.6T transceivers: Lemaitre said this customer is initially targeting 1.6 terabits per second transceivers operating at 200G per lane. In January, the companies launched a full wafer tape-out at a new silicon photonics foundry, and Lightwave Logic expects chips to return in the second quarter of 2026 for processing and testing.

Tier-one customer pursuing co-packaged optics (CPO) materials: Another customer is seeking a next-generation material suited for CPO packaging that can operate at higher temperatures to enable new packaging processes. Lemaitre said the program was launched in 2025 and is a key priority for the chemistry design team in 2026. He also said a foundry run is planned over the next few months to validate a custom modulator chip design required for CPO.

Most recently announced tier-one customer: Lemaitre said this customer plans to design and build silicon photonics chips with embedded modulators at a “state-of-the-art” silicon photonics foundry, which would be the first implementation of electro-optic polymer modulators at that foundry.

Polariton partnership: The company’s longtime customer and partner Polariton continues work toward commercialization of plasmonics, which Lemaitre said has potential to accelerate modulation toward 800G. Lightwave Logic’s role includes supporting prototyping and device packaging reliability programs.

Looking ahead, Lemaitre reiterated that 2026 revenue is expected to be driven primarily by material supply and NRE activity. He said volume production and licensing revenues are not anticipated until 2027 at the earliest, citing rigorous industry qualification cycles and the company’s goal of building “durable, repeatable revenue streams” rather than pursuing short-term revenue opportunities.

Foundry ecosystem expansion and manufacturing preparations

A major theme of the call was expanding the number of foundries able to process the modulator structures required for electro-optic polymer reference designs, which management described as a gating factor for customers already committed to specific foundries.

Lemaitre highlighted a recent announcement involving Silterra and Luceda Photonics: Silterra announced the availability of a high-speed modulator platform based on electro-optic polymer through Luceda’s process design kit (PDK). Lemaitre said Silterra, Lightwave Logic, and Luceda successfully completed a wafer tape-out earlier in 2026, with device characterization and performance validation expected in mid-2026. In the Q&A, he said the tape-out is intended to validate “key design and performance parameters for 200G and 400G modulators” and confirm optimal foundry process and equipment capabilities, with most test results expected by mid-2026.

Management said that with Silterra, GlobalFoundries, and two unnamed partners, Lightwave Logic now has agreements in place with four major foundries, with wafer runs either underway or scheduled for the first half of 2026. Lemaitre added that three additional foundries are under consideration.

On manufacturing, Lemaitre said the company initiated a production ramp-up program in 2025 for its back-end processes performed in Denver, focused on supporting multiple wafer sizes and improving yield, cycle time, and equipment efficiency. The company is also identifying potential industrial partners to outsource this portion of manufacturing for future high-volume production.

During Q&A, Lemaitre said Lightwave Logic intends to proceed with back-end-of-line process and capacity expansion in Denver to support prototyping and final product qualification, while continuing process development to align with semiconductor roadmaps, including migration to larger wafer sizes. He also said the company intends in 2026 to bring one of two external foundry partners to support high-volume manufacturing scale for back-end-of-line processes.

Asked about production volume requirements, Lemaitre said the company is “planning for success” with aggressive assumptions related to potential share gains in 2027 and 2028, and that it has developed models for yield, capacity, and equipment needed to meet its 2027 production targets. He emphasized the importance of being able to ramp quickly after a design win in the AI data center market.

Market context and 2026 priorities

Lemaitre cited third-party market data to frame demand drivers. He referenced LightCounting Research estimates that silicon photonics’ share of the optical transceiver market grew from 10% in 2018 to 33% in 2024 and is expected to become the dominant technology in 2026. He positioned Lightwave Logic’s strategy as enhancing silicon photonics rather than competing with it, arguing that electro-optic polymers can help silicon photonics reach higher bandwidth with lower power per bit.

He also cited LightCounting’s January 2026 report estimating that Ethernet optical transceivers of 100G and above and CPO reached approximately $16.5 billion in revenue in 2025, with projections of about $26 billion in 2026. Lemaitre discussed an accelerating speed roadmap, including expectations for 1.6T transceiver revenue reaching $1 billion in 2026 and 3.2T optics volume production beginning in 2028. He also noted Nvidia’s announced first CPO products, with InfiniBand products entering the market in the first half of 2026 and Ethernet in the second half of 2026.

For 2026, Lemaitre outlined priorities including advancing stage-three programs toward qualification milestones and stage four, converting technical engagements into structured commercial agreements, expanding the electro-optic-polymer-ready foundry ecosystem, continued performance optimization at 200G and 400G per lane and beyond, and operational preparation for a potential 2027 production ramp. He added that while customers control broader transceiver programs and related product timing, the company plans to provide updates through quarterly financial and business update calls, while customer endorsements or announcements would be at customers’ discretion.

About Lightwave Logic (NASDAQ:LWLG)

Lightwave Logic, Inc (NASDAQ: LWLG) is a U.S.-based photonics company focused on the development and commercialization of proprietary electro‐optic polymer materials and devices for high-speed optical communications. The company's core technology platform centers on organic electro-optic polymers that offer low drive voltage, high modulation bandwidth and integration flexibility, enabling next-generation optical interconnects for data centers, telecommunications and emerging photonic computing architectures.

Lightwave Logic's product pipeline includes modulators, waveguides and integrated photonic components designed to outperform traditional lithium-niobate and silicon-based solutions in terms of size, power consumption and ease of integration.

The article " Lightwave Logic Q4 Earnings Call Highlights " was originally published by MarketBeat.

news.Title: 台股單日跌逾千點後 統一投信：逢低加碼好時機
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-03-06 11:03:27 新聞中心 發佈
中東戰事擴大，地緣政治動盪的陰霾壟罩全球股市，台股也跟隨美股下跌。統一投信今(6)日表示，CMoney統計至3/4資料顯示，過去加權指數單日跌點超過千點後，有機會跌深反彈，使短線有不錯表現。台灣今(2026)年經濟成長預期保持強勁，AI落地加速推動趨勢發展，使台股長線仍為多頭格局。因此，當股市出現非基本面因素的下跌時，反而是逢低加碼的好時機，投資人可透過主動式台股ETF及基金，在股市震盪中掌握長線成長機會。
統一投信表示，根據CMoney截至3/4的歷史數據，除了3/4加權指數下跌1495點以外，先前台股單日下跌超過1000點共有4次，去年4/7受到川普宣布關稅政策衝擊，加權指數單日跌點甚至達到2066點，創新高。綜觀過去4次加權指數單日下跌逾千點，後5日的上漲機率為75%，平均漲幅為5.6%；後20日的上漲機率上升至100%，平均漲幅為9.97%。若逐次分析這4次台股下跌後表現，單次的後5日漲幅最高是11.94%，最差則是下跌0.78%；單次的後20日漲幅最高為18.12%，最低也有2.91%。
統一投信表示，ETF投資人可以利用主動統一台股增長(00981A；基金之配息來源可能為收益平準金)，布局台股後市反彈機會。除資本利得外，00981A為季配息，投資人亦有機會獲得配息收益。不需要現金流的投資人也可以善用券商的股息再投入機制，加速資本累積。基金投資人則是可以選擇統一大滿貫基金，掌握台股各產業的輪動機會。若喜歡科技股的強勁爆發力，也可以投資統一奔騰基金，聚焦台股科技產業的長線成長動能。
統一投信台股團隊表示，主計總處公布台灣2025年GDP概估成長率為8.63%，高於預期的7.37%，並寫近15年以來新高。近期主計總處也將2026年經濟成長率從2025年11月預測的3.54%，大幅上修至7.71%，顯示台灣經濟維持強勁擴張。2026年預期在半導體需求增長、全球對AI的資本支出持續擴張下，台股有望維持多頭走勢。
統一投信提醒，主動式ETF與被動式ETF並無絕對的優劣，主動式ETF不保證能超越績效指標、市場大盤或被動式ETF的報酬，且過去績效也不代表未來績效的保證。投資人投資前應審慎評估市場波動與各項投資風險，並詳閱公開說明書，根據自身的投資目標與風險承受度選擇最適合的產品。
統一投信提醒，投資人可以觀察相關金融市場的政經議題變化，作為投資布局時的參考依據。選擇ETF及參與配息時，需留意基金過去配息不代表未來配息，基金配息率亦不代表實際報酬率。金融商品的淨值有可能因各項總經或產業因素變化而上下波動，ETF除息後，配息金額也會從淨值扣除，使淨值出現較大變動。

news.Title: 台股盤中震盪逾500點　台積電股價跌勢收斂
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中台北2026年3月6日電）台股今天開低震盪，指數最低滑落至33322.52點，隨著買盤湧入，傳統產業股紛紛翻揚，指數一度攀高至33829.49點，上漲156.55點，高低震盪逾500點，大盤指數盤中來到平盤附近整理。
至10時50分，台股加權指數為33652.64點，下跌20.3點，成交值約新台幣3769億元。
中東局勢緊張，國際油價高漲，上游原料價格同步揚升，推升台聚 (1304) 、華夏 (1305) 、亞聚 (1308) 、台達化 (1309) 、台苯 (1310) 和國喬 (1312) 等多檔盤中強攻漲停，整體塑膠類股指數勁揚逾4%，表現相對強勢。
紡織、造紙和橡膠類股指數上揚逾2%，鋼鐵和觀光類股指數也上揚逾1%。
電子類股，台積電 (2330) 開盤跳空達1880元，下跌20元，隨著買盤湧入，股價跌勢收斂，一度回升至平盤1900元。聯發科 (2454) 和台達電 (2308) 股價一度由黑翻紅，加上信驊 (5274) 等高價股走強，整體電子類股指數相對抗跌。

news.Title: 外資大賣台積電是送分題？專家曝可上車甜甜價：歷史會重演
news.Content:
台股近日震盪劇烈，台積電一度下殺至1865元，不少投資人猶豫現在該進場還是賣掉，財經專家陳威良在《錢鏡你家》節目分析台積電進場價。
陳威良指出，外資近日大幅賣出台股，其中賣超最多的個股之一就是台積電。不過，長期來看台積電基本面仍具成長動能，未來股價向2500元甚至3000元邁進仍屬合理預期。
陳威良笑說，外資大賣，「我們要用英文跟他說Thank you！」他提醒千萬別跟著外資恐慌殺低，反而要帶著微笑感謝外資，創造出買進便宜台積電的機會。
從基本面來看，陳威良指出，市場預估台積電2027年每股盈餘（EPS）可望達110元，未來仍有上修空間，若以台積電歷史平均本益比約16.9倍計算，合理股價約落在1859元附近。
陳威良認為，近期全球股災台積電股價一度回落至約1865元，已接近合理價水準，「對高成長企業而言，合理價往往就是長線投資人眼中的便宜價位」。
資深分析師杜金龍亦在《錢鏡你家》節目中表示，他農曆年前將持股比重降至約六成，原本是為了降低風險，沒想到馬年開紅盤後，台股一路大漲，讓他直呼「真的感受到賣飛了，每天都在捶心肝」。
不過，也因為手上仍保留部分現金，近期市場震盪反而讓他等到進場機會，杜金龍透露最近以1895元價格入手台積電。他表示，若台積電股價進一步下跌，仍可視情況靈活加碼承接；若沒有再跌，就等待反彈機會；即使短期沒有反彈，也會將這筆投資視為建立中長期部位，並參與3月11日的除息。
◎

news.Title: Nvidia Stock Hasn't Been This Cheap In Nearly a Year. Here's What History Says Happens Next.
news.Content: For as dominant a run as Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has been on over the past few years, the last few months have been rather boring. Since Aug. 1, 2025, the stock has risen a relatively slim 5%. Over that same time frame, the S&P 500 is up around 10%. This is disappointing for many investors (myself included) because Nvidia has been posting unbelievable results along the way. In fact, Nvidia's stock hasn't been this cheap in some time.
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) stock has shown relatively modest gains of 5% since August 1, 2025, underperforming the S&P 500's 10% rise.
• Despite posting strong results, the stock's performance has been less dynamic compared to its previous run.
• The article suggests Nvidia's stock is currently cheaper than it has been in nearly a year.
news.Keywords: Stock Performance, Market Underperformance, Valuation, Historical Analysis

news.Title: US Considers Requiring Permits for Nvidia, AMD Global AI Chip Sales
news.Content:
(Bloomberg) — Nvidia Corp. ( NVDA ) has long been the world’s AI kingmaker. Now, the Trump administration is considering taking a formal role in the industry that would include similarly sweeping powers.
US officials have written draft regulations that would restrict AI chip shipments to anywhere in the world without American approval, giving Washington broad control over whether other countries can build facilities for training and running artificial-intelligence models — and under what conditions.
news.AI_Summary:
• The Trump administration is considering new regulations that would require U.S. government approval for exporting advanced AI chips globally.
• These draft regulations aim to give Washington broad control over international AI development.
• Nvidia Corp. (NVDA) and other leading AI chip providers could be significantly impacted.
news.Keywords: AI Chip Export Controls, US Government Regulation, Global AI Development, Semiconductor Policy

news.Title: 《盤中解析》月線有守 台股震盪由黑翻紅
news.Content:
【時報記者葉時安台北報導】中東戰事升溫，油價突破每桶80美元，同時美債殖利率大幅走高，周四美股四大指數收黑，道瓊大跌784.67點，收回2026年以來的全部漲幅，費半亦下跌1%以上，那指跌幅則相對較小。周五台股開跌189.00點報33483.94點，指數再陷頹勢，權值王台積電再失1900元關卡，電子、金融雙殺，台股晨盤最低至33322.52、下跌350.42點，回測月線，盤面由油電燃氣、塑膠、航運、通信網路、記憶體模組、AI等相對穩盤，盤中成功翻紅至33758.36最高、上漲85.42點，呈現月線有守，傳產有撐，大盤翻紅走揚。
台股ADR周四表現，台積電ADR周四下跌1.00%，收在353.86美元，較台北交易溢價18.13%；聯電亦下跌約1.32%，日月光ADR同樣走跌。權值王台積電(2330)開跌20元至1880元最低，晨盤多處平盤之下震盪；聯電(2303)、聯發科(2454)、日月光投控(3711)、鴻海(2317)等皆走疲。
傳出川普政府正考慮對人工智慧晶片銷售實施許可制度，進一步拖累美股晶片股，AMD下跌1.3%，然輝達收紅0.16%，挾財報與AI需求旺的邁威爾(Marvell)盤後更大漲14.98%。台系AI概念股漲跌不一，金像電(2368)、雙鴻(3324)、健策(3653)、世芯-KY(3661)、貿聯-KY(3665)、譜瑞-KY(4966)、祥碩(5269)、穎崴(6515)等仍表現得一，然川湖(2059)、廣達(2382)、緯穎(6669)等則相對走弱。
油價飆升，欣高(9931)、山隆(2616)、欣天然(9918)、華夏(1305)、再生-KY(1337)、台達化(1309)、台苯(1310)、國喬(1312)、台聚(1304)、台橡(2103)等一排亮燈漲停，國際中橡(2104)、台塑化(6505)、新海(9926)、亞聚(1308)、聯成(1313)、中石化(1314)等亦強漲半根漲停。
航運同樣帶勁，貨櫃三雄陽明(2609)、萬海(2615)、長榮(2603)領軍，建新國際(8367)、中櫃(2613)、榮運(2607)等也走揚1%以上。記憶體製造廠南亞科(2408)、華邦電(2344)、旺宏(2337)平盤震盪，而記憶體模組廠凌航(3135)、宇瞻(8271)、創見(2451)、晶豪科(3006)、威剛(3260)等表現相對強悍。
美國與以色列對伊朗的軍事行動已持續近一周，戰事仍未出現降溫跡象，能源市場受到明顯衝擊，美國原油價格收在每桶約81美元，創2024年7月以來的最高。美系外資警告，油價狂飆加劇通膨壓力，美國10年期公債殖利率已連續第四天走升，若油價持續上升引發通膨與經濟放緩，市場可能重演2021-2023年股債同步下跌。美國也將公布非農就業數據與失業率，觀察是否進一步削弱降息預期。
中信投顧認為，周四量縮弱勢反彈突破短均失敗，短跌趨勢未止穩，前低支撐不宜再破否則再回測機率高，反之有守則正面看待，逢低分批布局趨勢產業績優股，後續觀察美伊戰事、外資操作，以及台股前低是否跌破。

news.Title: 《盤中解析》月線有守 台股震盪由黑翻紅
news.Content:
【時報記者葉時安台北報導】中東戰事升溫，油價突破每桶80美元，同時美債殖利率大幅走高，周四美股四大指數收黑，道瓊大跌784.67點，收回2026年以來的全部漲幅，費半亦下跌1%以上，那指跌幅則相對較小。周五台股開跌189.00點報33483.94點，指數再陷頹勢，權值王台積電再失1900元關卡，電子、金融雙殺，台股晨盤最低至33322.52、下跌350.42點，回測月線，盤面由油電燃氣、塑膠、航運、通信網路、記憶體模組、AI等相對穩盤，盤中成功翻紅至33758.36最高、上漲85.42點，呈現月線有守，傳產有撐，大盤翻紅走揚。
台股ADR周四表現，台積電ADR周四下跌1.00%，收在353.86美元，較台北交易溢價18.13%；聯電亦下跌約1.32%，日月光ADR同樣走跌。權值王台積電(2330)開跌20元至1880元最低，晨盤多處平盤之下震盪；聯電(2303)、聯發科(2454)、日月光投控(3711)、鴻海(2317)等皆走疲。

news.Title: 《基金》26檔台股ETF於3月除息400萬人領息 這幾檔配息率逾10%
news.Content:
【時報記者張佳琪台北報導】進入3月份，有26檔台股ETF公布將在3月份除息，累計400萬受益人準備領息。統計顯示，其中，群益台灣精選高息(00919)、FT臺灣永續高息(00961)、國泰台灣領袖50(00922)、中信綠能及電動車(00896)、大華優利高填息30(00918)共5檔年化配息率超過10%。
進一步觀察這26檔將除息的台股ETF，月配型產品佔多數，共計13檔；另有10檔季配、2檔半年配與1檔雙月配。在產品類型上劃分為高息型、產業型與市值型，以高息型17檔最多。若以受益人數前十大的配息率表現看，群益台灣精選高息ETF(00919)已是第12次配息，金額0.78元，配息金額創新高，預估年化配息率為12.82%。國泰台灣領袖50(00922)預估年化配息率12.66%，配息表現居次。
面對近期市場的動盪，群益台灣精選高息(00919)經理人謝明志表示，中東緊張局勢影響股市，金融市場變化瞬息萬千，若要抵禦台股市場的波動度，資產配置中可以配置高股息ETF，在面臨市場波動時，高息資產具備易漲抗跌的特性，可在兼顧收益的同時，為投資組合帶來平衡風險效益。他說，在沒有經濟衰退和沒有升息的背景下，台股沒有轉為空頭市場的疑慮，中長期後市表現仍可期。
00919第12次配息金額0.78元，預估年化配息率連續12季維持10%以上，除息日為3月17日，參與除息最後買進日為3月16日，配息發放日為4月14日。

news.Title: 〈台股開盤〉大震盪後量能縮 早盤跌逾300點 權值股走弱靠戰爭受惠股撐盤
news.Content:
台股昨 (5) 日反彈大漲逾 800 點，對於中東戰事對市場的不確定性，央行表態，「股匯最大震盪應已結束」，今 (6) 日早盤，台股振幅雖縮小，但仍跌逾 300 點，台積電失守 1900 元，加上電子權值股臉黑，最低跌至 33322.52 點，回測月線支撐，預估全日成交值進一步除至 5800 億元，較日前上兆元量能急縮。
電子權值股今天全面走跌，台積電 (2330-TW) 跌 0.53%，聯發科 (2454-TW) 跌 0.56%，台達電 (2308-TW) 則小跌 0.37%。另外，鴻海 (2317-TW)、廣達 (2382-TW) 及日月光 (3711-TW) 跌逾 1%。
今天大盤雖然走弱，但受到中東戰事影響，荷莫茲海峽遭封鎖，市場預期運輸成本將提升，運費也可能隨之調漲，航運類股有望成為受惠族群，貨櫃雙雄雙雙走揚，陽明 (2609-TW) 漲逾 3%，萬海 (2615-TW) 漲逾 2%。
中東戰火除影響運費，市場預期塑化與原料族群供給將減少，油價也飆破 80 美元，激勵相關類股今天走揚，天然氣部分，欣高 (9931-TW)、欣天然 (9918-TW) 高掛漲停紅燈，大台北 (9908-TW) 漲逾 3%。
塑化族群方面，台塑四寶台塑化 (6505-TW) 大漲逾半根停板，台塑 (1301-TW) 漲逾 3%，南亞 (1303-TW)、台化 (1326-TW) 皆漲逾 1%。另外，台達化 (1309-TW)、台苯 (1310-TW) 雙雙漲停，華夏 (1305-TW)、台聚 (1304-TW)、國喬 (1312-TW) 也都大漲逾半根停板。
美股四大指數全數收黑，道瓊指數下跌 784.67 點或 1.61%，收 47954.74 點；那斯達克指數下跌 58.5 點或 0.26%，收 22748.99 點；S&P 500 指數下跌 38.79 點或 0.56%，收 6830.71 點；費城半導體指數下跌 92.717 點或 1.17%，收 7821.761 點。
